title: Antigravity IDE: 本地透传代理最小实现（记录+转发）
description: 为 Antigravity IDE 提供一个本地 forward proxy（HTTP + CONNECT）用于 best-effort 透传与记录（至少记录 CONNECT 目标/耗时/字节数；若有明文 HTTP 也记录 method/url/status）。不修改 RouteCodex 主链路，只作为 scripts 工具。
acceptance_criteria:
- 提供 scripts 可执行入口：启动本地代理端口（默认 127.0.0.1:8080）
- 支持 CONNECT 隧道转发并记录目标 host:port + 字节计数
- 支持明文 HTTP proxy 请求并记录 method/url/status（可选记录 body，必须脱敏 Authorization/Cookie）
- 提供 docs：如何在 Antigravity settings.json 配置 http.proxy 并验证是否生效
- 给出可复现的验证命令（curl 通过代理）
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-04):
- Script: scripts/antigravity-ide-forward-proxy.mjs
- Docs: docs/ANTIGRAVITY_IDE_FORWARD_PROXY.md
- Smoke: curl via proxy works
  - HTTP: curl -x http://127.0.0.1:18080 http://example.com -I
  - HTTPS: curl -x http://127.0.0.1:18080 https://example.com -I
  - Log sample: /tmp/antigravity-proxy.jsonl contains kind=connect_start/connect_end for example.com:443
close_reason: Implemented local forward proxy (HTTP + CONNECT) + docs; verified via curl with connect_start/connect_end logs.

title: Antigravity: 403 verify-account auto OAuth + 30min cooldown
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Antigravity/Gemini upstream 403 containing verify/validation_required/accounts.google.com/signin/continue triggers interactive OAuth (Camoufox) exactly once per alias/token within cooldown.
- Subsequent requests within 30 minutes do NOT re-open OAuth; error is returned but without repeated auth attempts.
- Portal readiness wait uses 300s default (configurable).
- Add logs/metrics to confirm when repair is skipped due to cooldown.
notes:
Started implementation: improve 403 status extraction + Camoufox auto repair env + 30min cooldown guard. Pending full build:dev + install:global verification.
Evidence
- 403 status extraction now checks nested response.status/response.statusCode: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts
- 403 verify/validation_required triggers interactive OAuth via Camoufox with cooldown guard: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts + src/providers/auth/oauth-repair-cooldown.ts
- Camoufox auto mode wired for antigravity/qwen/gemini in auto repair: src/providers/auth/oauth-repair-env.ts

Tests
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.google-verify.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/oauth-repair-cooldown.spec.ts → PASS

Verification
- npm run build:dev → OK (includes install:global; routecodex --version = 0.89.1685)
close_reason: Antigravity 403 verify-account auto OAuth + cooldown; verified

title: OAuth: antigravity-auto confirm稳定化 + CLI自动→手动回退
description:
## Context
- antigravity-auto 在 Google OAuth 页面出现确认按钮但因文本不匹配跳过点击，导致等待 callback 超时。
- CLI `routecodex oauth *-auto` 当前失败会直接抛错/退出；期望自动模式失败后回退到手动( headed ) Camoufox。

## Acceptance Criteria
- antigravity-auto 不依赖按钮文本，使用 selector/role 点击 primary action（确认/继续/允许），并且不再依赖新 page event 才能继续。
- `routecodex oauth antigravity-auto|gemini-auto|qwen-auto <token>`：自动流程失败时自动回退到手动 Camoufox（headed），不出现 Node 未捕获异常崩溃。
- portal/页面等待相关的 10-30s timeout 提升到可配置且默认 300s（避免网络慢导致误判）。
- `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` 通过。
notes: 2026-02-07 verification rerun: manual oauth path (routecodex oauth <token> --headful) now stays manual/open-only (no auto selectors) and auth URL contains hl=en to stabilize Google UI rendering. Evidence: ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_DEBUG=1 routecodex oauth '/Users/fanzhang/.routecodex/auth/antigravity-oauth-3-antonsoltan.json' --headful prints OAuth URL with hl=en and camoufox-launch-auth log 'open-only mode enabled'. Validation passed: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.os-policy.unit.test.ts tests/providers/core/oauth-refresh-permanent-errors.spec.ts tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts tests/commands/oauth-command.behavior.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.nonblocking-repair.spec.ts ; npm run build:dev (includes npm run install:global).

title: OAuth: qwen refresh/auto 不中断 + 统一README
description:
## Context
- qwen token refresh 可能返回 permanent invalid_request，当前会输出失败日志；必须保证不阻塞 server/request。
- 需要统一 OAuth 使用/刷新/认证文档，包含 camoufox 自动/手动说明、刷新窗口、以及 tokenFile 约定（qwen default pinned）。

## Acceptance Criteria
- qwen refresh 失败不会阻塞 server 启动/请求；token daemon 对 permanent 失败写入 norefresh 后不再重复尝试。
- 提供统一 README（或 docs）说明：如何刷新、如何自动 oauth、如何手动 oauth、如何排查 camoufox 未安装。
- `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` 通过。
notes:
- Qwen tokenFile=default is pinned to `~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-1-default.json` (server reads the same file as `routecodex oauth ...`).
- `routecodex oauth` uses Camoufox qwen auto by default and now auto→manual fallback is implemented in `src/token-daemon/index.ts`.
- Unified OAuth guide updated with Camoufox timeout envs: `docs/OAUTH.md`.

Verified docs/build after Camoufox timeout doc update: `npm run build:dev` OK (v0.89.1695).

title: Routing: antigravity gemini-3-pro-low maxContext=256k + longcontext backup
description:
## Context
- antigravity provider config currently declares gemini-3-pro-low maxContext=1,000,000 and routes it as longcontext primary.
- Actual gemini-3-pro-low context is 256k; when token estimates exceed 256k this should not be a primary longcontext target.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Update config so antigravity gemini-3-pro-low maxContext=256000 (and used by VirtualRouter).
- Move antigravity.gemini-3-pro-low from longcontext primary pool to longcontext backup pool.
- Update provider default catalog so newly-inited configs carry the same maxContext for gemini-3-pro-low.
- Verify `npm run build:dev` and `npm run install:global`.
notes:
Implemented config+catalog updates for gemini-3-pro-low context/routing; running full build verification next.
Evidence:
- Updated local config: ~/.routecodex/config.json
  - virtualrouter.providers.antigravity.models.gemini-3-pro-low.maxContext = 256000
  - virtualrouter.routing.longcontext: removed antigravity.gemini-3-pro-low from longcontext-gemini-primary; added to longcontext-backup
- Updated default init catalog: src/cli/config/init-provider-catalog.ts (gemini-3-pro-low maxContext=256000)
- Verified: npm run build:dev (includes npm run install:global) succeeded (v0.89.1699)
close_reason: Set gemini-3-pro-low maxContext=256k and moved it to longcontext backup.

title: CLI oauth: surface quota authIssue (verify required) to match daemon-admin
description:
## Context
- daemon-admin Credentials shows token validity plus quota authIssue (e.g. google_account_verification => "verify required").
- CLI `routecodex oauth <selector>` may print "Token is still valid; skip interactive" or "认证完成" without surfacing that the alias is quarantined (reason=authVerify) and still needs Google account verification.
- Users perceive CLI vs WebUI as conflicting.

## Acceptance Criteria
- When a token is valid but quota-manager indicates google_account_verification for the same provider+alias, CLI prints a clear warning and the verification URL hint.
- When OAuth refresh/reauth completes, CLI prints the same warning if verify-required remains flagged.
- Add unit test coverage for the warning logic.
- `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` pass.
notes:
Implemented CLI warning for quota-manager google_account_verification (verify required) so CLI and daemon-admin no longer conflict.

Evidence
- Reads ~/.routecodex/quota/quota-manager.json and detects authIssue.kind=google_account_verification: src/token-daemon/quota-auth-issue.ts
- routecodex oauth <selector> now warns even when token is valid/skip OAuth, and after successful reauth: src/token-daemon/index.ts
- Tests: tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts (added coverage)

Verification
- npm run build:dev (includes npm run install:global) PASS (RouteCodex v0.89.1701)
close_reason: CLI oauth surfaces verify-required quota authIssue

title: bug(quota-ui): reset action doesn't clear antigravity alias + remove health sorting
description:
## Context
- daemon-admin Quota table sorts by health (inPool/cooldown/blacklist) on every poll, which makes rows jump and selection unstable.
- WebUI reset on an antigravity providerKey may not clear alias-level quarantine/blacklist across models; expected one reset to recover the whole alias.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Quota table ordering is stable across polling (sort by providerKey only; no health-based reordering).
- POST /quota/providers/:providerKey/reset and /recover reset/recover the whole antigravity alias group (all providerKeys under antigravity.<alias>.*).
- Verified by npm run build:dev (includes install:global).
notes:
Fixes daemon-admin quota UX + reset semantics.

Evidence
- Quota table no longer health-sorts on every poll (stable providerKey sort): docs/daemon-admin-ui.html
- Reset/Recover for antigravity now expands to whole alias group (antigravity.<alias>.*) using quota admin snapshot: src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/quota-handler.ts

Verification
- npm run build:dev (includes npm run install:global) PASS (RouteCodex v0.89.1701)
close_reason: Stable quota UI ordering + alias-group reset/recover

title: feat(oauth): CLI auto-open google verify URL in Camoufox
description:
## Context
- CLI `routecodex oauth <selector>` may report success/valid token while quota-manager still marks the alias as `google_account_verification` (verify required).
- Today CLI prints the verification URL, but user must manually copy/paste or switch to daemon-admin UI to click open.

## Acceptance Criteria
- When CLI detects verify-required and URL is present, it can open the verification URL in Camoufox automatically in headed mode (open-only, no callback wait).
- Default behavior: prompt the user to open (TTY). If `--headful` is used or env `ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_AUTO_OPEN_VERIFY=1`, auto-open without prompt.
- URL is sanitized (strip newlines / trailing text; extract first https URL).
- Unit tests cover auto-open path.
- `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` pass.
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-05)
- Auto-open verify URL (Camoufox open-only): src/token-daemon/index.ts
- Sanitize quota-manager authIssue.url (strip newlines/trailing text): src/token-daemon/quota-auth-issue.ts
- Unit test: tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts (auto open when ROUTECODEX_CAMOUFOX_DEV_MODE=1 / --headful)

Verification
- npm test (PASS)
- npm run build:dev (PASS, includes install:global) — RouteCodex v0.89.1702
close_reason: CLI can open google verify URL in Camoufox (open-only) when quota-manager flags verify-required.

title: bug(token-daemon): refreshAhead default 30min + permanent refresh suppression
description:
## Context
- `docs/OAUTH.md` says token-daemon refreshes **30 minutes** before expiry and supports env override `ROUTECODEX_TOKEN_REFRESH_AHEAD_MIN`, but code default is 5 minutes and doesn't read that env var.
- Permanent refresh failures (e.g. qwen invalid refresh token/client_id) should persistently suppress further background refresh attempts without getting cleared by daemon's own token-file writes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- TokenDaemon default refreshAhead is 30 minutes.
- Env override works: `ROUTECODEX_TOKEN_REFRESH_AHEAD_MIN` / `RCC_TOKEN_REFRESH_AHEAD_MIN`.
- Permanent refresh failure writes `noRefresh` and history uses post-write mtime so auto-suspension isn't cleared immediately.
- Docs updated to reflect actual behavior (CLI auto-open verify URL + refreshAhead env).
- `npm run build:dev` passes (includes install:global).
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-05)
- TokenDaemon refreshAhead default=30 + env override: src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts
- Permanent refresh failure writes noRefresh + uses post-write mtime in history: src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts
- TokenHistoryStore paths now resolved per-instance (respects /Users/fanzhang in tests/edge env): src/token-daemon/history-store.ts
- Tests: tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.auto-refresh-noninteractive.spec.ts (noRefresh + mtime)
- Tests: tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.refresh-ahead.spec.ts (default + env override)
- Test suite list updated: package.json ()
- Docs: CLI verify-required now offers Camoufox one-step open + env flag: docs/OAUTH.md

Verification
- npm run build:dev PASS (RouteCodex v0.89.1705; includes install:global)
Note: package.json test:routing-instructions now includes tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.refresh-ahead.spec.ts (so build:dev runs it). TokenHistoryStore now resolves paths from process.env.HOME at runtime (so tests can sandbox state).

title: Camoufox 乱码修复 + Claude/Gemini 对齐 Antigravity-Manager
description:
## Context
用户反馈 antigravity OAuth 在 Camoufox 打开的 Google 页面仍出现乱码；同时要求将当前 Claude/Gemini 相关行为与 Antigravity-Manager 对齐。

## Scope
- 修复 Camoufox 打开 OAuth/verify 页面乱码或显示异常。
- 对齐 Gemini/Claude 相关 provider/transport 细节到 Antigravity-Manager 当前行为（仅限已确认差异）。
- 保持手动与自动 OAuth 模式严格分离（manual 不触发 auto selector）。
acceptance_criteria: - 手动 oauth --headful 打开页面不再出现可复现乱码（至少通过本地最小复现命令验证输出链路和关键参数）。\n- Gemini/Claude 对齐点具备明确代码与测试覆盖。\n- npm run jest:run 对新增/变更测试通过；npm run build:dev 通过；npm run install:global 可用。
notes:
2026-02-07 implementation: (1) Camoufox locale hardening for OAuth: added locale env propagation (LANG/LC_ALL/LANGUAGE) from ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_GOOGLE_HL in src/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.ts and scripts/camoufox/launch-auth.mjs; added firefoxUserPrefs intl.accept_languages for all Playwright-launched Camoufox contexts; detached/manual Camoufox binary launch now also receives locale env. (2) Antigravity manager alignment for Gemini/Claude request envelope: antigravity requestId prefix now consistently agent-* even in minimal header mode in src/providers/core/runtime/gemini-http-provider.ts and src/providers/core/runtime/gemini-cli-http-provider.ts (matching Antigravity-Manager wrappers). (3) tests updated: tests/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.os-policy.unit.test.ts + tests/providers/core/runtime/gemini-cli-http-provider.unit.test.ts. Validation: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.os-policy.unit.test.ts tests/providers/core/runtime/gemini-cli-http-provider.unit.test.ts tests/providers/core/runtime/gemini-http-provider.unit.test.ts tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts tests/commands/oauth-command.behavior.spec.ts ; npm run build:dev passed (includes install:global and blackbox antigravity parity).
2026-02-07 follow-up: added Camoufox font/user.js managed prefs patch in scripts/camoufox/launch-auth.mjs (UTF-8 fallback + zh/ja/ko/western font prefs) to mitigate OAuth page garbling; added token-daemon auto auth coverage for gemini-cli in src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts and iflow env scoping in src/providers/auth/oauth-repair-env.ts. Tests passed: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-repair-env.antigravity.spec.ts tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.auto-refresh-noninteractive.spec.ts tests/commands/oauth-command.behavior.spec.ts. Full validation passed: npm run build:dev (includes install:global + regression stack + antigravity blackbox parity).
2026-02-07 auth-ui revamp: redesigned daemon-admin Auth page layout to mirror Antigravity-Manager workflow (Auth Inventory + Auth Workbench + Manual/Auto split + Verify Center + Run Console) in docs/daemon-admin-ui.html. Added explicit mode handling to /daemon/oauth/authorize in src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/credentials-handler.ts: mode=manual clears ROUTECODEX_CAMOUFOX_AUTO_MODE/ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_AUTO_CONFIRM, mode=auto uses withOAuthRepairEnv; headful control split (manual default headed, auto headed only with debug flag). Validation: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/commands/oauth-command.behavior.spec.ts; npm run build:dev passed (full stack + install:global + blackbox parity).

title: 修复 config init 在 Jest 下误进入交互导致超时
description:
## Problem
`tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts` 在本地 TTY 环境下会进入交互式 provider 选择并阻塞，导致超时；期望在测试环境（Jest）默认视为 non-interactive，除非显式注入 ctx.prompt。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 在 Jest 环境（JEST_WORKER_ID 或 NODE_ENV=test）下，config init 在未提供 --providers/--template 时不进入 readline 交互，而是走 Non-interactive error 分支
- `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts` 通过
notes:
Fix: disable readline-based interactive prompt in Jest unless ctx.prompt is explicitly provided.

Change:
- src/cli/commands/config.ts: buildInteractivePrompt returns null when JEST_WORKER_ID or NODE_ENV=test.

Evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts (PASS)
close_reason: Jest 下禁用 readline 交互，避免 config init 阻塞超时

title: clock_auto: finish_reason=stop 时未命中 stopMessage 也应 hold 到窗口并触发 followup
acceptance_criteria: 1) 当响应 stop/length 且 stop_message_auto 未触发时，clock_auto 在存在未投递任务且未到窗口时必须 hold 到 threshold 后触发 followup；2) 当任务已在触发窗口内(at>=dueAt-dueWindow)时，本轮应直接触发 followup（不再要求下一轮请求）；3) 非流式默认应允许 hold（与文档一致），且可通过 holdNonStreaming=false 显式关闭；4) 增加回归测试覆盖 stream/non-stream + in-window + out-of-window 场景。
notes: Implemented and validated requested stop/clock hold behavior. Evidence: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/clock/config.ts; sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/clock-auto.ts; sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/process/chat-process.ts; tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts. Validation: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts (16 passed); npm run build:dev (full workflow passed).

title: stopMessage add 900s guard and 5+5 loop breaker
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- stop_message_flow followup chain is hard-capped at 900 seconds and returns fetch failed/network style error once exceeded.
- detect identical request+response signature for stop_message_flow; at 5 consecutive repeats inject loop-break warning into followup.
- if identical signature reaches 10 consecutive repeats, abort with fetch failed/network style error.
- add regression tests covering warning-at-5 and fail-at-10 behavior.
- run targeted stopMessage test suite and build:dev.
notes:
- Implemented stopMessage hard guard in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/engine.ts:
  - 900s stage cap for stop_message_flow followup chain; timeout now returns fetch failed style network error (code=SERVERTOOL_TIMEOUT, status=502).
  - Identical request/response pair loop detection for stop_message_flow: warn at 5, hard stop at 10.
  - Warning injected as system text into followup payload once threshold reached.
- Added regressions in tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts:
  - injects loop-break warning after 5 identical rounds
  - returns fetch failed after 10 identical rounds
  - returns fetch failed when elapsed > 900s
- Verification:
  - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts --runInBand
  - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-progress-logging.spec.ts --runInBand
  - npm run build:dev (includes install:global) ✅
close_reason: Implemented 900s stopMessage timeout + 5/10 loop breaker with regressions and build:dev verification

title: apply_patch errorsamples: classify new shapes and add compat regressions
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Re-check current ~/.routecodex/errorsamples/apply_patch samples and classify newly appeared failures into fixable/non-fixable with concrete shape patterns.
- Implement minimal single-point compat normalization for newly fixable shape(s) only.
- Add/extend regression tests for each newly fixed shape and keep fail-fast for unsafe/unfixable shapes.
- Verify with targeted tests plus build checks (sharedmodule + routecodex relevant checks).
notes:
Reclassified apply_patch errorsamples (2026-02-08):
- Fixable: missing_changes/sample_3822f76126d86adb.json (command-envelope string with embedded apply_patch patch).
- Non-fixable by design (kept fail-fast): invalid_file/sample_30314d85377023cc.json, invalid_json/sample_443d3f3d04c258a8.json, invalid_json/sample_f4347c9ca07aab6b.json, invalid_lines/sample_1d7e5fbc277f2418.json, invalid_lines/sample_e18cff34dbd89dcb.json, missing_changes/sample_e917bf14bee10bb0.json.
Implementation:
- Added command field extraction in apply_patch normalizer default action list.
- Added regressions in sharedmodule tests + tool-governance check.
Verification:
- cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build (matrix passed).
- cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && node scripts/tests/tool-governance-check.mjs (passed).
- Dist validation over ~/.routecodex/errorsamples/apply_patch now shows sample_3822... => ok, others unchanged fail-fast.
close_reason: Fixed command-envelope apply_patch missing_changes shape; added regressions and verified build/matrix

title: Auth Inventory: action-column recover flow + refresh endpoint check
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Auth Inventory 不在 status 列内嵌链接，改为独立 action 列按钮（Recover/Open Verify）。
- Recover 按钮执行 refresh -> auto oauth -> manual fallback。
- /daemon/credentials/:id/refresh 路由可用，并有 e2e 覆盖（至少 unknown id 返回 404）。
- build:dev 与 install:global 完成并通过。
notes:
- UI action column + recovery button wired: docs/daemon-admin-ui.html
- refresh endpoint availability regression: tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts
- verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts --runInBand
- verification: npm run build:dev (includes install:global) passed
close_reason: Auth Inventory recover UX + refresh route validation completed

title: daemon-admin: oauth auth tabs should not trigger main panel tab switch
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Clicking Manual Auth/Auto Auth tabs never hides main panels.
- Start Manual Auth/Run Auto Auth buttons remain clickable and produce run-console logs.
- Main top tab switching keeps working as before.
notes:
- root cause: oauth mode buttons reused `.tab` class and were captured by global `document.querySelectorAll(".tab")` click binder
- fix: scope main tab logic to `.tab[data-tab]` only in selectTab/getActiveTab/event binding
- verification: script syntax check + npm run install:global passed
close_reason: Scoped main tab selectors to data-tab, oauth controls clickable again

title: daemon-admin: token portal should use actual running server port
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- OAuth portal URL is generated even when ROUTECODEX_PORT/RCC_PORT env is unset.
- Server publishes actual listen port for oauth lifecycle usage.
- Manual auth from daemon-admin opens portal/camoufox as expected.
notes:
- root cause: portal base resolver relied on ROUTECODEX_PORT/RCC_PORT only; daemon-admin process often starts with config port and no env.
- fix: server start exports ROUTECODEX_SERVER_PORT from actual bound port; resolver now falls back to ROUTECODEX_SERVER_PORT.
- verification: daemon-admin.e2e + install:global passed.
close_reason: Portal base now resolves against live server port

title: qwen oauth device polling interval unit mismatch blocks token save
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Qwen device flow does not wait 5000 seconds between token polls when polling.interval=5000.
- Manual auth completion updates token file and status transitions from expired on next refresh.
- Add regression test covering interval normalization behavior.
notes:
- root cause: poll interval used `(config.polling.interval || 5) * 1000` while configs already use milliseconds (5000), causing 5,000,000ms sleep.
- fix: normalize interval units and prefer device-code response interval when provided.
- files: src/providers/core/strategies/oauth-device-flow.ts, tests/providers/core/oauth-device-flow-polling-interval.spec.ts
- verification: jest targeted suite + install:global passed.
close_reason: Polling interval normalization fixed; qwen manual oauth can complete and persist token

title: Global process kill/shutdown audit logging
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- RouteCodex writes lifecycle events to ~/.routecodex/logs/process-lifecycle.jsonl.
- Every signal-handler entry logs receipt + trigger (SIGTERM/SIGINT/SIGUSR2/uncaughtException).
- Every internal kill attempt (port cleanup / restart/shutdown self-kill) logs target pid, signal, and outcome.
- Console prints concise blue lifecycle line for stop-related events to aid live diagnosis.
- Add regression test for logger write + non-crash behavior.

title: VirtualRouter: add multimodal route category with media-first routing
description:
Context
- Add a dedicated multimodal route category distinct from vision detour.
- For requests with image/video in latest user turn, prefer routing.multimodal directly.
- If routing.multimodal is missing/empty, fallback directly to routing.vision.

Acceptance Criteria
- Introduce route category `multimodal` in Virtual Router priority/order and classification reasoning.
- Media requests prioritize `routing.multimodal`; missing/empty multimodal falls back to `vision`.
- Support pool priority inside multimodal route: iflow.kimi-k2.5 first, tab.gpt-5.2-codex fallback (config-driven).
- Existing non-media routing behavior remains unchanged.
- Add/update regression tests for classifier + route candidates + fallback behavior.
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core build/tests pass for touched scope.
acceptance_criteria:
- media latest-turn -> multimodal
- multimodal absent -> vision
- non-media unchanged
- targeted router tests pass
- sharedmodule build passes
notes:
Implementation completed:
- Added `multimodal` to Virtual Router route priority and media classifier mapping.
- Media routing now prefers `routing.multimodal`; falls back to `vision` when multimodal pool is absent.
- Limited kimi/responses inline media boosting to multimodal route tier selection.
- Updated route color mapping for multimodal hits.
- Updated router regression scripts/tests for multimodal + fallback behavior.
- Updated local runtime config: ~/.routecodex/config.json with multimodal primary(iflow.kimi-k2.5)/backup(tab.gpt-5.2-codex).

Verification evidence:
- cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && node scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs ✅ (Matrix passed)
- cd /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/routecodex && npm run -s build:dev ✅
- RouteCodex build stack also completed install:global + mock regressions + blackbox checks in build:dev pipeline.
close_reason: multimodal route category implemented and verified

title: CLI stop requires password and align /shutdown auth
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- `routecodex stop` requires explicit `--password` and rejects missing/invalid credentials.
- Password can be overridden via env (`ROUTECODEX_STOP_PASSWORD` / `RCC_STOP_PASSWORD`).
- Add/keep regression tests for password gate behavior.
- Track whether `/shutdown` route should adopt the same password requirement and document decision.

title: Qwen userInfo 404 时降级并回填 api_key
description:
## Problem
Qwen OAuth 启动时尝试通过 userInfo 接口补齐 api_key，但当前 userInfo 端点返回 404，导致日志报错且无法补齐。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 当 userInfo 404 时，不再报错（降级为 debug），并将 api_key 回填为 access_token（等价于现有 Authorization 行为，且可避免重复尝试 userInfo）
- fetchQwenUserInfo 不再把 access_token 放在 URL query（优先 Authorization header），并支持多种 query 参数名作为兼容
- Jest 覆盖：userInfo 404 时 ensureValidOAuthToken 仍写入 api_key
notes:
Fix: when Qwen userInfo endpoint returns 404, treat access_token as api_key and avoid repeated userInfo calls; also fetchQwenUserInfo no longer leaks tokens in URL (prefers Authorization header, then query fallback).

Changes:
- src/providers/auth/qwen-userinfo-helper.ts: supports env override for userInfo URL; tries bearer first
- src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts: 404 => merge api_key=access_token; log downgraded to debug
- tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts: adds 404 fallback test

Evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts (PASS)
close_reason: Qwen userInfo 404 降级：回填 api_key=access_token

title: Fix exec_command(apply_patch) compatibility rewrite
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Reproduce latest codex sample showing exec_command wrapping apply_patch.
- Rewrite these tool calls to apply_patch in llmswitch-core response/request tool governance.
- Add regression tests proving rewrite for response and request history.
notes: Evidence: codex sample req_1770602912613_f8001c03 had function.name=exec_command wrapping apply_patch; after rewrite in llmswitch-core tool-governor, normalizeApplyPatchToolCallsOnResponse outputs function.name=apply_patch and request path injects [Codex NestedApplyPatch Policy]. Tests passed: tool-governor-apply-patch-rewrite + tool-guidance-exec-command.
close_reason: Added llmswitch-core rewrite for exec_command(apply_patch) and regression tests.

title: 支持 !provider.model:passthrough 对话级直通与原始快照
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- 支持在消息中使用 <**!provider.model:passthrough**> 指定本次对话路由到目标 provider.model 且 processMode=passthrough。
- passthrough 生效时保留并记录入口原始请求与原始响应快照，便于排查对话中断。
- 不影响未使用该命令的现有路由行为。
- 至少补充/更新一条回归验证（脚本或测试）。
notes: Execution progress: parser/state/pipeline passthrough audit changes completed with targeted tests + tsc pass. Remaining: same-shape + control replay evidence collection before close.

title: parser: passthrough mode gating + suffix fallback
description: 实现 <**!provider.model:passthrough**> 的解析与模式门控，并保证未声明 passthrough 时保持 chat。
acceptance_criteria: - 仅当标签内包含 :passthrough 才设置 processMode=passthrough\n- 无后缀或未知后缀时按 chat 处理\n- 不影响 allow/disable/enable/force 既有解析
notes: Implemented parser mode-gating in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/routing-instructions.ts: only :passthrough enables passthrough; unknown suffix falls back to regular mode.

title: 扩展 responses 跨协议 dropped/lossy 审计覆盖（response_format/include/store 等）
description: 基于 responses->chat->(anthropic|gemini) 映射链，补齐当前仍静默丢失字段的审计与策略：response_format/parallel_tool_calls/include/store/service_tier/truncation 等；按 preserve|mapped|dropped|lossy 给出明确处理。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 明确字段语义矩阵并标注 preserve/mapped/dropped/lossy；2) 对无等价字段至少写入 mappingAudit.dropped（字段名/目标协议/原因）；3) 对可降级但语义损耗的字段写入 mappingAudit.lossy；4) 新增单测覆盖 anthropic 与 gemini 两条跨协议路径
notes: Implemented cross-protocol dropped/lossy audit on anthropic+gemini mappers for responses-origin fields: prompt_cache_key/response_format/parallel_tool_calls/service_tier/truncation/include/store (dropped) and reasoning (lossy). Added same-protocol parameter transparency carry for service_tier/truncation/include/store in responses mapper + responses bridge context/flattening. Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-audit-matrix.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-prompt-cache-cross-protocol.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-reasoning-mapping.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-field-transparency.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-submit-tool-outputs.spec.ts (PASS 5 suites/11 tests). Verification: npx tsc --noEmit (PASS).

title: CI: npm llms 模式下 routing passthrough 测试兼容
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- ROUTECODEX_JEST_USE_NPM_LLMS=1 时，routing-instructions 相关测试不因 llms 版本差异失败。
- 若 llms 支持 :passthrough 语法，断言 processMode=passthrough；若不支持，走兼容断言并通过。
- 本地执行与 CI 等价命令通过。
notes:
Root cause: CI uses `ROUTECODEX_JEST_USE_NPM_LLMS=1` (npm llms dist) where `:passthrough` prefer suffix may be unsupported; hard assertions expected support and failed.
Fix: add runtime capability probes and dual-path assertions (supported vs graceful-degrade) in tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts and tests/servertool/virtual-router-routing-instructions.spec.ts.
Verification: `ROUTECODEX_JEST_USE_NPM_LLMS=1 npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/virtual-router-routing-instructions.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS; `ROUTECODEX_JEST_USE_NPM_LLMS=1 npm run test:ci:jest` PASS; `ROUTECODEX_JEST_USE_NPM_LLMS=1 ROUTECODEX_CI_MAX_WORKERS=2 npm run test:ci:coverage` PASS.
close_reason: CI red fixed by llms-capability-gated passthrough assertions

title: state: persist processMode in force/sticky/prefer
description: 将 processMode 从指令解析结果写入 force/sticky/prefer 状态，并随会话恢复。
acceptance_criteria: - applyRoutingInstructions 三类 target 均持久化 processMode\n- 反序列化后 processMode 不丢失\n- 路由命中后 target.processMode 与指令一致
notes: Persisted processMode for force/sticky/prefer in applyRoutingInstructions and propagated instruction mode into selected target metadata in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts.

title: chat-process: passthrough parse+record only
description: passthrough 下 chat_process 仅做解析与记录，不触发治理注入。
acceptance_criteria: - passthrough 下不进入 tool governance/continue_execution 注入\n- 记录 parse-only 审计节点\n- 非 passthrough 行为不变
notes: Added parse+record-only branch for passthrough in HubPipeline request governance stage with explicit node metadata skip reason.

title: pipeline: raw inbound/providerInput + todo in/out
description: 新增 passthrough 审计快照：raw inbound/providerInput 与 todo.inbound/outbound。
acceptance_criteria: - 记录 metadata.passthroughAudit.raw.inbound\n- 记录 metadata.passthroughAudit.raw.providerInput\n- 记录 todo.inbound 与 todo.outbound
notes: Added metadata.passthroughAudit raw/todo snapshots (inbound/providerInput + todo.inbound/outbound + governance skip marker) in both request-stage and chat_process entry pipelines.

title: regression: same-shape + control replay matrix
description: 补齐 parser/state/passthrough 的回归测试与 same-shape/control 复现记录。
acceptance_criteria: - 至少新增 1 条 parser+state 单测\n- 至少新增 1 条 pipeline passthrough 审计单测\n- 提供 same-shape + control replay 证据
notes:
Added/updated regression tests: tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts, tests/servertool/virtual-router-routing-instructions.spec.ts, tests/servertool/hub-pipeline-passthrough-audit.spec.ts. Local replay evidence pending manual same-shape/control run.
Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/virtual-router-routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/hub-pipeline-passthrough-audit.spec.ts (PASS 41 tests). Verification: npx tsc --noEmit (PASS). build:dev attempt blocked by verify:repo-sanity due pre-existing untracked files tests/sharedmodule/tool-governor-apply-patch-rewrite.spec.ts and tests/sharedmodule/tool-guidance-exec-command.spec.ts.

title: responses 跨协议字段语义矩阵（原始语义基线）
description: 基于官方协议文档建立字段语义矩阵，定义 preserve/mapped/dropped/lossy 规则，先覆盖 responses 请求关键字段（含 prompt_cache_key/reasoning）。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 输出字段矩阵文档（字段×协议×方向）并标注 preserve/mapped/dropped/lossy；2) 每个字段提供来源语义依据（官方文档链接）；3) 明确同协议透明与跨协议降级规则；4) routecodex-111 notes 中记录结论与下一步实现清单
notes:
语义基线（首版）：1) prompt_cache_key 仅 OpenAI Responses/Chat 有明确等价语义，Anthropic/Gemini 无同名等价字段，跨协议应 dropped+audit；2) reasoning 可做同义降级映射：responses.reasoning -> anthropic.thinking / gemini.generationConfig.thinkingConfig；3) Chat process 中间态需保留原字段，跨协议按 capability 做 preserve|mapped|dropped|lossy 标注。

Implementation support added (tests-first):
- Added responses field transparency / cross-protocol audit regression tests under tests/sharedmodule/responses-*.spec.ts
- Adjusted passthrough streaming conversion guard: convertProviderResponseIfNeeded now bypasses conversion only when passthrough && !wantsStream (streaming keeps SSE path)
Commits: af870e966

Still missing for acceptance:
- A written field semantic matrix doc (preserve/mapped/dropped/lossy) with citations.

title: 实现 prompt_cache_key 策略（同协议保留，跨协议删除+审计）
description: 在 chat process 出站映射阶段统一处理 prompt_cache_key：responses/openai 同协议保留；anthropic/gemini 等无等价语义协议删除，并写入 mapping audit。
acceptance_criteria: 1) responses→responses 保留 prompt_cache_key 且回放等价；2) responses→anthropic/gemini 不向上游发送 prompt_cache_key；3) 记录 dropped 字段审计（字段名、原因、目标协议）；4) 相关单测覆盖 preserve 与 dropped 两类路径
notes:
Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/responses-prompt-cache-cross-protocol.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-reasoning-mapping.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-field-transparency.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-submit-tool-outputs.spec.ts (PASS 4 suites / 9 tests). Verification: npx tsc --noEmit (PASS). Implemented cross-protocol drop+audit for prompt_cache_key in anthropic/gemini semantic mappers; same-protocol preserve covered by responses-field-transparency test.
Implementation and tests are complete; closure is currently gated by dependency routecodex-111.6 (semantic baseline task still open).

title: 实现 reasoning 同义映射（按协议能力降级）
description: 将 responses reasoning 语义映射到各协议可用能力：Anthropic thinking、Gemini thinkingConfig、其他协议按能力降级或关闭；确保 chat process 中间态保留。
acceptance_criteria: 1) responses.reasoning 能映射到 anthropic thinking；2) responses.reasoning 能映射到 gemini generationConfig.thinkingConfig；3) 不支持多级设置的协议采用开关降级并记录 lossy 审计；4) 同协议 responses 不丢 reasoning 字段
notes: Implemented responses.reasoning semantic mapping to anthropic.thinking and gemini generationConfig.thinkingConfig; Anthropic codec now preserves top-level thinking field. Verification: tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-reasoning-mapping.spec.ts PASS; npx tsc --noEmit PASS. Remaining: finalize explicit lossy-audit policy for non-equivalent reasoning granularity.

title: 字段映射验证矩阵与回放证据（same-shape/control）
description: 补齐字段映射验证：单元矩阵 + provider same-shape replay + unaffected control replay，作为 routecodex-111.5 关闭前证据。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 增加字段映射矩阵测试（至少覆盖 prompt_cache_key/reasoning）；2) 完成同形回放（受影响 provider）并附 requestId/前后字段对比；3) 完成 control 回放（不受影响 provider）并附证据；4) routecodex-111.5 附上可复现命令与输出摘要
notes:
Unit matrix portion in progress and currently passing (responses prompt_cache_key + reasoning + transparency tests). Pending closure evidence: same-shape replay for affected providers and control replay for unaffected provider with requestId and before/after field snapshots.
Added matrix regression test tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-audit-matrix.spec.ts (anthropic+gemini) to verify dropped fields (prompt_cache_key/response_format/parallel_tool_calls/service_tier/truncation/include/store) and lossy reasoning audit. Current unit matrix passes with 5 suites / 11 tests.

title: Validate command leaves orphaned server processes
description:
Problem: src/commands/validate.ts spawns 'rcc start' detached+unref without shutdown or pid management. Repeated validate runs can leave orphaned RouteCodex servers consuming memory/ports.

Acceptance Criteria:
- validate no longer leaves background RouteCodex processes after completion/failure.
- validate startup/health flow still works for both existing and auto-started servers.
- add guard or cleanup behavior documented if server already running.
notes: Implemented validate cleanup to avoid orphaned server processes; replaced detached+unref spawn with managed child + shutdown/kill in finally. Added stop on failed readiness. Added AGENTS.md dev compliance guidelines for bd + daemon safety + review checks. Evidence: src/commands/validate.ts, AGENTS.md.
close_reason: validate cleanup implemented

title: Provider V2 分层重构：Kernel × 4 Protocol × Family Profile
description:
Context
- 现有 Provider V2 在通用 transport 中混入多处品牌特判（iflow/qwen/gemini 等），导致职责边界不清、扩展成本高、回归范围不可控。
- 目标架构采用三层：Kernel（纯通用）→ Protocol（OpenAI Chat / OpenAI Responses / Anthropic Messages / Gemini）→ Family Profile（品牌差异策略）。

Success Criteria
- 输出并评审通过一份架构草案（ADR/RFC），明确边界、抽象接口、目录分层、迁移顺序与回滚方案。
- 给出当前代码的品牌特判清单与归属迁移矩阵（迁移到 Protocol 或 Family Profile）。
- 形成可执行的分阶段 BD 任务树（含验收标准、测试矩阵、same-shape/control replay 要求）。
- 在未获审批前不进行大规模代码迁移，仅完成草案与任务治理。
notes: - 新增发布检查清单：docs/v2-architecture/PROVIDER-V2-CHANGESET-RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md（含风险标签、cherry-pick 顺序、mandatory/replay gate）。

title: Investigate provider.model returns PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE
description: User reports provider.model requests returning PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE across multiple providers; investigate regression surface and root cause.
acceptance_criteria:
## Acceptance Criteria
- Reproduce provider.model request path and capture route_select + provider-error evidence
- Verify virtual-router direct_model hit behavior via unit tests and dryrun
- Identify whether failure is routing-layer or upstream/provider-layer
- Propose concrete remediation options and validation steps
notes:
Evidence collected:
- Unit tests: tests/servertool/virtual-router-routing-instructions.spec.ts and tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts PASS
- virtual-router dryrun (iflow/qwen/glm) shows routeName=direct and correct providerKey selected in both base and actual modes
- Direct route verification script (dist engine+bootstrap) also maps provider.model -> providerKey correctly for iflow/glm/qwen/gemini/antigravity
- codex-samples stage5.route_select confirms direct_model hits; provider-error files show upstream errors (iflow: 400 Model not support; qwen: 400 model not supported; glm: 429 balance/resource issue)
Initial conclusion: routing hit path works; failures occur after provider send, then retry/failover exhausts candidates and surfaces PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE.
\nFix implemented:\n- request-executor / http-server now rethrow prior provider error when later retries fail with PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE (pool exhausted), avoiding misleading PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE masking upstream error.\n- Added regression tests: tests/server/http-server/execute-pipeline-failover.spec.ts, tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts\n- Build verified via npm run build:dev on 2026-02-10.\nCommits: af870e966

4. 提供回归测试验证两种路由在 provider.model 模式下正常工作

title: Clock 客户端 daemon 注入 + 私有 clock 标记语义落地
description:
## Background
当前 clock 依赖 servertool followup/hold，但当无法控制 codex/claude 输入时，定时触发存在交互盲区。

## Goal
实现 rcc 启动时的客户端 daemon（tmux 注入），并支持 <**clock:{time,message}**> 私有语法在 Hub 入站解析后映射为标准 clock 工具语义（tool_call/tool_result + call_id）。

## Scope
- RouteCodex: launcher + daemon 注册/心跳/注入接口 + graceful 降级
- llmswitch-core: 私有 clock 标记解析、tool_call_id 缺失补全
- 测试：clock/servertool/launcher 路径回归与新增用例

## Acceptance Criteria
1) tmux 可用时，rcc codex/claude 可注册 daemon 并接受注入回车
2) tmux 不可用时，高级服务不启动，但主客户端与 server 正常工作
3) 支持 <**clock:{time,message}**>（time=ISO8601）解析并转 clock 调度
4) clock tool_call_id 缺失时自动生成并在 tool_outputs/tool messages 对齐
5) 基础回归测试通过，新增测试覆盖核心分支
notes:
Started implementation planning and baseline tests passed (servertool-clock + cli-smoke).
Design doc committed: docs/clock-client-daemon-design.md
Implementation done in progress: added docs/clock-client-daemon-design.md; clock marker parsing + schedule mapping in llmswitch-core chat-process; tool_call_id fallback in servertool extraction/clock handler; launcher tmux advanced-service gating and local callback service; server clock-client routes/registry; tests added at tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts and expanded tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts. Validation: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/smoke.spec.ts (PASS); npx tsc --noEmit (PASS).
Final implementation + verification evidence:
1) Targeted regressions PASS:
   - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/cli/smoke.spec.ts
2) Type check PASS:
   - npx tsc --noEmit
3) Host full workflow PASS:
   - npm run build:dev (includes test:routing-instructions, test:cli, install:global, mock regressions, blackbox antigravity parity, e2e checks)
4) Sharedmodule build matrix PASS:
   - npm -C ../sharedmodule/llmswitch-core run build
5) Added launcher coverage for tmux gating branches (tmux missing / not in tmux) + malformed clock marker regression.
Post-close hotfix (launcher readiness probe): checkServerReady now probes /ready first then falls back /health. Added regression in tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts for explicit --url when /ready missing and /health ready. Reinstalled global CLI; verified routecodex codex --url ... now launches (non-tty check shows expected 'stdin is not a terminal' under timeout harness).
User follow-up: tmux must be transparent. Implemented launcher auto-managed tmux session mode when tmux exists but TMUX env absent: auto-create session, start clock daemon against managed pane target, inject command via tmux send-keys, then auto-attach session (no manual tmux startup needed). Added regression tests in tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts and adapted claude launcher tests for new /ready+/health probing behavior. Re-validated with jest(cli codex/claude) + tsc.
Runtime smoke after global install: routecodex codex --url http://127.0.0.1:5520 and routecodex claude --url http://127.0.0.1:5520 both print managed-tmux auto-start log ('started managed tmux session automatically; no manual tmux setup needed'). Non-tty harness exits with expected 'open terminal failed: not a terminal'.
Follow-up requirement implemented: launcher now defaults to ~/.routecodex/config.json host/port when --url is omitted (including dev package mode), with --port overriding config port. Added codex CLI regressions for config default + --port override. Runtime smoke verified: routecodex codex (no --url) resolves to config port 5520; routecodex codex --port 5555 resolves to 5555.

title: Fix Qwen OAuth userInfo endpoint + stable api_key
description:
## Context
Qwen OAuth login completes but token appears to not persist / keeps reauthing; logs show userInfo 404 and refresh failures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Default Qwen userInfo endpoint no longer 404s in normal flows (switch to chat.qwen.ai and keep portal fallback).
- If userInfo returns a stable api_key (different from access_token), token file is written with `norefresh: true`.
- If api_key == access_token (fallback), treat it as non-stable and keep trying to enrich when possible.
- Unit tests cover enrich + fallback behaviors.
notes:
- Evidence:
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.qwen-alias.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/apikey-secret-resolution.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/httpserver-apikey-env-resolution.spec.ts` (PASS)
  - `npm run install:global` builds + installs; `routecodex --version` prints 0.89.1669
- Changes:
  - Qwen userInfo default switched to `https://chat.qwen.ai/api/v1/user/info` with portal fallback: `src/providers/auth/qwen-userinfo-helper.ts`
  - Qwen tokens: mark `norefresh: true` when api_key is stable; treat api_key==access_token as non-stable: `src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts`, `src/providers/auth/qwen-userinfo-helper.ts`
  - OAuth config default userInfoUrl aligned: `src/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.ts`
  - Tests updated/added: `tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts`
close_reason: Qwen userInfo default uses chat.qwen.ai; stable api_key marked norefresh; enrich/fallback tests pass.

title: codex/claude launcher should pass through downstream -p profile flags
description:
Context
- `routecodex codex` currently uses `-p` as launcher server port short flag, which can swallow downstream `codex -p <profile>` and break profile selection (e.g. `-p rcm`).

Acceptance Criteria
- `routecodex codex ... -p rcm --port 5520` forwards `-p rcm` to codex process.
- launcher still honors `--port` for RouteCodex server connection.
- Add regression test in CLI codex command tests and keep existing launcher tests passing.
notes:
- Fix: launcher no longer reserves short `-p` flag; it now only accepts `--port` for RouteCodex server port, leaving `-p` available for downstream codex/claude args.
- Regression test: `passes downstream -p profile args while still honoring launcher --port` added in `tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts`.
- Validation:
  1) `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts` (PASS 2/2 suites, 9/9 tests)
  2) `npx tsc --noEmit` (PASS)
- Added symmetric regression for claude launcher path: `tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts` now verifies downstream `-p` is preserved while launcher `--port` still controls server connection.
- Re-validated: `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts` => PASS 2/2 suites, 10/10 tests; `npx tsc --noEmit` => PASS.
close_reason: Fixed launcher/downstream -p conflict; added regression test and verified CLI+typecheck.

title: reuse orphan managed tmux sessions for launcher advanced mode
description:
Context
- In non-tmux launches, we auto-create managed tmux sessions (`rcc_*`).
- If launcher exits unexpectedly, orphan sessions can remain and accumulate.

Acceptance Criteria
- When not inside tmux, launcher first scans existing managed `rcc_*` sessions and reuses an unattached session whose pane is not currently running codex/claude.
- If no reusable managed session exists, launcher creates a new one as before.
- Reused managed session is still treated as managed and is killed on launcher exit.
- Add CLI regression tests for reuse path and keep existing launcher tests passing.
notes:
- Implemented managed tmux orphan-session reuse in launcher when not already inside tmux: scan `rcc_*` sessions, require unattached session and pane command not in {codex, claude}, then reuse target pane.
- Reused sessions are still treated as managed and are killed on launcher shutdown path (same managed session stop behavior).
- Added regression test `reuses orphan managed tmux session before creating a new one` in `tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts`.
- Updated design doc in `docs/clock-client-daemon-design.md` to document reuse-first behavior.
- Validation:
  1) `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts` => PASS (2/2 suites, 11/11 tests)
  2) `npx tsc --noEmit` => PASS
close_reason: Managed tmux orphan-session reuse implemented with regression test and verified.

title: enforce strict session matching for clock daemon injection
description:
Context
- Current clock client registry inject flow falls back to most-recent alive daemon when session match is missing.
- This can route clock injections to wrong client when multiple launcher sessions are active.

Acceptance Criteria
- Clock daemon injection requires non-empty sessionId.
- Inject only targets alive daemon records with exact matching sessionId; no fallback to unrelated sessions.
- `/daemon/clock-client/inject` returns non-success when session is missing or unmatched.
- Add regression tests covering strict session behavior.
notes:
- Enforced strict session binding in clock daemon registry: `inject` now requires non-empty sessionId and only scans exact session matches among alive records (no fallback).
- Enforced API-level requirement: `/daemon/clock-client/inject` now returns 400 when `sessionId` is missing.
- Added route regression test `inject enforces strict session matching` in `tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts`.
- Updated design doc with session-strict rule in `docs/clock-client-daemon-design.md`.
- Validation:
  1) `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts` => PASS (3/3 suites, 13/13 tests)
  2) `npm run build:dev` => PASS (full verification chain, includes install:global)
  3) `npm run install:global` => PASS
close_reason: Clock daemon injection now requires exact sessionId match; no fallback routing.

title: add CLI tool for external tmux input injection
description:
Context
- Need a user-facing tool to externally inject input into tmux-backed client session via RouteCodex clock-client daemon.

Acceptance Criteria
- Add CLI command to list clock-client daemons and inject text via `/daemon/clock-client/inject`.
- Supports `--port/--host/--url`, `--session-id` and `--daemon-id` targeting.
- If exactly one daemon exists and target not specified, auto-select it.
- Provide clear error when multiple daemons exist without target.
- Add command tests.
notes:
- Added new CLI command `tmux-inject` for external tmux input injection via clock-client daemon endpoints.
- Files:
  - `src/cli/commands/tmux-inject.ts`
  - `src/cli/register/tmux-inject-command.ts`
  - wired in `src/cli.ts`
  - tests: `tests/cli/tmux-inject-command.spec.ts`
- Behavior:
  - Supports `--list`, `--port/--host/--url`, `--session-id`, `--daemon-id`, `--text`, `--json`.
  - Auto-selects target only when exactly one daemon session exists; otherwise fail-fast requiring explicit target.
- Validation:
  1) `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/tmux-inject-command.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts` => PASS (4/4 suites, 16/16 tests)
  2) `npx tsc --noEmit` => PASS
  3) `npm run install:global` => PASS
  4) `routecodex tmux-inject --help` => command available
  5) `routecodex tmux-inject --port 5520 --list --json` => live daemon list works
close_reason: External tmux injection CLI delivered and globally installed.

title: clock daemon tmuxSession 与 conversation session 会话域分离
description: 将 daemon 注入路由锚定到 tmuxSessionId，同时保留 conversation sessionId 到 tmux 会话的映射绑定，避免两种 session 语义混淆导致 clock 注入失败。
design: - registry 维护 records + conversationToTmuxSession map；- inject 优先 tmuxSessionId，再用 conversation 映射解析，不做无关 daemon 回退；- launcher 注册时上报 tmuxSessionId 与 clientType；- request-executor / executor-response 在请求阶段尝试 bindConversationSession。
acceptance_criteria: 1) daemon register/inject 使用 tmuxSessionId 作为唯一注入路由键；2) conversation sessionId 通过独立映射绑定到 tmuxSessionId；3) 请求链路可自动绑定 conversation->tmux（单候选/提示场景）；4) 关键测试与 build:dev/install:global 通过。
notes:
Implementation evidence:
- Updated daemon/session registry: src/server/runtime/http-server/clock-client-registry.ts
- Updated daemon routes: src/server/runtime/http-server/clock-client-routes.ts
- Updated launcher registration: src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts
- Added request-side binding: src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts and src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-response.ts
- Added tests: tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts
Validation:
- npx tsc --noEmit
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/tmux-inject-command.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts
- npm run build:dev (includes install:global and regression stack)
close_reason: 完成 tmux 与 conversation session 域分离并通过测试/构建验证

title: clock due auto-inject loop + clock_hold followup provider pin
description: Clock marker/tool schedule can persist to task-store, but host-side due scan did not actually inject into registered client daemon. Also clock_hold_flow followup could drift provider alias on reentry and hit incompatible Responses provider (HTTP 400 Instructions are required).
design: Design doc: docs/clock-client-daemon-design.md (sections for daemon due loop + provider pinning).
acceptance_criteria: 1) Host HTTP server runs a background due-task loop that reserves due clock tasks and injects them via clock client registry mapping conversation session -> tmux session. 2) loop starts on runtime setup/reload and stops on server shutdown. 3) clock_hold_flow followup metadata carries forced provider key to keep provider alias stable across reentry. 4) Regression tests cover clock_hold_flow provider pinning and existing HTTP server bridge mocks compile with new exports. 5) build+test verification evidence recorded.
notes:
Implemented host due-task auto-inject loop + lifecycle wiring + clock_hold_flow forced provider pinning. Evidence: sharedmodule build passed; targeted jest path passed (servertool-clock, clock-client-routes, hub-policy/quota-view mocks, codex/claude/tmux-inject CLI); build:dev + install:global passed. Live validation on 127.0.0.1:5630 with mock callback showed auto injection payload source=clock.daemon.inject and daemon list lastInjectAtMs update.
Follow-up diagnosis for user report 'clock due not injected': checked live 5520 state and found /daemon/clock-client/list empty while tmux session exists, meaning no active clock daemon callback endpoint => injection path cannot fire. Added host loop diagnostics: on due-reserved but inject fail, log injectReason + bindReason; and proactively bind conversationSessionId before inject in tick path (src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts). Verified with tsc + targeted jest + install:global.
close_reason: clock due auto-inject and provider pinning fixed with automated and live verification

title: clock daemon 注册时绑定 tmux session 到会话
description: 修复多 rcc codex/claude 并发场景下 clock 到期注入可能失败或串会话的问题，要求在注册后可确定性回注入到同 tmux session。
design: 通过 launcher 为每个 advanced daemon 生成可解析的 client token suffix，并在服务端从请求中提取 daemon hint；在 bindConversationSession 时优先使用 daemonId 进行确定性绑定，避免多 daemon 场景下 fallback 误匹配。
acceptance_criteria: 1) rcc codex/claude 在 advanced 模式下可将请求稳定绑定到注册 daemon/tmux。2) 多 daemon 同时在线时，conversation session 的 clock 注入必须命中原始 tmux，会话不串线。3) 若绑定信息缺失，不得误注入到其他 daemon。4) 现有 clock-client 路由测试与 servertool clock 测试保持通过。
notes: Implemented deterministic daemon-hint binding chain: (1) launcher appends daemon suffix to proxied api key and exports RCC_CLOCK_CLIENT_DAEMON_ID; (2) middleware accepts suffixed key and injects x-routecodex-clock-daemon-id header; (3) executor metadata extracts clockDaemonId from explicit header or api key bearer; (4) request/response bind path passes daemonId into clock-client registry bindConversationSession. Added regression coverage for daemonId binding + token parsing + middleware daemon-hint propagation.
close_reason: Deterministic tmux-session binding fixed via daemonId hint propagation; regression tests and build/global-install passed.

title: tmux 复用误判导致 codex 输入污染与按键乱码
description: 修复 rcc codex 在 managed tmux 场景下可能把启动命令注入到已运行 codex pane，造成输入污染；并修复 send-keys 非 literal 导致特殊按键乱码。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 仅复用空闲 shell pane 的 rcc_* session，不复用 pane_current_command 为 node/codex/claude 等活跃会话。2) tmux send-keys 对启动命令与clock注入均使用 literal 模式，避免特殊按键解析。3) codex/claude/tmux-inject 相关 CLI 测试通过。
notes: Fix implemented: launcher reuse gate now only accepts idle shell pane commands (zsh/bash/sh/fish/nu). send-keys for both managed launch and daemon injection changed to literal mode (-l -- text) + explicit Enter key call.
close_reason: Reuse gate + literal send-keys fix merged; CLI tests and tsc passed.

title: clock daemon 注入后文本已入框但未触发提交键
description: 复现：clock 到期后 daemon 成功注入提醒文本到 codex 输入框，但消息停留在输入框未发送。根因：注入后立即 send-keys 提交键存在时序竞争，且 launcher-kernel 中 submit helper 存在局部改动残缺（未定义 clientType 引发 codex 启动失败）。
design: 在 daemon /inject 路径中保持文本注入与提交键分离，文本注入后增加短延迟再发提交键；提交键选择按 clientType 提供主键+回退键；launcher 启动发送命令保留通用提交策略。
acceptance_criteria: 1) rcc codex 启动不再因 launcher-kernel 抛错退出；2) clock daemon 注入后自动提交，消息可进入 Working/响应流程；3) tmux 会话绑定逻辑保持不变，以 tmuxSessionId 精确路由。
notes: Implemented in src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts: (1) fixed undefined clientType usage in launchCommandInTmuxPane submit path; (2) hardened sendTmuxSubmitKey keyset/error text; (3) daemon /inject adds 80ms delay before submit and passes clientType.\nValidation: npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/cli/tmux-inject-command.spec.ts; npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/httpserver-apikey-env-resolution.spec.ts tests/utils/clock-client-token.spec.ts; npx tsc --noEmit; npm run build:dev (includes install:global).\nLive diag: curl /daemon/clock-client/list confirmed daemon clockd_37185909-431c-4687-b6e8-6812eb9308b6 bound to tmux session rcc_codex_1770782906272_ac260d.

title: clock 注入提示 + 精确时间触发
description: 新增两点：1) 在注入工具/提醒文案中明确提示：如需等待，使用 clock 工具定时唤醒；2) 废弃历史请求驱动的大时间窗口策略，daemon 注入改为精确到点触发（不提前触发）。
design: 在 server http clock daemon tick 内部对 llmswitch-core 解析后的 clock config 做本地严格化（dueWindowMs=0），保持 retention 等字段不变；提醒文本追加等待指导语；tmux-inject 成功输出追加同样提示。
acceptance_criteria: 1) clock 提醒注入文案包含‘需要等待请使用 clock 工具’提示；2) daemon 触发不再使用大 dueWindow 预触发，默认仅在 dueAt 到达/超过后触发；3) 相关 CLI/HTTP 测试通过。

title: Allow startup with missing env apikeys (non-blocking provider init)
description:
## Context
When config uses env refs (e.g. `${CRS_API_KEY}`) but env var is missing, RouteCodex currently aborts server startup. This makes shareable repo configs hard to use unless all keys are present.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Server can start even if some providers fail to init due to missing env var (emit provider error events + keep running).
- Routing/request path fails over when a selected provider has no runtime handle.
- Local providers (e.g. LM Studio localhost) can keep `auth.apiKey: ""` without fake keys and without blocking startup.
notes:
- Evidence:
  - `routecodex start --config ~/.routecodex/config.json` now starts even with missing `${CRS_API_KEY}` etc; emits `[route-error] ... source=provider.provider.runtime.init` and continues.
  - `lmstudio` runtime initializes with `auth.apiKey: ""` (no fake key) when endpoint is `http://127.0.0.1:...`.
  - Tests: `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/apikey-secret-resolution.spec.ts tests/cli/start-command.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/virtual-router-routing-model-validation.spec.ts` (PASS).
- Implementation:
  - Non-blocking provider init + failover for missing runtimes: `src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts`.
  - Local-noauth handling: `src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts`, `src/providers/core/runtime/provider-factory.ts`, `src/providers/auth/apikey-auth.ts`.
  - Local baseURL empty apikey allowed in llmswitch-core bootstrap: `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/bootstrap.ts`.
close_reason: Provider init no longer aborts startup on missing env apikey; local LM Studio accepts empty key; routing fails over when runtime missing.

title: clock 周期任务+次数上限+管理面板 CRUD
description: 扩展 clock 语法/工具支持周期任务：daily/weekly/every N minutes，并且必须配置最大触发次数；任务需持久化并绑定 session 与 conversation；tmux session 不存在时自动清理相关绑定/任务；tmux 仍在但 conversation 缺失时保留并通过管理命令决定清理；在系统 CLI 与 WebUI 提供列表与 CRUD 管理。
design: 采用 clock task schema v2：新增 recurrence={kind:'daily'|'weekly'|'interval', everyMinutes?, weekdays?} + maxRuns/runsCompleted/nextDueAtMs；调度层统一通过 llmswitch-core reserve/commit 计算下一次 due；host 注入 loop 默认精确触发(dueWindowMs=0)；registry 增加 tmux alive 检查与 orphan 清理；新增 server 管理接口供 CLI/WebUI 复用。
acceptance_criteria: 1) clock 工具与 <**clock:...**> 均支持 recurrence+maxRuns；2) 到期触发后可按周期重排并递减剩余次数，持久化正确；3) tmux 缺失自动清理，conversation 缺失不自动删；4) CLI 可 list/create/update/delete/cleanup；5) WebUI 可见列表并 CRUD；6) 回归测试和 build 全通过。
notes:
Implemented recurrence + maxRuns + cleanup + CLI/WebUI CRUD.

2) npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/hub-policy-injection.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/quota-view-injection.spec.ts
3) npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/cli/tmux-inject-command.spec.ts tests/cli/clock-admin-command.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-daemon-inject-config.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-clock.spec.ts tests/utils/clock-client-token.spec.ts

title: iflow kimi 516 EngineUnexpectedError retryable
description: iFlow kimi-k2.5 intermittently returns HTTP 516 EngineUnexpectedError (not 514 model error). This is an upstream engine-side failure that should be retryable by Virtual Router to allow failover to next provider candidate.
notes:
**Acceptance Criteria:**
1. Add 516 to retryable error detection in executor-provider.ts (similar to existing 514 handling)
2. Verify with codex-samples same-shape replay: at least one 516 sample replay should trigger retry
3. Confirm Virtual Router failover works by checking logs for retry + next provider selection

**Evidence:**
- Sample: ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/openai-responses/iflow.3-138.kimi-k2.5/req_1770814877047_fb7169ee
- Error: HTTP 516 EngineUnexpectedError
- Request shape: 312 messages, 35 tools, 229KB payload
- Observation: 262-330 message range consistently fails with 516; similar sizes succeed with other providers

title: DeepSeek Web 原生标准 Provider（对标 antigravity）设计
description:
## Summary
将 DeepSeek Web 账号体系以 RouteCodex 内建标准 Provider 方式接入（对标 antigravity），不再把 deepseek2api 作为上游代理进程依赖。

## Background
现有 deepseek2api 验证了可用性（登录、PoW、会话、completion），但架构上属于外部 sidecar，不符合 RouteCodex 的目标形态：
- 单执行路径与统一观测
- Provider 层仅负责 transport/auth/retry/error
- 语义与工具调用标准化在 llmswitch-core compat 层完成

## Scope
- 设计并落地 DeepSeek 原生 provider 的分层契约：provider/auth/session/pow 与 compat/tool-normalization。
- 设计工具调用兼容策略：结构化 tool_calls 优先，文本工具意图 fallback（可开关、可严格模式）。
- 明确错误处理、重试与可观测字段（requestId/providerKey/providerProtocol/toolCallId）。
- 形成 M1/M2/M3 实施计划与验证矩阵。

## Non-goals
- 不把 deepseek2api 当作 routecodex 上游服务。
- 不在 provider 层实现 tool 路由决策或参数语义修复。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 提交一版可评审的分层架构：RouteCodex provider 层 vs llmswitch-core compat 层边界清晰。
- [ ] 明确工具调用状态机：`native_tool_calls` / `text_tool_calls` / `no_tool_calls` 与失败策略。
- [ ] 给出可执行里程碑（M1/M2/M3）及每阶段验证命令与回归要求。
- [ ] 设计记录在 bd issue（description/notes）中，后续子任务可据此拆分。

## Initial Design Notes
### Provider（routecodex）
- `deepseek-web-provider`：HTTP transport、headers、retry、error mapping。
- `deepseek-account-auth`：账号登录、token 生命周期、刷新与持久化策略。
- `deepseek-session-pow`：session 创建/复用、PoW challenge 求解、超时与熔断。
- 所有失败统一 `emitProviderError(...)` + fail-fast。

### Compat（llmswitch-core）
- profile：`chat:deepseek-web`。
- request action：OpenAI/Responses 请求映射到 DeepSeek Web payload。
- response action：DeepSeek 输出映射回标准 assistant / tool_calls / SSE chunks。
- 文本工具意图 fallback：仅在配置开启时启用；`tool_choice=required` 且无合法工具调用时返回显式错误。

### Observability
- 每次请求记录：`requestId`、`providerKey`、`providerProtocol`、`route`、`model`。
- 工具调用记录：`toolCallId`、source（native/text-fallback）、parse status。

### Milestones
- M1：设计冻结（契约、错误码、trace 字段、配置项）。
- M2：provider skeleton（非工具非流式/流式链路打通）。
- M3：compat + tool calling（native + fallback + strict），含回归脚本。
notes:
[Architecture v0.1]

1) Layer split (hard boundary)
- RouteCodex Provider: only auth/HTTP/session/pow/retry/error-report.
- llmswitch-core Compat: request/response shape conversion + tool-call normalization.
- No tool routing / no semantic patching in provider layer.

2) Provider modules (routecodex)
- src/providers/core/runtime/deepseek-http-provider.ts
  - request send/stream
  - retry policy (network/5xx) and fail-fast for contract errors (4xx)
  - unified providerError emission
- src/providers/auth/deepseek-account-auth.ts
  - login with mobile/password
  - token cache + refresh window + secure persistence strategy
- src/providers/core/runtime/deepseek-session-pow.ts
  - chat session bootstrap/reuse
  - PoW challenge solve (subprocess isolation, timeout, error classification)

3) Compat modules (llmswitch-core)
- profile: chat:deepseek-web
- request action
  - OpenAI/Responses -> DeepSeek payload
  - thinking/search/tool-choice field normalization
- response action
  - DeepSeek response/SSE -> standard assistant + tool_calls
  - add toolCallId when missing
- fallback parser (guarded by config)
  - parse text-encoded tool intent
  - strict mode: tool_choice=required && no valid tool_call => explicit error

4) State machine for tools
- state A native_tool_calls: structured tool calls from upstream -> pass-through normalize
- state B text_tool_calls: parse fallback -> validate schema -> normalize
- state C no_tool_calls: no parseable call
  - if required: throw compat error
  - else: continue as plain assistant text

5) Persistence/ops
- auth/session state scoped by provider runtime key.
- retain request observability fields: requestId/providerKey/providerProtocol/model.
- add tool normalization metrics: source(native|fallback), parse_ok, schema_ok.

6) Delivery split
- M1 design freeze + contracts + errors + telemetry
- M2 provider transport skeleton + non-tool chat/stream
- M3 compat tool-calling + fallback + replay scripts

7) Replay acceptance (mandatory)
- failing-provider same-shape replay x1
- unaffected-provider control replay x1
[Design Doc]\n- docs/providers/deepseek-web-provider-design.md\n\n[Milestone Tasks]\n- M1: routecodex-132.1\n- M2: routecodex-132.2 (depends on M1)\n- M3: routecodex-132.3 (depends on M2)\n
[Progress]\n- M1 completed and closed: routecodex-132.1\n- Next unblocked milestone: routecodex-132.2\n
Progress update 2026-02-11: routecodex-132.2 closed (M2 transport skeleton complete + validated). routecodex-132.3 is now unblocked for compat/tool-calling implementation.
2026-02-11 本地 provider 落地：已创建 /Users/fanzhang/.routecodex/provider/deepseek/config.v2.json（providerId=deepseek, compatibilityProfile=chat:deepseek-web, auth.type=deepseek-account, models=deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner）；并用 dist/config/provider-v2-loader.js 验证可加载。
2026-02-11 DeepSeek 多账号模板已落地：/Users/fanzhang/.routecodex/provider/deepseek/config.v2.json 改为 auth.entries 双账号（aliases: 1-main, 2-backup；clientId/clientSecret 对应 mobile/password 语义）。后续在 routing 中可使用 deepseek.1-main.deepseek-chat / deepseek.2-backup.deepseek-chat。
2026-02-11 调整为自动展开策略：~/.routecodex/config.json 的 default-primary 仅保留 deepseek-web.deepseek-chat（不写 alias）；deepseek provider 保持 auth.entries aliases=1/2。经 bootstrapVirtualRouterConfig 验证，default-primary 自动展开为 deepseek-web.1.deepseek-chat + deepseek-web.2.deepseek-chat，且池模式 round-robin。
2026-02-11 修复 DeepSeek account auth 两个根因：1) 支持 deepseek-account 字段中的 ${ENV}/ENV 自动展开（此前 mobile/password 作为字面量发送导致账号1也可能失败）；2) 登录响应 biz_code!=0 时立即报 DEEPSEEK_AUTH_INVALID 并透传 biz_msg（不再误报 token missing）。验证：npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/deepseek-account-auth.unit.test.ts 通过；npm run build:dev 通过并完成 install:global；运行 dist 类实测 alias1(186...) OK，alias2(173...) 返回 upstreamCode=2 PASSWORD_OR_USER_NAME_IS_WRONG。
2026-02-12 账号口令更新后复测通过：直接调用 DeepSeek /api/v0/users/login，alias1(186...) biz_code=0 且有token；alias2(173...) biz_code=0 且有token。并通过 dist/providers/auth/deepseek-account-auth 路径验证 ${ENV} 解析+initialize 两个 alias 均 OK。

title: M3 Compat + Tool Calling：profile/actions/replay
description:
## Summary
实现 llmswitch-core compat profile 与 tool-calling 标准化（native + fallback + strict）。

## Scope
- 新增 `chat:deepseek-web` profile 及 request/response actions。
- 工具调用状态机：native_tool_calls / text_tool_calls / no_tool_calls。
- strict 策略：`tool_choice=required` 且无合法工具调用时显式错误。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 结构化工具调用可标准化为统一 `tool_calls`。
- [ ] 文本工具意图 fallback 在开关开启时可用；关闭时不生效。
- [ ] same-shape replay + control replay 均通过并附 requestId 证据。
notes:

- 兼容修复：sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/compat/actions/deepseek-web-response.ts
  1) 新增 DeepSeek 文本工具 JSON 提取 method1/method2（完整 JSON + 正则嵌入 JSON）

- 构建验证：cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build -> ✅ Matrix passed
  报告：/Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/matrix-ci-1770823860479.json
- RouteCodex 接入验证：cd routecodex && npm run build:dev -> ✅ 通过
  过程中修复现有语法阻塞 tests/cli/status-command.spec.ts（断行字符串导致 TS1002/TS1005）。
- 全局安装验证：build:dev 内含 install:global，且执行成功；
  全局 routecodex 版本 0.89.1905，全局 @jsonstudio/llms 版本 0.6.1862，CLI 端到端检查通过。
- 回放证据：当前已完成 matrix 回归（含 control provider unaffected 断言）；真实 DeepSeek same-shape requestId 级回放待补充后再 close。
2026-02-12 verification:\n- routecodex BUILD_MODE=dev npm run build:min => PASS (0.89.1917).\n- DeepSeek unit tests PASS: deepseek-account-auth, deepseek-session-pow, deepseek-http-provider, provider-utils.deepseek.\n- llmswitch-core npm run build => PASS (matrix included deepseek-web-compat-tool-calling).\n- Replay on :5540 with config apikey: model=deepseek-web.deepseek-chat returns PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE when deepseek auth env missing (DEEPSEEK_PASSWORD_1/2 unresolved).\n- Replay with temporary DEEPSEEK_* env set still fails at startup with DEEPSEEK_AUTH_INVALID: DeepSeek login request failed: fetch failed (external/network path), not compat shape error.\n- Confirmed ~/.routecodex/provider/deepseek/config.v2.json exists and uses auth.entries alias 1/2 (deepseek-account), compatible with llmswitch auth entry expansion + host deepseek-account mapping.
2026-02-12 09:16 UTC follow-up diagnosis:\n- Direct DeepSeek login endpoint check with current headers succeeds (HTTP 200, biz_code=0) for account alias 1 and alias 2 via standalone Node fetch (hasToken=true for both).\n- routecodex live replay on :5542 with same env/config routes correctly to deepseek-web.1 then retries deepseek-web.2.\n- Both provider attempts fail at completion endpoint with upstream HTTP 429 blocked HTML (WAF page: 'Error - Request Blocked'), not auth failure.\n- Therefore current blocker moved from auth bootstrap to upstream anti-bot/rate-limit on chat completion path.

title: [provider deepseek usage] 缺失usage时按tiktoken补齐token统计
description:
## Summary
DeepSeek Web 在部分响应中缺失 usage，导致 stats/quota 无法显示 token 消耗。需要在 llmswitch-core compat 补齐 usage。

## Scope
- 在 chat:deepseek-web 响应 compat 中，当上游 usage 缺失时补齐 usage。
- prompt 侧复用 estimatedInputTokens；completion 侧基于响应文本做 tiktoken 估算。
- 写回 usage.prompt_tokens/completion_tokens/total_tokens（并兼容 input/output 字段）。
- 保持 deepseek 专属，不影响其它 provider。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DeepSeek 缺失上游 usage 时，客户端返回包含 usage 三字段。
- [ ] routecodex stats 能看到 prompt/completion/total。
- [ ] 增加 deepseek compat 回归测试（无 usage -> 自动补齐）。
- [ ] same-shape deepseek replay + control replay 各 1 次并记录 requestId。
acceptance_criteria: 缺失usage时自动补齐并进入stats；含回归测试与same-shape/control回放证据
notes:
2026-02-12 evidence: deepseek responses on /v1/responses status=200 but missing usage in response payload path, causing stats token fields n/a.
2026-02-12 verification: (sharedmodule) npm run build:ci PASS; node scripts/tests/deepseek-web-compat-tool-calling.mjs PASS.

title: [provider deepseek auth] 账号3自动取token失败（429/TOO_MANY_REQUESTS）
description:
## Summary
DeepSeek 第 3 账号（alias=`3-13823250570`）自动获取 token 失败，导致 runtime 仅在 1/2 间轮转。

## Background
- 配置已包含 3 账号：`~/.routecodex/provider/deepseek/config.v2.json`。
- `~/.routecodex/auth` 当前仅有 `deepseek-account-1.json` / `deepseek-account-2.json`，缺少 `deepseek-account-3-13823250570.json`。
- 手工触发 `ensureDeepSeekAccountToken(forceAcquire=true)` 最新返回：`DEEPSEEK_AUTH_INVALID`，message=`TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`。

## Scope
- 跟踪并修复账号 3 自动鉴权失败原因（上游限流/风控/认证链路）。
- 规范错误映射：可判定限流时输出稳定错误码与可读 message。
- 联动 virtual router 冷却：账号不可用时应进入冷却，避免持续命中失败别名。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 账号 3 能成功生成 `~/.routecodex/auth/deepseek-account-3-13823250570.json`（含 token）。
- [ ] 运行日志出现 deepseek `1/2/3` 三账号轮转命中证据。
- [ ] 当上游返回 `TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`/usage exhausted 时，virtual router 对对应 alias 进入冷却并记录审计。
- [ ] 使用现有负载回放至少 1 次，拿到成功工具调用响应（非 502/初始化失败）。
acceptance_criteria: 账号3可生成token并参与轮转；限流时进入冷却且有审计；同负载回放成功
notes:
2026-02-12 evidence: ensureDeepSeekAccountToken(alias=3-13823250570, forceAcquire=true) => DEEPSEEK_AUTH_INVALID/TOO_MANY_REQUESTS; token file still absent under ~/.routecodex/auth/deepseek-account-3-13823250570.json
2026-02-12 retry evidence: regenerated fingerprint rc-deepseek.3-13823250570 twice and forceAcquire retried twice; both returned DEEPSEEK_AUTH_INVALID/TOO_MANY_REQUESTS, token file still missing (~/.routecodex/auth/deepseek-account-3-13823250570.json).
2026-02-12 recovery: switched alias3 credential to mobile=13528857502; ensureDeepSeekAccountToken(forceAcquire=true) succeeded (source=http-login) and generated ~/.routecodex/auth/deepseek-account-3-13823250570.json.
