title: routecodex start --port 5520 触发进程被系统杀掉
description: 现象：在 routecodex/codex proxy 链路上使用 5520 端口，服务在处理 responses 请求后出现 server exited unexpectedly，终端显示 zsh: killed routecodex start --port 5520。怀疑存在错误的进程终止路径或异常内存增长导致 SIGKILL。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 不再出现 host/client/5520 相关进程被意外 kill；2) routecodex 在相同请求流量下稳定存活；3) 增加针对进程终止路径的保护或回归验证。
notes:
Evidence:
- Removed runtime blind-kill path based on lsof/netstat; now only managed port-scoped pid file is trusted (src/utils/managed-server-pids.ts, src/index.ts, src/cli/server/port-utils.ts, src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/control-handler.ts).
- Added explicit self-termination audit events before shutdown self-signal and when self-kill guard blocks kill (src/server/runtime/http-server/routes.ts, src/index.ts, src/cli/server/port-utils.ts, src/cli/commands/start.ts).
- Added unmanaged-occupied-port fail-fast behavior instead of blind kill (src/index.ts ensurePortAvailable, src/cli/server/port-utils.ts ensurePortAvailableImpl).
- Wrote regression tests: tests/utils/managed-server-pids.spec.ts and expanded tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts.
Validation:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts tests/utils/managed-server-pids.spec.ts
- npm run build:dev (passed full pipeline incl install:global / mock:regressions / blackbox parity).
close_reason: Removed blind port kills, enforced managed PID-only targeting, and added self-termination audit logs + regression coverage.

title: 5520 运行中再次出现 zsh: killed（疑似外部 SIGKILL/OOM）
description: 现象：在 2026-02-11 21:58（本地）附近，routecodex start --port 5520 在响应已返回 200 后被 shell 报告 zsh: killed。此前已移除 lsof 普杀链路，需继续排查是否为外部 SIGKILL（OOM/jetsam/宿主守护脚本）或剩余 kill 分支。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 能明确区分并记录 kill 来源（内部自终止/外部SIGKILL/OOM）；2) 复现场景下不再出现 host+client 全部被杀；3) 给出可复现实验与控制组结果。
notes:
2026-02-11 复盘：\n1) 已确认全局 routecodex 已安装并生效（/opt/homebrew/bin/routecodex），版本先为 0.89.1897，随后重新 build:dev + install:global 升级到 0.89.1898。\n2) 全局 dist 已含修复关键字：managed-server-pids / occupied_unmanaged / self_termination。\n3) 在 ~/.routecodex/logs/process-lifecycle.jsonl 中未找到与用户给出的 requestId(openai-responses-iflow.1-186.glm-4.7-glm-4.7-20260211T215854544-072) 对应的内部 kill 事件，且未出现 self_termination/kill_attempt 指向该窗口；说明这次更像外部 SIGKILL 或系统层终止。\n4) 发现风险补丁：仅凭 server-<port>.pid 仍可能误判（历史 stale pid 文件）；已追加端口二次校验：读取目标 PID 的进程环境，若 ROUTECODEX_PORT/RCC_PORT 与目标端口不一致则拒绝纳入 kill 集合。\n5) 回归：npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/utils/managed-server-pids.spec.ts tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts 通过；npm run build:dev 全链路通过（含 install:global / blackbox / regressions）。
2026-02-12 进展：
- 已关闭 routecodex-134.4（外部 SIGKILL 取证链路）
- 已关闭 routecodex-134.5（全仓 orphan/leak 二次审计与加固）
- 新增后续 routecodex-134.6（首次 heartbeat 前 managedClientPid 同步窗口）
- 本轮 build:dev + install:global 验证通过，routecodex --version=0.89.1930

title: clock/tmux orphan session回收与可追踪审计
description:
## Background
发现存在 tmux 孤儿 session 与 zombie 相关症状，需要确认 clock 流程是否来源，并加强回收与审计。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 给出 clock 流程是否导致 zombie 的代码级结论（含证据路径）
- [ ] 增强 tmux 孤儿回收机制（仅清理 routecodex 命名空间会话）
- [ ] 增加回收动作审计日志（原因、会话名、结果、requestId）
- [ ] 禁止危险普杀，回收逻辑仅使用白名单命名策略
- [ ] 本地构建通过：npm run build:dev
notes:
- Implemented heartbeat stale reaper with strict scope: only daemon records are cleaned; kill attempted only for explicitly managed tmux sessions and only when session is not shared by any live daemon.
- Added cleanup audit log in clock daemon tick: requestId + staleHeartbeat/deadTmux detail fields (removed/killed/failed/skipped).
- Added route payload propagation for managedTmuxSession in launcher register/heartbeat.
- Added tests: tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts (managed kill, unmanaged skip, shared-session skip), plus existing clock routes/cli tests pass.
- Verification:
  - npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts
  - npm run build:dev (includes install:global) passed; global routecodex version now 0.89.1903.
2026-02-11 修复补充：dead tmux cleanup 现在也会传 terminateManagedTmuxSession（server tick + cleanup route），并返回 killed/failed/skipped kill 字段，避免仅删 registry 不执行会话回收。

测试修复：修复 tests/cli/status-command.spec.ts 与 tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts 语法/断言损坏。

验证证据：
1) npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/utils/managed-server-pids.spec.ts tests/cli/status-command.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts
   -> 5 suites passed, 30 tests passed。
2) npm run build:dev
   -> 全链路通过（含 install:global、mock regressions、blackbox antigravity parity），全局 routecodex --version=0.89.1906。

代码级 zombie 结论补充：当前 routecodex 侧 spawn 路径均有 close/exit/error 或显式 stop/kill 流程；本轮加固重点在 heartbeat/dead tmux 双清理与白名单 kill（仅 managed tmux 会话）并记录审计字段。
2026-02-11 新增：非 tmux 子进程（codex/claude）心跳登记 + 定向回收。

实现点：
- clock-client-registry 扩展 managedClientProcess/managedClientPid/managedClientCommandHint。
- stale/dead cleanup 均支持 terminateManagedClientProcess 回调，并输出 killed/failed/skipped managed pid 列表。
- 新增 managed-process-probe（仅按记录 PID + 命令提示校验后 SIGTERM；禁止命中 routecodex/rcc server 命令）。
- launcher-kernel 现在无 tmux 也会建立 clock-client heartbeat 租约（callback 为占位），并在真实 tool pid 出现后立即 heartbeat 同步 pid。
- advanced mode 开关维持原语义：仅 tmuxTarget 存在且 clockClientService 可用时为 1。

验证：
1) npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/status-command.spec.ts tests/utils/managed-server-pids.spec.ts
   -> 5 suites passed, 32 tests passed。
2) npm run build:dev
   -> 全链路通过（含 install:global），global routecodex --version=0.89.1908。
2026-02-13 回归修复：managed tmux 启动命令不再内联自杀（移除 launcher-kernel 中 `tmux kill-session -t <session>` 尾随片段）。

问题复盘：此前命令被注入到 tmux pane 时会拼接 `...; tmux kill-session ...; exit`，导致客户端进程只要退出（包括 server 重启期间的临时退出）就立刻销毁 tmux session。

本次调整：改为仅执行目标命令，session 生命周期交给 heartbeat/reaper 清理策略，避免“客户端异常退出 => tmux 立即自杀”。

验证：
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts（2 suites / 17 tests passed）
- 更新 tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts 两处断言：确认 shellCommand 不再包含 kill-session 片段。
2026-02-13 新增自愈（按用户反馈“server 可重启但 client/tmux 不能随便退出”）：

1) clock-client heartbeat 自愈 re-register
- 文件: src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts
- 变更: heartbeat POST 失败时（404/410/5xx/网络异常）触发 register 自愈；对 404/410 允许立即重注册，其它状态走 backoff（ROUTECODEX_CLOCK_CLIENT_REREGISTER_BACKOFF_MS，默认1500ms）。

2) managed tmux 客户端退出自愈
- 文件: src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts
- 变更: launchCommandInTmuxPane 增加 tmux 内部重启包装（默认开启，maxRetries=3，delay=2s；0/130/143 不重试）。
- 开关: ROUTECODEX_TMUX_SELF_HEAL_ENABLE / ROUTECODEX_TMUX_SELF_HEAL_MAX_RETRIES / ROUTECODEX_TMUX_SELF_HEAL_RETRY_DELAY_MS。

3) 回归测试
- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts 新增: heartbeat 404 后自动 re-register（register 调用从1次变2次）。
- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts 更新: 校验 tmux shellCommand 含 self-heal 包装且不含 kill-session 自杀片段。
- 验证: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts -> 2 suites / 18 tests passed。
- 编译: BUILD_MODE=dev npm run build:min -> passed。
2026-02-13 修复补充（tmux失效全量清理 + claude入口稳定）：
1) launcher-kernel: managed tmux 启动改为优先 ，失败才回退 send-keys，避免命令注入后未提交执行。
2) clock-client-registry: cleanupStaleHeartbeats/cleanupDeadTmuxSessions 新增按 tmuxSessionId 反查并清理 conversationToTmuxSession 映射，确保 removedConversationSessionIds 不丢。
3) clock cleanup 任务清理扩展：index tick 与 /daemon/clock/cleanup 均改为清理 union(removedConversationSessionIds, removedTmuxSessionIds)。
4) 回归测试：
- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts
- tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts
- tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts
- tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts
命令：npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts -> 4 suites passed。
5) 全链路验证：npm run build:dev（含 install:global）通过；routecodex --version=0.89.1986。

title: 项目级内存泄露与孤儿进程审计加固
description:
## Background
在已修复 clock/tmux 与 managed client 回收后，继续进行全项目内存泄露/孤儿进程审计，重点覆盖 provider runtime、daemon session、browser launcher 等生命周期边界，确保仅按记录对象定向回收并具备审计证据。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 列出并定位至少 3 个仍存在风险的生命周期漏洞（文件+函数级别）
- [ ] 完成高风险修复：避免静态 map/session 无界增长与未回收子进程
- [ ] 所有回收逻辑保持“仅记录目标、禁止普杀”原则
- [ ] 增加/更新对应回归测试
- [ ] `npm run build:dev` 通过并记录证据
notes:
2026-02-12 审计与修复（全项目内存泄露/孤儿进程）

已确认并修复 4 个生命周期风险：
1) ProviderFactory 静态实例缓存可能跨 reload/server stop 累积：新增 ProviderFactory.clearInstanceCache()，并在 HttpServer.disposeProviders() 调用。
2) daemon admin logout 仅清 cookie 未删服务端 session map：新增 clearDaemonSessionFromRequest(req,res)，logout 改为删 map + 清 cookie。
3) Camoufox launcher 生命周期未绑定 HTTP server stop：在 RouteCodexHttpServer.stop() 增加 shutdownCamoufoxLaunchers() best-effort 清理。
4) 非 tmux launcher 注册失败会静默降级为不可回收子进程：新增 fail-closed 策略，默认 ROUTECODEX_CLOCK_RECLAIM_REQUIRED=1 时若 clock client 注册失败则拒绝启动子进程；仅显式置 0 才允许兼容降级。

补充稳健性：launcher ensureServerReady 对 child error 监听兼容 once/on（测试 stub 常见仅 on）。

验证证据：
- npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/quota-view-injection.spec.ts tests/provider/provider-factory.test.ts tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts -> passed
- npm run build:dev -> passed（含 install:global / mock regressions / blackbox antigravity parity）
- routecodex --version -> 0.89.1919

关键文件：
- src/providers/core/runtime/provider-factory.ts
- src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts
- src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/auth-session.ts
- src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/auth-handler.ts
- src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts
- tests/provider/provider-factory.test.ts
- tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts
- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts
- tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts
close_reason: 完成项目级泄露/孤儿进程审计并修复高风险点，验证通过

title: 回收动作写入 process-lifecycle 审计
description:
## Background
当前 managed child/tmux 的回收结果主要在 cleanup audit 字段里，但 process-lifecycle.jsonl 缺少统一 kill_attempt 记录，不利于定位“是否系统自杀”。需要在定向回收路径补全可追溯记录（仅记录已登记目标，不扩大 kill 范围）。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] managed client PID 终止尝试/结果写入 process-lifecycle.jsonl
- [ ] managed tmux session 终止尝试/结果写入 process-lifecycle.jsonl
- [ ] 失败原因（如 command mismatch/forbidden/self pid）可审计
- [ ] 不引入普杀逻辑（仍仅白名单+记录目标）
- [ ] 回归测试覆盖至少一条成功与一条拒绝路径
notes:
2026-02-12 实施：回收动作写入 process-lifecycle 审计

变更：
1) managed client PID 回收增加 kill_attempt 生命周期日志（attempt/success/failed/skipped，含 reason/daemonId/targetPid）。
2) managed tmux session 回收增加 kill_attempt 生命周期日志（TMUX_KILL_SESSION，含 reason/tmuxSessionId）。
3) 保持定向回收约束：仍仅对已记录目标 + 命令/命名白名单判定，不引入普杀。

关键路径：
- src/server/runtime/http-server/managed-process-probe.ts
- src/server/runtime/http-server/tmux-session-probe.ts

回归测试（新增）：
- tests/server/http-server/managed-process-probe.spec.ts
- tests/server/http-server/tmux-session-probe.spec.ts

验证证据：
- npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/managed-process-probe.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/tmux-session-probe.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts -> passed
- npm run build:dev && routecodex --version -> passed, 0.89.1925

注：中途误触 build:min（release 路径），已通过 build:dev 恢复 dev 模式（llmswitch symlink + install:global）。

title: 外部 SIGKILL 异常退出取证链路
description:
## Background
SIGKILL 无法被进程内捕获，当前仅能记录到“缺失日志”。需要在下次启动时基于运行状态文件检测“上次无正常退出标记”并写入审计事件，以便确认疑似外部强杀。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 引入 runtime lifecycle state（按端口）并在启动时写入
- [ ] 进程正常退出时写入 exit 标记
- [ ] 下次启动时若发现上次无 exit 标记且 PID 已死亡，记录 ungraceful 事件
- [ ] 事件写入 process-lifecycle.jsonl（含上次 pid/port/runId）
- [ ] 增加单测覆盖检测规则
notes:
2026-02-12 验证记录：
1) 已实现 runtime lifecycle state 与异常退出推断：
   - src/utils/runtime-exit-forensics.ts
   - src/index.ts (prepareRuntimeExitForensics + process.on(exit) marker)
2) 单测通过：
   - npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/utils/runtime-exit-forensics.spec.ts tests/cli/start-command.spec.ts
3) 全链路构建验证通过：
   - npm run build:dev
   - routecodex --version => 0.89.1930
4) 目标行为：下次启动可记录 previous_ungraceful_exit_detected 到 process-lifecycle.jsonl（含 previous pid/port/runId）。
close_reason: runtime exit forensics implemented and verified

title: 全仓孤儿进程与内存泄露二次审计（spawn/timer/reaper）
description:
## Scope
对 RouteCodex host/client/clock/tmux 相关进程生命周期做二次代码审计，重点检查 spawn/fork/exec、定时器回收、退出信号链路、缓存上限。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 输出高风险点清单（含文件+函数）
- [ ] 对确认问题提交最小修复补丁
- [ ] 为修复点补充单测
- [ ] build:dev + install:global 验证通过
- [ ] 在 issue notes 记录复现实证/命令输出摘要
notes:
2026-02-12 全仓二次审计结果（spawn/timer/reaper）：

A) 高风险已修复
1) 清理失败仍删除 registry 记录（会导致 orphan 失联）：
   - 修复文件: src/server/runtime/http-server/clock-client-registry.ts
   - 修复点: cleanupStaleHeartbeats / cleanupDeadTmuxSessions
   - 规则: managed tmux/pid terminate 失败时保留记录，避免回收链路丢失。

2) terminateManagedClientProcess 仅发送 SIGTERM 即返回 success（进程可能仍存活）：
   - 修复文件: src/server/runtime/http-server/managed-process-probe.ts
   - 修复点: TERM 后做存活检查；仍存活则升级 SIGKILL；二次检查后再判定 success/fail。

B) 回归测试
- tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts
  * 新增失败不删记录场景（stale/dead tmux）
- tests/server/http-server/managed-process-probe.spec.ts
  * 新增 TERM 后升级 KILL 场景

C) 验证证据
- npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/managed-process-probe.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/tmux-session-probe.spec.ts
  => 3 suites passed
- npm run build:dev
  => passed（包含 install:global + 回归链路）
- routecodex --version
  => 0.89.1930

D) 发现并转后续
- 已新建 routecodex-134.6（P1）：clock client 首次 heartbeat 前 pid 同步窗口收敛。
close_reason: orphan/leak second-pass audit and targeted hardening completed

title: clock client 首次心跳 PID 同步窗口收敛
description:
## Background
launcher 在 register 时 managedClientPid 可能为空，若在首次 heartbeat 前被外部 kill，server 侧可能缺少 PID 导致无法回收该次 orphan。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 启动后首个 managedClientPid 同步改为带重试/确认
- [ ] 失败时写 lifecycle 审计（明确 missing_pid_sync）
- [ ] 增加回归测试覆盖“spawn 后立即异常退出”场景
notes: DeepSeek token lifecycle hardening: deepseek-account integrated into token scanner/token-daemon surface; deepseek auth hot-reloads tokenFile on mtime change; provider/server templates migrated to tokenFile entries; PoW solver errors now include stderr and solver/wasm paths; local replay with existing deepseek payload returned 200 requires_action twice.

title: iflow minimax web_search invalid chat setting in /v1/messages
description:
## Background
web_search route hits iflow minimax-m2.5 then upstream returns 500 with detail `AllModelsFailed: invalid params, invalid chat setting` for anthropic-messages /v1/messages. Need provider-specific outbound compatibility fix and replay evidence.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Same-shape replay for failing iflow web_search request no longer returns invalid chat setting
- [ ] Control replay for unaffected provider still passes
- [ ] Fix is located in proper compatibility/provider profile layer (no host semantic hacks)
- [ ] build:dev + install:global pass
notes:
Validation 2026-02-15:
1) Provider-profile fix landed in src/providers/profile/families/iflow-profile.ts (iflowWebSearch non-legacy /v1/messages path): clamp minimax-* max_tokens to 8192; strip metadata/iflowWebSearch from outbound body.
2) Unit regression passed: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts
3) Servertool regression passed: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/server-side-web-search.spec.ts
4) Same-shape replay evidence (req_1771090049252_e4d4ece4):
   - ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/anthropic-messages/iflow.1-186.minimax-m2.5/req_1771090049252_e4d4ece4/provider-request.json
   - ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/anthropic-messages/iflow.2-173.minimax-m2.5/req_1771090049252_e4d4ece4/provider-request.json
   - ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/anthropic-messages/iflow.3-138.minimax-m2.5/req_1771090049252_e4d4ece4/provider-request.json
   all show model=minimax-m2.5 with max_tokens=8192; no metadata/iflowWebSearch leakage.
5) Error-shape delta confirmed:
   - old fail req_1770972286952_8470a11f had AllModelsFailed: invalid chat setting
   - new req_1771090049252_e4d4ece4 now returns Model not support (expected model availability limit, not chat-setting shape error).
6) Control replay (unaffected provider) still passes with non-empty response+usage:
   - ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/anthropic-messages/__pending__/anthropic-messages-deepseek-web.1-unknown-20260215T012622225-004/resp_process_tool_filters_output.json
7) Full build chain passed after fix: npm run build:dev (includes install:global, mock regressions, blackbox parity, error samples).

title: clock client session/workdir 强绑定（防串会话）
description:
## Background
当前 clock client bind/inject 主要依赖 sessionId/tmux/daemon 维度，缺少 workdir 硬约束。在多 session/多 worktree 并发时，可能出现跨路径命中。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] register/heartbeat 持久化 workdir（规范化路径）
- [ ] bindConversationSession 在传入 workdir 时仅允许同路径候选
- [ ] inject 传入 workdir 时仅允许同路径候选，并在不匹配时返回明确原因
- [ ] 增加回归测试：同 session 不同路径不可串；单会话原行为不回归
- [ ] 关键测试与构建通过（至少相关 jest + build:dev）
notes:
Implemented session/workdir hard association across clock daemon path:
- Added workdir to register/heartbeat payload + persistence (`launcher-kernel.ts`, `clock-client-routes.ts`, `clock-client-registry.ts`).
- Added normalized absolute-path filter (`normalizeWorkdir`) and enforced workdir-scoped candidate selection in bind/inject.
- Inject now returns `workdir_mismatch` when tmux/session matches but workdir does not.
- Propagated workdir from inbound metadata and reenter flow (`executor-metadata.ts`, `executor-response.ts`, `executor/request-retry-helpers.ts`, `executor/provider-response-converter.ts`).
- Added regressions: `clock-client-registry.spec.ts` and `clock-client-routes.spec.ts` for same-session/tmux workdir isolation and mismatch rejection.

Validation:
1) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts (PASS)
2) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts (PASS)
3) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts (PASS)
4) npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit (PASS)

Known blocker:
- `npm run build` / `npm run build:dev` / `npm run install:global` blocked by repo-sanity due existing untracked file not introduced in this change: `tests/server/utils/request-id-manager.spec.ts`.
Additional hardening for codex/claude path-bound internal sessions:
- `resolveWorkingDirectory` now fail-fast for explicit `--cwd` when path missing or non-directory (no silent fallback to current cwd).
- Added CLI regressions:
  - `tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts`: explicit --cwd applied; invalid --cwd exits with error and no spawn.
  - `tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts`: explicit --cwd applied; invalid --cwd exits with error and no spawn.

Validation:
1) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts (PASS)
2) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/clock-client-registry.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/clock-client-routes.spec.ts (PASS)
3) npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit (PASS)
2026-02-19 closure evidence:\n- Root cause fixed in llmswitch-core adapter context propagation: llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts (clockDaemonId/clockClientDaemonId/tmuxSessionId/workdir propagation).\n- Added regression: llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/clock-session-scope-daemon-context.mjs and matrix hook in llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs.\n- Verification passed:\n  1) cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build (matrix includes new clock-session-scope-daemon-context case)\n  2) cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && node scripts/tests/clock-session-scope-daemon-context.mjs\n  3) cd routecodex && npm run build:dev\n  4) cd routecodex && npm run install:global\n  5) Runtime check: POST /daemon/clock/tasks for sessionId=clockd.clockd_c911be60-0c88-4463-86d5-e114796ad660 and sessionId=clockd.clockd_ffebd718-a756-400e-8f96-28cfcb11e155 both returned scheduledCount=1 and taskCount=1.\n- Sharedmodule commit: a8f5ad2 (pushed).

title: stopMessage BD 查询按会话 workdir 隔离（防跨项目污染）
description:
## Background
多个项目共用同一 RouteCodex server 时，stopMessage 的 BD runtime probe/auto create 若未按会话 workdir 执行，会读取/写入错误项目的 .beads，导致任务状态污染。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] stopMessage stage-policy 的 BD runtime 查询支持并使用 per-request workdir
- [ ] stopMessage blocked auto-create 使用同一 per-request workdir
- [ ] host metadata 在可用时补齐 workdir（含 clock daemon 反查）
- [ ] 增加回归测试覆盖 workdir 透传与隔离行为
- [ ] 相关 jest 与 TS 编译通过
notes:
Implemented cross-project BD isolation for stopMessage runtime:
- llmswitch-core stage-policy now accepts `bdWorkingDirectory` and passes it into all runtime BD probes (`resolveBdTaskSelectionFromRuntime`/`detectBdWorkState`).
- stop_message_auto derives per-request workdir from adapterContext/metadata/runtime metadata and uses it for both stage-policy probes and blocked auto-create (`bd create`).
- host `buildRequestMetadata` now backfills `workdir` from clock daemon registry when request metadata/header omits it (via `clockDaemonId`).
- Added registry lookup API: `ClockClientRegistry.findByDaemonId`.
- Added regressions:
  - `tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts`: runtime probe cwd override + stage-policy per-request cwd forwarding.
  - `tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts`: daemon-id to workdir backfill.

Validation:
1) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts (PASS)
2) npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit (PASS)

title: anthropic-messages SSE decode incomplete 导致 responses 失败
description: 现象：/v1/responses 路由到 tabglm anthropic 协议时，Provider 返回后在 llmswitch-core resp_inbound_stage1_sse_decode 报错：Anthropic SSE stream incomplete，导致 HTTP 失败。需兼容部分 upstream SSE 结尾缺帧/分块截断但主体已完整的场景。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 同形请求不再抛 SSE_DECODE_ERROR；2) 至少一个受影响 provider 回放通过 + 一个未受影响 provider 控制回放通过；3) 修复位于 llmswitch-core compat/Hub 阶段，不在 host/provider transport 打补丁。

title: virtual-router: tool 搜索命令误命中 web_search
description:
现象：工具调用中普通本地搜索命令（例如 `git log --since ...`、`bd --no-db search ...`）被判定为 `web_search:tool-declared`，命中 web_search 池。
期望：仅当工具意图明确是联网网页搜索时命中 web_search；本地/代码/git/bd 搜索应归类为 search（或保持 thinking/coding 规则）。

Acceptance Criteria:
1) `git log --since ...`、`bd --no-db search ...`、`rg ...` 等命中 `search`，不再命中 `web_search`。
2) 明确联网工具（如 web_search/browser/search_query 等）仍命中 `web_search`。
3) 保持 thinking/coding 路由语义不回归（至少一条控制回放通过）。
notes:
- Root cause:
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/classifier.ts` 里 `web_search` 仅凭 `hasWebSearchToolDeclared` 就触发，导致声明了 web_search 工具的普通本地搜索命令被误路由。
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/tool-signals.ts` 对 `exec_command` 的 shell 分类未覆盖 `git log` 与 `bd --no-db search`，把它们归为 `other`，进一步放大误判。

- Fix applied:
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/classifier.ts`
    - `web_search` 触发条件改为：
      1) 上一轮工具分类为 `websearch`（续写）；或
      2) `web_search` 工具声明 + 当前用户输入命中联网搜索意图（intent）。
    - 防止仅因工具声明触发 `web_search`。
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/tool-signals.ts`
    - 增加 `git log/shortlog/reflog/blame` 与 `bd search` 的 `search` 分类识别。
  - 新增回归脚本：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/web-search-vs-search-route.mjs`。
  - 矩阵接入：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs` 增加 `matrix:web-search-vs-search-route`。

- Verification evidence:
  1) `cd ../sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build` ✅ (Matrix passed)
  2) `cd ../sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && node scripts/tests/web-search-vs-search-route.mjs` ✅
     output: `{ gitLogRoute: "search", bdSearchRoute: "search", webIntentRoute: "web_search", readRoute: "thinking", writeRoute: "coding" }`
  3) 对用户给出的同形样本离线重判（stage6 semantic_map）：
     - `req_1770819097138_20b4bd8d`（git log）=> `route=search`, `reason=search:last-tool-search`
     - `req_1770819112622_52e965ee`（bd search）=> `route=search`, `reason=search:last-tool-search`

- Note:
  - RouteCodex 主仓 `npm run build:dev` 在当前工作区会被既有 untracked 文件拦截（repo-sanity），与本修复无关；本次已在 llmswitch-core 仓完成构建+矩阵验证。
增量修正（用户补充规则）：
- 去掉“上一轮为 websearch 则续命中 web_search”的逻辑，避免连续轮次粘住。
- web_search 改为仅由“当前请求信号”触发（tool-declared 或 intent-keyword），并保留本地工具续写优先级保护（read/write/search 续写不被 web_search 覆盖）。

二次验证：
1) `cd ../sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build` ✅
2) `node scripts/tests/web-search-vs-search-route.mjs` ✅
   输出含：`noStickyWebSearchRoute: "tools"`（证明上一轮 web_search 不再自动命中 web_search）。
close_reason: fixed classifier trigger + tool search categorization; validated by matrix and replay-shape checks

title: iflow 同类错误重试风暴：provider 退避阶梯 3/10/31/61 秒
description:
背景
- 当前 iflow/少量 provider 场景下，同类错误会快速切换重试，导致风暴。

目标
- 对同类可重试错误施加阶梯回退，避免瞬时连续命中。

Acceptance Criteria
1. 同一 providerKey+模型+同类错误签名连续出现时，回退时间按 3s -> 10s -> 31s -> 61s 递增，并在后续维持 61s。
2. 回退信息通过现有 virtualRouterSeriesCooldown 细节透出，虚拟路由可感知并跳过冷却节点。
3. 至少有 1 个针对性测试覆盖该退避序列。
4. 记录 1 组 iflow 重放验证（失败 provider + 控制组）结论。
acceptance_criteria: 同类错误触发 3/10/31/61s 退避并被虚拟路由感知，测试通过
notes:
实现完成：
- 将配额/同错阶梯回退统一到路由侧 cooldown（QuotaCenter + VirtualRouter health fallback）。
- 429/默认错误序列改为 3s,10s,31s,61s（封顶 61s）。
- 保持 host request-executor 不承载同错策略，仅保留既有网络错误短等待逻辑。

验证：
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor-provider.spec.ts tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-center.spec.ts tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-daemon-module.spec.ts
- 结果：3 suites passed, 27 tests passed。

title: Config: apikey env refs + startup gating
description:
## Goal
- 默认/示例 config 不含明文 apikey，支持 `${ENV}` 引用；兼容 apikey 直写；OAuth 不改
- 启动阶段：在 runtime 初始化完成前 hold /v1/chat|responses|messages 请求，不做无意义命中
- provider 缺失 apikey/auth 不应阻塞启动（标记 unhealthy + 路由可 failover）

## Acceptance Criteria
- `tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts` 全部通过（尤其 non-interactive init 不进入交互）
- server 在存在缺失 auth 的 provider 时仍能启动，/health 显示 starting->ok
- runtime 未 ready 时对 /v1/responses 等请求会等待直到 ready（或超时返回 503）
- configsamples/config.json 与 ~/.routecodex/config.json 模板一致且可放入 repo（无明文 key）
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-04):
- Core: `cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build` (PASS)
- Host: `npm run test:cli` (PASS)
- Host: `npm run build:dev` (PASS; includes unified-hub-shadow, e2e-toolcall, routing-instructions, cli, install:global, mock:regressions, blackbox antigravity parity)
- Startup gating: /v1/chat|messages|responses handlers wait on runtime-ready (timeout via ROUTECODEX_STARTUP_HOLD_MS)
- Optional auth: llmswitch-core VirtualRouter no longer blocks bootstrap when apiKey auth missing; provider init errors are surfaced via ProviderErrorEvent without crashing server
- Config template: apikey uses `${ENV}` (shareable config); LM Studio sample uses empty apiKey for no-auth local baseURL
close_reason: Implemented env-based apikey + startup hold + non-blocking missing auth; verified via build:dev

title: Fix codex/claude managed tmux reuse cwd isolation to prevent session cross-talk
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
1) In managed tmux reuse mode, launching codex/claude must execute under the current invocation cwd, not stale shell cwd from reused session.
2) Reused-session command injection must not cause cross-session resume/cmd mixing between different project directories.
3) Add regression test in launcher-kernel tests to assert injected tmux command includes cwd switch before launching tool.
4) Existing launcher tests continue passing.
notes:
Implemented launcher cwd/session isolation fix for codex/claude managed tmux path:
- src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts: launchCommandInTmuxPane now prefixes injected command with 'cd -- <currentCwd> &&' before env+binary execution, ensuring actual process cwd matches invocation cwd even on reused tmux panes.
- src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts: reusable tmux pane matching now checks pane_current_path only when available and rejects mismatch (soft check), keeping compatibility with legacy pane output.
- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts: added assertion that reused tmux launch command includes cwd switch; added regression that orphan tmux session is not reused when pane cwd differs; added assertion for advanced clock flow command cwd switch.
Verification:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts (PASS).
close_reason: Fixed codex/claude launcher cwd isolation in managed tmux flow and added regression coverage

title: Harden launcher managed tmux reuse isolation by client type and cwd
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
1) codex launcher only reuses rcc_codex_* orphan tmux sessions; claude only reuses rcc_claude_* sessions.
2) Reuse requires pane_current_path present and equal to current invocation cwd; missing/mismatch means do not reuse.
3) Add codex CLI regression coverage for cross-client orphan isolation and strict cwd reuse.
4) codex/claude CLI tests pass.
notes:
Implemented tmux reuse hardening: reuse only same launcher type sessions and require pane path equals current cwd; keep injected command forcing cd to cwd before launch. Added codex regressions for cross-client isolation and cwd mismatch behavior. Verification passed: jest codex+claude CLI tests, tsc noEmit, install:global.
Updated tmux sticky strategy as requested: only stick when pane is idle and cwd exactly matches, otherwise create managed session. Implemented current TMUX pane validation before sticky reuse via list-panes(command+path). Also kept same-client-prefix and strict cwd checks for orphan reuse. Added regression in tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts for in-tmux non-idle pane fallback to managed new session. Verification: jest codex+claude CLI tests PASS (17 tests), tsc noEmit PASS, install:global PASS.
close_reason: Hardened tmux reuse isolation for codex/claude and reinstalled global CLI

title: Auto-destroy managed tmux session after codex/claude command exits
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
1) For launcher-managed tmux sessions (auto-created or reused rcc_*), codex/claude command exit must automatically kill that tmux session.
2) For user-owned current tmux pane sticky path, launcher must NOT kill user tmux session.
3) Add CLI regression assertions over injected shell command behavior for both managed and non-managed tmux paths.
4) codex/claude CLI tests pass.
notes: Implemented managed tmux auto-destroy on launcher command exit. In launcher-kernel, managed tmux injected command now preserves exit code and then kills the managed tmux session after codex or claude exits. This only applies to managed rcc sessions; user-owned sticky pane flow is unchanged. Updated codex CLI tests to assert managed session cleanup markers in injected command. Verification passed: jest codex+claude CLI tests, tsc noEmit, install:global.
close_reason: Managed tmux sessions now auto-destroy on codex/claude exit; global install refreshed

title: sticky 命中不支持能力模型时应回落到 vision/web_search 标准路由
description: 当前 sticky 会在多模态/搜索请求中继续命中 iflow.glm-5 等不支持能力模型，导致连续 400/429 并在池内风暴重试。需要在 sticky 返回前做能力门控，不满足时跳过 sticky 并走标准路由选择。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 若请求含图片且 sticky provider 不支持多模态/vision，则 sticky 失效并回落标准 vision 选路；2) 若请求为 web_search 场景且 sticky provider 不支持搜索能力，则 sticky 失效并回落标准 web_search 选路；3) 保持非上述场景 sticky 语义不变；4) 增加对应回归测试并通过 llmswitch-core build。
notes: Implemented in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: src/router/virtual-router/engine/routing-pools/index.ts. Added sticky capability guard: image requests require sticky provider present in routing.multimodal|vision; web_search/search requests require sticky provider present in routing.web_search|search; otherwise skip sticky and continue normal route selection. Added regression test file: tests/router/sticky-capability-guard.test.ts. Verification: (1) cd ../sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build (pass, matrix pass). (2) replay script on dist selectProviderImpl confirms image->iflow.2-173.minimax-m2.5(route=multimodal), webSearch->iflow.3-138.minimax-m2.5(route=web_search), control text keeps sticky->iflow.1-186.glm-5(route=default,pool=sticky). (3) host verify: cd routecodex && npm run build:dev (pass, includes install:global and full verification chain).
close_reason: sticky provider capability guard implemented and validated

title: TokenFileAuthProvider picks up token created after init
description:
## Problem
When OAuth token file is created *after* provider initialization (common when user completes device-code login after server starts), TokenFileAuthProvider may keep failing and server appears to "not take token" until restart.
acceptance_criteria:
- TokenFileAuthProvider can start with missing token file (status invalid) but later, after token file appears, buildHeaders succeeds without requiring restart/re-init.
- Unit test covers late token creation.
notes:
Fix:
- TokenFileAuthProvider now starts leniently (token file may be missing at init) and re-reads token from disk on each buildHeaders/validateCredentials, so tokens created after OAuth complete are picked up without restart.

Files:
- src/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.ts
- tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.qwen-alias.spec.ts

Evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.qwen-alias.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.iflow.spec.ts (PASS)
- npm run build:dev (PASS)
close_reason: TokenFileAuthProvider can pick up late-created token files

title: responses SSE: avoid hard failure when stream ends without completed but has partial output
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- llmswitch-core sse-to-json returns a valid Responses payload with status=incomplete when stream has usable partial output but misses completed/done.
- still throws when stream has no usable output (e.g., only response.created).
- add/adjust unit tests in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/test/responses-converter.test.ts.
notes:
- Code change: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/builders/response-builder.ts
  - Added recoverable fallback in getResult(): when stream lacks completed/done but has meaningful message content, return success with response.status="incomplete" instead of throwing Building not completed.
  - Added helpers: hasRecoverablePartialOutput(), hasMeaningfulMessageContent().
- Test added: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/test/responses-converter.test.ts
  - Case: missing completed/done but has output_text.delta returns status=incomplete.
- Verification evidence:

  3) No regression in SSE conversion tests during build matrix; routecodex build chain finished with exit code 0.
close_reason: responses SSE converter now salvages partial output as status=incomplete when terminal events are missing; full build:dev verification passed

notes:

- Test: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/test/responses-converter.test.ts

title: /v1/messages 路由在 iflow/gemini-cli/claude 场景下的请求稳态修复
description: 用户现场复现三类问题：1) iflow minimax-m2.5 在 web_search 路由返回 AllModelsFailed: invalid params, invalid chat setting；2) gemini-cli 在 /v1/messages 报 Failed to parse URL，endpoint 被重复拼接；3) routecodex claude 在 tmux 管理启动时出现 ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN 与 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 冲突。需要修复并保持 launcher/server 自愈能力。
acceptance_criteria: 1) /v1/messages + web_search 命中 iflow/minimax 时不再出现 invalid chat setting（请求形状与 endpoint 合法）；2) /v1/messages + web_search 命中 gemini-cli 时 URL 不重复拼接且可正常请求；3) routecodex claude 在 tmux 启动路径可以真正 unset ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN/ANTHROPIC_TOKEN，不再触发 auth conflict；4) 为上述行为补充单测并通过目标测试集。
notes:
Implemented and verified:
- launcher-kernel tmux injection now supports env unset diff and emits env -u for removed keys (fixes claude ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN/API_KEY conflict in tmux path).
- iflow family web_search policy now ignores public entry endpoints (e.g. /v1/messages) and falls back to default chat endpoint/body; legacy /chat/retrieve path remains supported.
- gemini-cli protocol endpoint resolver now normalizes polluted defaultEndpoint/action values to prevent duplicated path segments.
- http-transport-provider baseUrl selection now prefers first absolute URL candidate to self-heal malformed runtime base paths.
Tests: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts tests/providers/core/runtime/protocol-http-providers.unit.test.ts tests/client/gemini/gemini-cli-protocol-client.test.ts tests/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.headers.test.ts ; npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts ; BUILD_MODE=dev npm run build:min
close_reason: Implemented fixes for iflow /v1/messages invalid chat setting, gemini-cli URL duplication parse failure, and claude tmux auth env conflict; added regression tests and build/test verification evidence in notes.

title: Fix iflow web_search route model coupling + /v1/messages clock tool injection
description:
## Problem
1) iflow web_search route should be route-driven and not affected by model-gated fallback logic.
2) /v1/messages clock chain can expose reminder instructions without an injected clock tool, causing "No such tool available: clock" behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] existing non-web_search fallback behavior remains intact for minimax-m2.5.
- [ ] when clock reminder injection path is used, `clock` tool is present in injected fallback tool set.
- [ ] add/adjust tests covering both behaviors and run targeted test suites.
acceptance_criteria:

- [x] existing non-web_search fallback behavior remains intact for minimax-m2.5.

title: Antigravity 403 verify-account triggers interactive OAuth
description:
## Problem
Antigravity/Gemini upstream may return HTTP 403 with messages like "verify your account" / "validation_required" / "accounts.google.com/signin/continue". Today this does not trigger interactive OAuth repair, so requests fail without auto portal/browser flow.
acceptance_criteria:
- When upstream error is 403 and message contains verify-account/validation_required/accounts.google.com/signin/continue (or support.google.com/accounts?p=al_alert), provider triggers interactive OAuth repair (openBrowser=true) via oauth-lifecycle.
- Unit test covers classification.
notes:
Fix:
- Treat Antigravity/Gemini HTTP 403 verify-account / validation_required / accounts.google.com/signin/continue as an interactive OAuth repair trigger (openBrowser flow).

Files:
- src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts
- tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle-antigravity-verify-account.spec.ts

Evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle-antigravity-verify-account.spec.ts (PASS)
- npm run build:dev (PASS)
close_reason: 403 verify-account now triggers interactive OAuth repair

title: exec_command 危险 git 命令拦截补强（reset/checkout）
description: 用户反馈当前模型会发出危险命令（示例: git reset --hard HEAD），且 checkout 需要限制为单文件。要求与 rm -rf 同级拦截，并在拒绝后给明确提示。
acceptance_criteria: 1) exec_command 对 git reset --hard（含 HEAD/路径变体）直接拒绝；2) exec_command 对 git checkout 仅允许单文件目标（不允许分支切换/整仓恢复/多文件）；3) 拒绝时返回可读提示，明确安全替代写法；4) 增加并通过对应单测。
notes:
Implemented in llmswitch-core: src/tools/exec-command/validator.ts (deny git reset --hard; restrict git checkout to single-file with human-readable message), src/tools/tool-registry.ts (propagate validation message), src/conversion/shared/tool-governor.ts (rewrite rejected exec_command to safe blocked command that prints guidance and exits). Added tests: tests/sharedmodule/tool-registry-tools.spec.ts and tests/sharedmodule/tool-governor-exec-command-guard.spec.ts. Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/tool-registry-tools.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/tool-governor-exec-command-guard.spec.ts (pass). Also ran sharedmodule npm run build (pass).
Additional hardening: reject chained checkout commands (e.g. git checkout -- file && ...). Final verification rerun: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/tool-registry-tools.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/tool-governor-exec-command-guard.spec.ts (pass); sharedmodule npm run build:ci (pass).

title: [servertool] stop_message_auto followup empty may return empty original payload (client sees no response)
description: Observed with openai-responses + deepseek-web route: servertool log shows stop_message_auto matched, then client gets no visible response. Suspect path: stop_message_flow followup returns empty after retry, engine falls back to original response, but original can also be empty/blank payload.
acceptance_criteria: When stop_message_flow followup is empty after retry, orchestration must not silently return an empty payload to client; either return a non-empty payload or raise explicit error. Existing behavior for non-empty original fallback remains stable. Add regression test covering empty-original + empty-followup case.
notes:
Validation evidence (2026-02-14):
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/engine.ts now throws SERVERTOOL_EMPTY_FOLLOWUP(502) when stop_message followup and original are both empty; keeps original fallback only when original is non-empty.
- regression added: tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts -> 'throws explicit empty-followup error when both followup and original response are empty'.
- verified: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/request-executor.single-attempt.spec.ts (PASS).

title: [compat] anthropic inbound semantic map must not promote quoted tool_calls text
description:
Background:
In anthropic-messages DeepSeek sample req_1771061189529_2348c442, stage1.format_parse keeps only user quoted text, but stage2.semantic_map unexpectedly contains an assistant message with tool_calls JSON payload.

Acceptance Criteria:
- For anthropic inbound pipeline, user text containing quoted/transcript JSON like {"tool_calls":[...]} remains plain user text and is never promoted into assistant/tool call message during semantic mapping.
- Fix is protocol-safe: no cross-protocol/profile pollution (protocol-first filtering remains intact).
- Add targeted regression test using the failing shape to assert stage1->stage2 does not synthesize assistant tool call from user quote.
- sharedmodule llmswitch-core build and matrix tests pass.
notes:
Implemented compat-only hardening in llmswitch-core:
- src/conversion/compat/actions/deepseek-web-response.ts
- src/conversion/shared/text-markup-normalizer/extractors-json.ts
- scripts/tests/deepseek-web-compat-tool-calling.mjs (testQuotedToolCallsDoNotExecute)
Also fixed anthropic usage mapping + regression:
- src/conversion/hub/response/response-runtime.ts
- scripts/tests/anthropic-usage-input-output-regression.mjs
- scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs
Validation:
- node scripts/tests/deepseek-web-compat-tool-calling.mjs => ok
- node scripts/tests/anthropic-usage-input-output-regression.mjs => ok
- npm run build (postbuild matrix) => pass
- report: sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/matrix-ci-1771063749674.json
Follow-up alignment with principle 'request constrains response': sharedmodule commit a0172ec enforces DeepSeek response tool-call normalization against captured request tool list when tools/tool_choice:function is explicitly provided; added regressions for disallowed-tool and empty-tools request cases.
Aligned to policy clarification: request-side is guidance constraint, response-side remains best-effort salvage/repair. Sharedmodule commit 3456ae6 removes request-list hard-drop behavior in deepseek compat while keeping quoted tool_calls false-positive guard.
close_reason: Fixed in sharedmodule commit 5e51b2f (compat-only parser hardening + anthropic usage mapping + regressions); matrix-ci-1771063749674 passed

title: Qwen oauth command should not force reauth when token valid
description:
## Problem
`routecodex oauth <tokenFile>` currently always runs interactive OAuth with `forceReauthorize=true`, so even after a successful authorization it keeps asking the user to authenticate again, causing a perceived "infinite auth loop".

Additionally, when user config has no qwen provider, the token file will never be used, which increases confusion.
acceptance_criteria:
- `routecodex oauth <selector>` skips opening browser when the token state is valid and not near expiry, unless `--force` is provided.
- When token is expiring/expired/invalid, it attempts non-forced refresh first and only falls back to interactive flow when needed.
- For qwen tokens, prints a clear warning if loaded user config has no qwen provider entry.
notes:
Fix:
- `routecodex oauth <selector>` no longer forces interactive reauth every time. It skips when token is valid, and only does forced reauth when `--force` is used.
- Explicit reauth commands (token-daemon refresh, oauth *-auto, reauth-required) keep forcing reauth.
- For qwen token, warns when user config has no qwen provider entry (token would never be used).

Files:
- src/token-daemon/index.ts
- src/commands/oauth.ts
- src/commands/token-daemon.ts
- tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts
- scripts/tests/ci-jest.mjs
- package.json

Evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/token-daemon/interactive-refresh.spec.ts (PASS)
- npm run build:dev (PASS)
close_reason: OAuth command no longer forces reauth when token valid

Code: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/routing-instructions.ts (clear branch now applies stopMessageClear) + sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts (session persistence treats clear as stopMessageClear). Added regression tests: tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts -> generic clear clears mode-only state; activate->clear then runServerSideToolEngine returns passthrough (no stop_message_flow followup). title: 验证 deepseek 直连 web_search 并切为默认搜索路由
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- 用真实 deepseek provider 完成一次可复现 web_search 直连验证（记录 requestId/providerKey/providerProtocol/route/model）
- 若验证通过，将默认 web_search 路由切换到 deepseek（不影响 vision->kimi 路由）
- 补充回归，覆盖默认搜索路由命中与未受影响控制样例
- 运行相关测试并附证据
notes:
Progress 2026-02-14: implement deepseek-native web_search routing preference.
- init defaults now include deepseek search models and web_search targets order deepseek-first then iflow fallback when both configured.
- chat-process web_search injection now bypasses servertool when deepseek native engine is highest-priority for normal web-search intent; non-deepseek engines still inject web_search tool.
- Added regression tests: tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts (deepseek+iflow ordering, no injection without config), tests/sharedmodule/chat-semantics-stage1.spec.ts (deepseek bypass vs iflow servertool path).
Validation evidence:
- npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/chat-semantics-stage1.spec.ts tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts (pass)
- npm run build:dev (pass, includes install:global + full verification chain).
Validation 2026-02-15 (local real replay, dev build 0.89.2107):
1) Non-stream direct model replay OK:

- requestId=anthropic-messages-deepseek-web.1-unknown-20260215T010651904-001

- confirms UPSTREAM_SSE_NOT_ALLOWED no longer reproduces after forcing upstream SSE for search requests.

title: [servertool] continue_execution followup 在 /v1/messages 出现中断回归
description: 用户日志显示 continue_execution_flow followup 在 thinking/tools 路由下随机失败，报错 [servertool] Followup failed for flow continue_execution_flow；曾出现 HTTP 400: Instructions are required、Model not support 等上游错误，怀疑 followup payload/路由保真与 provider 约束存在不兼容回归。
acceptance_criteria:
- 复现并定位 Followup failed for flow continue_execution_flow 的根因（含 provider 错误明细与 payload 证据）。
- 修复后 /v1/messages 命中 continue_execution 不再中断，保持会话连续。
- 增加回归测试覆盖该失败形态（至少 1 个失败样本 + 1 个控制样本）。
- 完成 build:dev + install:global 验证。
notes: Root cause: continue_execution_flow followup was not provider-pinned in servertool engine, so followup requestId suffix could drift alias/provider and hit incompatible upstreams. Evidence samples: ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/anthropic-messages/iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5/anthropic-messages-tabglm.key1-glm-5-20260215T001250255-001_continue_execution_followup (provider-response status=435 Model not support), and antigravity followup sample with HTTP_404. Fix: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/engine.ts now includes continue_execution_flow in forced provider-key pinning (__shadowCompareForcedProviderKey). Regression tests: tests/servertool/continue-execution-followup.spec.ts (2 cases) + targeted suites passed: servertool-clock, iflow-model-error-retry, gemini-empty-reply-continue. Full verification passed: sharedmodule npm run build; host npm run build:dev (includes install:global and full verification chain).
close_reason: Pinned continue_execution followup to original provider; regression + build/install passed

title: responses: local image path autoload to input_image
description:
Context: 用户在 Responses 输入里直接贴本地图片路径（如 /Users/.../a.jpg）时，当前未转成多模态 image block，导致 vision 路由不命中。
Scope: 在 llmswitch-core Responses inbound bridge 中识别最新 user 文本里的本地图片路径，自动读取并注入 image 内容；读取失败应明确报错，避免静默失败。
Acceptance Criteria:
1) 最新 user 文本包含本地图片路径时，buildChatRequestFromResponses 生成的 user content 包含 image_url(data:image/*;base64,...)；
2) 路径无法读取时返回明确 MALFORMED_REQUEST 错误并附带 path/reason；
3) 增加单测/回归脚本并接入 matrix；
4) 用用户样本回放并记录结果（命中或失败原因）。
notes:
Implemented in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core (commit 922415d, pushed to origin/main):
- src/conversion/responses/responses-openai-bridge.ts: latest user text local image path autoload -> image_url(data:image/*)
- fail-fast on unreadable local path via ProviderProtocolError(MALFORMED_REQUEST) with details.path/details.reason
- scripts/tests/responses-local-image-path-autoload.mjs added
- scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs hooked matrix:responses-local-image-path-autoload

Verification:
1) Local synthetic replay via tsx source import: PASS local-image-autoload (userParts=2, includes data:image/png;base64).
2) User sample replay: ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/openai-responses/crs.key1.gpt-5.3-codex/req_1771142136330_dfd689b1/client-request.json -> ProviderProtocolError MALFORMED_REQUEST with details.path=/Users/fanzhang/Library/CloudStorage/OPPO互联-DeviceSpace/...jpg and details.reason=ETIMEDOUT: connection timed out, read.

Note: sharedmodule npm run build:dev currently blocked by existing untracked file src/router/virtual-router/engine/pool-selection.ts importing missing symbols; unrelated to this fix.
close_reason: Responses local image path now autoloads into image_url; unreadable paths fail-fast with MALFORMED_REQUEST and explicit path/reason; regression + sample replay evidence recorded

title: anthropic SSE error event 500 should map to provider error (not sse_decode crash)
description: Observed failure: chat_process.resp.stage1.sse_decode throws on anthropic event:error payload (status=500, message=Operation failed). This currently surfaces as SSE decode failure and can break normal retry/error semantics.
acceptance_criteria: 1) For anthropic-messages SSE event:error payload, inbound decode returns a structured provider/upstream error with status/code/message/request_id. 2) request-executor reports provider error category instead of generic sse_decode parse failure. 3) Add regression test covering event:error 500 sample shape.
notes: Implemented fix in llmswitch-core SSE inbound path: 1) Anthropic SSE converter now treats event:error as structured upstream error with status/upstreamCode/request_id context. 2) resp_inbound_stage1_sse_decode now propagates upstreamStatus/upstreamCode/retryable to ProviderProtocolError details and top-level fields for host retry/error handling. 3) Added regression script scripts/tests/anthropic-sse-error-event-status.mjs and wired into scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs. Verification: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core npm run build passed (matrix passed, includes matrix:anthropic-sse-error-event-status). Host compile check passed with BUILD_MODE=dev npm run build:min.

title: virtual-router should not persist coding:last-tool-write when latest tool result failed
description: Routing features currently derive lastAssistantToolCategory from assistant tool_calls only. It does not inspect subsequent tool execution outcome, so failed tool attempts can still force coding:last-tool-write and cause loops.
acceptance_criteria: 1) When latest tool result indicates failure/error, lastAssistantToolCategory is suppressed for continuation routing. 2) Successful tool results keep existing continuation behavior. 3) Add regression tests covering failed apply_patch-like tool result text.
notes: Root cause confirmed: virtual-router continuation classifier used last assistant tool_calls only, ignoring subsequent tool execution result, so failed write attempts could still produce coding:last-tool-write. Fix: in features.ts, detect recent tool failure after last assistant tool call (metadata.status + failure text heuristics), and suppress lastAssistantToolCategory when failure is explicit. Added regression script scripts/tests/virtual-router-tool-failure-demote.mjs and wired into scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs. Verification: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core npm run build passed (matrix passed, includes matrix:virtual-router-tool-failure-demote).
close_reason: Tool-result-aware routing added: failed tool outcomes no longer persist coding:last-tool-write continuation.

title: [runtime] 内存泄露/溢出防护：请求ID定时器、SSE快照、生命周期日志队列
description: 排查并修复可能导致 routecodex 长时间运行后内存持续增长或瞬时峰值过高的路径，重点覆盖 request-id 管理、provider SSE snapshot capture、process lifecycle 异步写队列与历史 stats 装载。
acceptance_criteria: 1) request-id manager 不再为每个请求创建独立 setTimeout，改为可控 sweep 机制并维持原有 ID 解析行为；2) provider SSE snapshot capture 增加默认字节上限并记录 truncated 元信息，避免无限 Buffer 堆积；3) process lifecycle logger 对异步写队列增加上限保护，避免文件写慢时内存无界增长；4) stats 历史加载不再整文件读入导致启动峰值过高，改为尾部限量加载；5) 至少新增/更新针对性单元测试并通过。

title: 恢复 stopMessage mode-only 自动流（误禁用回滚）
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. 发送 `<**stopMessage:on,10**>`（仅 mode，不带文本）。
2. 触发可被 stop_message_auto 识别的 stop 场景。
3. 观察当前行为：mode-only 状态被清空，不会继续 followup。

## Acceptance Criteria
1. `<**stopMessage:on,10**>` 在无 stopMessageText 时可重新触发 stop_message_auto（按轮次上限执行）。
2. `<**clear**>` 与 `<**stopMessage:clear**>` 都可清理 mode-only 状态。
3. 不引入空参数工具循环；相关回归通过（`tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts`、`tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts`、`scripts/tests/loop-rt-responses.mjs`）。
notes: Implemented mode-only stopMessage re-enable across llmswitch-core route path + stage policy followup. Evidence: sharedmodule npm run build (matrix pass); routecodex npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/chat-semantics-stage1.spec.ts (all pass); routecodex npm run build:dev (pass) and npm run install:global (pass).
close_reason: mode-only stopMessage restored with regression updates and verified build/test/install

title: iflow OAuth manual/auth repair path broken
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `IFLOW_TOKEN_FILE=~/.routecodex/auth/iflow-oauth-3-138.json node scripts/auth-iflow-manual.mjs`.
2. Observe immediate failure before device code issuance.

## Expected Behavior
iflow OAuth should enter interactive authorization flow (or explicit recoverable oauth error), not fail on non-JSON device-code endpoint.

## Actual Behavior
`Device code endpoint did not return JSON` and OAuth aborts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- iflow default OAuth path no longer depends on HTML-returning endpoint `https://iflow.cn/oauth/device/code`.
- routecodex OAuth path reaches browser login callback flow (auth-code) without immediate endpoint parse failure.
- Add/adjust regression coverage for iflow default OAuth config (flow type + endpoints).
- Keep explicit `iflow-device` fallback available for manual troubleshooting.
notes:
Evidence
- Repro before fix: `IFLOW_TOKEN_FILE=~/.routecodex/auth/iflow-oauth-3-138.json node scripts/auth-iflow-manual.mjs` -> `Device code endpoint did not return JSON`.
- After fix: `ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_DEBUG=1 node dist/cli.js oauth iflow-oauth-3-138.json --headful` enters auth-code flow and prints callback wait.
  - `flow=authorization_code`
  - `OAuth URL: https://iflow.cn/oauth?...redirect=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A8080%2Foauth2callback...`
  - `Waiting for OAuth callback at http://localhost:8080/oauth2callback`
- Unit test pass: `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.iflow.spec.ts`.
- Build pass: `npm run build`.
- Provider endpoint spot checks:
  - qwen device/token endpoints return JSON errors (reachable).
  - google auth/token endpoints reachable as expected.
close_reason: iflow OAuth default path repaired and verified

title: Qwen OAuth qwen-auto headful/devMode 失效导致浏览器打不开
description:
现象：routecodex oauth qwen-auto qwen --headful 时，日志仍显示 headful=0/devMode=0，用户感知为“打不开”。

Acceptance Criteria:
1. qwen-auto 在 --headful 或 --dev 下，必须将 headful/devMode 明确传递到 oauth-flows 与 camoufox launcher。
2. 日志中应显示 headful=1/devMode=1（开启时）。
3. routecodex oauth qwen-auto qwen --headful 可拉起可见浏览器并进入授权页。
4. 增加回归测试，覆盖命令参数到 launcher 参数的传递链路。
close_reason: Aligned OAuth flow to pre-refactor behavior (pre-2280 style) for usability: restored oauth command semantics (no forced manual/soft/headful path), restored interactive refresh default visible Camoufox + qwen auto mode; kept compatibility for explicit mode=manual. Verified by real run: routecodex oauth qwen-auto qwen now logs headful=1/devMode=1 autoMode=qwen and opens Camoufox flow. build:dev + install:global completed.

title: Qwen Camoufox auto: click confirm on authorize page
description:
## Goal
Add a `qwen-auto` OAuth helper similar to `gemini-auto`/`antigravity-auto`, using Camoufox automation to click Qwen's authorize confirmation button after portal redirect.

## Context
Qwen authorize page shows a Confirm button like: `button.qwen-confirm-btn` (span text: Confirm).

## Acceptance Criteria
- New CLI command: `routecodex oauth qwen-auto <selector>` runs Camoufox in auto mode `qwen` (headless by default) and performs the confirm click.
- `scripts/camoufox/launch-auth.mjs` supports `--auto-mode qwen` and clicks `button.qwen-confirm-btn` when present.
- `npm run build:dev` passes (includes global install).
notes:
Implemented Qwen auto confirm click.

Changes:
- src/commands/oauth.ts: add `qwen-auto` command (Camoufox automation mode=qwen)
- scripts/camoufox/launch-auth.mjs: support auto-mode qwen, click `button.qwen-confirm-btn`

Evidence:
- npm run build:dev (PASS, includes install:global)

Usage:
- routecodex oauth qwen-auto qwen-oauth-1-default.json
close_reason: qwen-auto added; camoufox clicks confirm button

title: [bug] OAuth 全提供方认证后真实请求验证与修复
description:
Acceptance Criteria
1. 列出当前 routecodex 支持并已配置的 OAuth 提供方（qwen/iflow/gemini-cli/antigravity 等），逐个执行认证后真实请求验证（非仅日志）。
2. 每个提供方给出可复现证据：命令、关键输出、请求结果（成功/失败与错误码）。
3. 失败项完成最小修复并补充回归测试。
4. 运行 npm run build:dev && npm run install:global 通过。
5. 在 issue notes 记录证据与残余风险。
notes:
Closed after iflow OAuth crash fix + auto OAuth default enablement.
Root cause memory: iFlow OAuth tab crash came from CAMOU_CONFIG_1 timezone field in Camoufox fingerprint injection. Stable after removing timezone while keeping UA/platform/oscpu/locale/geo. Code: src/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.ts sanitizeCamouConfigForOAuth(). Regression: tests/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.os-policy.unit.test.ts. Also enabled provider-aware default auto OAuth in src/commands/oauth.ts for oauth <selector>.

title: Fix iFlow expired api_key treated as valid token state
description:
## Context
iflow token files with expired expires_at still treated as valid when api_key exists, causing no refresh/reauth and repeated upstream "Your API Token has expired" failures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- iflow token state must not treat api_key as perpetual valid credential when token expiry is reached
- oauth lifecycle attempts refresh/reauth instead of short-circuiting on stale api_key
- add/update regression tests covering iflow expired api_key behavior
- targeted auth token helper tests pass
notes:
- Additional fix: oauth-auth-code refresh path now normalizes token endpoint payload and gracefully handles missing expires_in (prevents Invalid time value).
- Additional fix: cooldown gate no longer permanently blocks after max attempts; it reopens after cooldown window.
- Local runtime probe: ensureValidOAuthToken(iflow, openBrowser=false) now fails with explicit upstream 500 busy message from iflow token endpoint (not local parsing error).
- Evidence commands:
  - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/oauth-refresh-permanent-errors.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/oauth-repair-cooldown.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle/token-helpers.unit.test.ts tests/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.iflow.spec.ts
  - npm run build
  - node --input-type=module -e "...ensureValidOAuthToken(iflow)..." (now returns explicit upstream 500 busy)
close_reason: Fixed local OAuth expiry/refresh/cooldown bugs for iflow; remaining failure is upstream token endpoint overload

title: [qwen] add qwen3.5-plus model without alias mapping
description: Align qwen provider defaults with direct qwen3.5-plus model support while keeping model identity unchanged (no alias rewrite).
acceptance_criteria: Init provider catalog contains qwen3.5-plus; no qwen model alias mapping introduced; qwen profile header behavior covered by unit test.
notes:
Validation evidence on 2026-02-17:
1) With server API key + Responses input shape, qwen.qwen3.5-plus initially failed local validation: Unknown model qwen3.5-plus for provider qwen (HTTP 502, CONFIG_ERROR).
2) Added qwen3.5-plus to ~/.routecodex/provider/qwen/config.v2.json and restarted dev server on :5555.
3) qwen.qwen3-coder-plus call succeeded (HTTP 200, requires_action with usage).
4) qwen.qwen3.5-plus now reaches upstream but returns HTTP 400 invalid_parameter_error: model  is not supported.
Conclusion: local routing/model registration path works after config update; current blocker is upstream model availability/entitlement.
Corrected evidence detail:
- qwen.qwen3.5-plus upstream response: HTTP 400 invalid_parameter_error, message: model qwen3.5-plus is not supported.

title: qwen oauth model routing align with qwen cli (no iflow coupling)
description: Qwen provider returns upstream 400 for model qwen3.5-plus under qwen-oauth flow. Need provider-side qwen-only model normalization and request headers/auth alignment with qwen cli behavior, while keeping qwen/iflow business logic isolated.
acceptance_criteria: 1) qwen provider under qwen-oauth rewrites unsupported model ids to qwen cli-compatible ids (coder-model/vision-model). 2) iflow provider code path unchanged in behavior and has no new dependency on qwen logic. 3) targeted tests pass for qwen profile model mapping and existing iflow/qwen auth tests.
notes:
Implemented qwen-only oauth model normalization in src/providers/profile/families/qwen-profile.ts (qwen3.5-plus -> coder-model; vision-like ids -> vision-model), removed image-content auto vision switching per routing policy. Added runtime authType propagation in src/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.ts so mapping only applies to qwen-oauth. Added regression tests in tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts. Verification: npm run -s jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.qwen-alias.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.iflow.spec.ts (pass); npm run build:min (pass); runtime replay on global 5520: qwen.qwen3.5-plus returns HTTP 200 with usage and output_text OK.

Post-fix update (2026-02-17): updated ~/.routecodex/provider/qwen/config.v2.json, qwen3.5-plus maxContext 256000 -> 1000000; restarted server with routecodex restart --port 5520; health endpoint confirmed ready. 512k replay passed with HTTP 200, usage input_tokens=521319 output_tokens=8 total_tokens=521327. Virtual router log confirmed longcontext route hit qwen[1].qwen3.5-plus at reqTokens around 521k and request completed status=200.
close_reason: qwen oauth model path aligned and replay verified

title: add qwen web_search backend as backup for iflow
description: Implement an independent qwen web_search backend in servertool web_search handler (parallel to existing iflow backend), and wire default webSearch engine/routing config so qwen can act as fallback behind iflow when both are configured.
acceptance_criteria: 1) web_search handler has qwen-specific backend path independent from iflow logic. 2) when webSearch engines include iflow then qwen, backend failure on iflow falls back to qwen and returns structured search summary/hits. 3) init/config default generation includes qwen:web_search engine + routing target when qwen provider exists, and iflow remains ahead of qwen.
notes: Implemented qwen web_search backend as independent path in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/web-search.ts (new isQwenWebSearchEngine + executeQwenWebSearchViaProvider). Added metadata.qwenWebSearch + endpoint /api/v1/indices/plugin/web_search + payload {model,uq,page,rows}. Added qwen family profile shaping in src/providers/profile/families/qwen-profile.ts (resolveEndpoint/buildRequestBody only when qwenWebSearch=true). Updated qwen auth resource_url base handling in src/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.ts (qwenWebSearch request uses resource root, non-search keeps /v1). Added init defaults for qwen:web_search in src/cli/commands/init.ts and src/cli/config/init-config.ts (iflow remains ahead of qwen when both selected). Added regression tests: tests/servertool/server-side-web-search.spec.ts, tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts, tests/providers/core/runtime/protocol-http-providers.unit.test.ts, tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts. Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/runtime/protocol-http-providers.unit.test.ts tests/servertool/server-side-web-search.spec.ts tests/providers/profile/profile-registry.unit.test.ts tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts => 4 passed, 91 passed.
close_reason: Implemented qwen web_search backup path + defaults + tests; acceptance criteria satisfied

title: Compat: global tool-call recovery + orphan closing-tag cleanup
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- response compat runs text tool-call recovery for all providers/profiles (not qwen-specific)
- orphan closing tags like </parameter></function></tool_call> are stripped globally in response path
- regression test covers profile-miss / no-profile case
- sharedmodule build passes and targeted tests pass
notes: Re-scoped per user directive: shape-only fix (no semantic tool-call inference). Moved orphan closing-tag sanitation to chat_process response stage before governance: llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/stages/resp_process/resp_process_stage1_tool_governance/index.ts. Validation: routecodex jest tests/sharedmodule/{strip-orphan-function-calls-tag,response-compat-universal-recovery}.spec.ts passed; llmswitch-core npm run build:ci passed.

title: WebUI V2: 5-page React+Vite card-based admin refactor
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Main nav includes exactly Provider/OAuth/Routing/Stats/Quota
- Provider page supports provider pool list/create/edit/delete/test in one page
- OAuth page supports inventory + manual/auto authorize flows
- Routing page supports source/group load/save/activate flows
- Stats page merges session/historical/token views
- Quota page supports pool actions + snapshot
- Advanced entry keeps Control and Clock tools
- /daemon/admin serves new webui build with fallback to legacy UI
close_reason: Implemented WebUI V2 and verified with npm run test:webui; npm run test:webui:coverage; npm run build:webui

title: Improve mock regressions progress visibility
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- mock regressions在长等待阶段每30秒至少输出一次进度心跳
- 每个样本执行前后输出开始/结束与耗时
- 发生超时时输出当前阶段、样本名、请求目标与超时阈值
- 不改变现有回归语义与通过判定

title: Simplify stopMessage to marker-only flow
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- 无 stopMessage marker 时 stop_message_auto 永不触发
- <**clear**> 与 <**stopMessage:clear**> 均清空内存状态与持久化文件
- 删除 stage-policy / ai-followup / blocked-report 等 stopMessage 相关复杂分支
- stopMessage 仅保留 set/clear/计数/followup 文本注入最小逻辑
- 增加最小回归：marker触发、无marker不触发、clear后不触发、计数耗尽不触发
notes:
Refine stopMessage syntax: keep text/file, add ai:on|off, on/off toggle semantics, clear hard reset, add done marker stop condition.
2026-02-20: strengthened clock session binding persistence path. bindClockConversationSession now binds when daemonId exists even if tmuxSessionId is absent (prevents lost binding on stopMessage/continue paths carrying only daemon metadata). executor-response now reuses request-retry-helpers bind function to avoid logic drift. Added regression: tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-retry-helpers.clock-binding.spec.ts. Verification: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-retry-helpers.clock-binding.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/provider-response-converter.followup-session.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/provider-response-converter.servertool-regression.spec.ts; npm run build:dev; routecodex restart --port 5520; npm run test:regressions.
2026-02-22: stopMessage client-injection hotfix and verification
- Fix 1: ai:off path no longer appends execution directive template; injects plain marker text only (sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts).
- Fix 2: launcher tmux inject normalizes multiline input to single-line before submit to avoid newline-split submits (src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts).
- Fix 3: add stopMessage duplicate suppression window in host executor to avoid repeated same-text inject on concurrent triggers (src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/stopmessage-client-injection.ts).
- Added regression test: suppresses duplicate injection for same session/text (tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/stopmessage-client-injection.spec.ts).

1) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/stopmessage-client-injection.spec.ts (PASS)
2) npm run build:dev (PASS, global install routecodex 0.89.2420)
3) live server logs show stop_message_auto stage=final result=completed_client_inject_only on chat/responses requests.
2026-02-22 紧急串台修复：client injection 改为 strict tmux-only（禁止按 session/daemon 回退绑定）。修改 src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/client-injection-flow.ts：resolveStrictClientInjectTarget 无 tmux 直接抛 tmux_session_required；resolveStopMessageClientInjectReadiness 仅 tmux_direct 才 ready。新增回归 tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/client-injection-flow.spec.ts，覆盖“有会话映射但无 tmux 仍拒绝注入”与“clientInjectOnly 无 tmux fail-fast”。验证：npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/client-injection-flow.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/stopmessage-client-injection.spec.ts (PASS 6/6)；npm run build:dev (PASS, global install 0.89.2421)。routecodex restart 当前被 daemon endpoint 401 拒绝，需管理员权限重启。
2026-02-22 daemon/launcher + tmux inject修复：1) 仅codex允许无服务时自动拉起（launcher spec allowAutoStartServer=true），claude禁用自动拉起并在服务缺失时fail-fast；2) 注入链路改为tmux直注优先（server端直接tmux send-keys），daemon callback仅兜底，减少no_matching_tmux_session_daemon误报；3) 保持中途不自启动（ensureServerReady仅在launcher启动阶段调用）。
代码：src/cli/commands/launcher-kernel.ts, src/cli/commands/codex.ts, src/cli/commands/claude.ts, src/server/runtime/http-server/tmux-session-probe.ts, src/server/runtime/http-server/clock-client-registry.ts。

title: Qwen qwen-auto: wait for confirm settle + fix manual fallback (no localhost callback)
description:
## Problem
Qwen uses a device-code style authorize page (e.g. https://chat.qwen.ai/authorize?user_code=...), not a localhost OAuth callback.

Current `qwen-auto` clicks `button.qwen-confirm-btn` but closes shortly after, and the auto fallback path (headed manual assist) waits for a localhost callback that will never happen for Qwen.

## Acceptance Criteria
- After clicking `button.qwen-confirm-btn`, qwen-auto waits for a reasonable "settled" signal (URL change, button disappearance, or success UI) before closing the browser.
- If auto selector matching fails and we fall back to headed mode, Qwen fallback does NOT wait for a localhost callback; it should instead keep the browser open for manual completion and exit when the user closes it or after a timeout.
- Add a small unit test ensuring `qwen-auto` subcommand is registered under `oauth`.
- `npm run build:dev` passes.
notes:
Fix:
- TokenDaemon background refresh no longer opens interactive OAuth (prevents Qwen auth popups during build/install).
- qwen-auto automation waits for confirm to settle and has a Qwen-specific headed fallback that does not wait for localhost callback.
- Added unit tests and included them in routing/CI test lists.

Files:
- src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts
- scripts/camoufox/launch-auth.mjs
- tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.auto-refresh-noninteractive.spec.ts
- tests/commands/oauth-command.qwen-auto.spec.ts
- package.json
- scripts/tests/ci-jest.mjs

Evidence:
- npm run build:dev (PASS, includes install:global)
close_reason: Stop qwen auth popups during build; harden qwen-auto

title: Clock reminder missed when task workdir is child path of daemon workdir
description: Observed in session 019c6060-2845-7e70-b6c2-c1ec2dbc6128: clock task due at 17:35 was created but dropped at inject stage with no_matching_tmux_session_daemon + no_binding_candidate_for_workdir. Task workdir was /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/rcc-workspace/llms-wasm-sync/llms-wasm/native while daemon workdir was /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/rcc-workspace/llms-wasm-sync, indicating exact-match workdir filter rejected same workspace path tree.
acceptance_criteria: 1) A clock task with workdir under the daemon workdir binds/injects successfully. 2) No no_binding_candidate_for_workdir for same workspace parent/child dirs. 3) Regression tests cover bind + inject workdir parent/child matching.
notes: Follow-up hardening: clock inject now prioritizes daemon startup workdir (registry-bound workdir) over task argument workdir. Implemented resolveBoundWorkdir + daemonWorkdirHint preference in http-server-clock-daemon.
close_reason: Fixed workdir parent/child mismatch causing clock reminder inject skip; added regression tests and verified via jest

title: WebUI re-review after daemon auth/logging changes
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Complete frontend-focused review for webui code paths touched by recent auth/logging behavior.
- Report urgent issues first with file/line references and actionable fixes.
- Record review conclusion and key risks in issue notes.
acceptance_criteria: Review completed with actionable findings
notes:
Review result (2026-02-19):
- Urgent: ClockPage expects /daemon/clock/tasks => {tasks:[],records:[]} but backend now returns {sessions:[{sessionId,taskCount,tasks}],records:[]}. UI shows tasks=0 and empty table even when tasks exist.
  - UI read path: webui/src/App.tsx:3112, webui/src/App.tsx:3126
  - Backend response: src/server/runtime/http-server/clock-client-routes.ts:190
- Suggestion: Remove Math.random() fallback keys in ClockPage rows to avoid unstable reconciliation.
  - webui/src/App.tsx:3165, webui/src/App.tsx:3197
- Suggestion: Frontend tests still mock old clock payload shape and cannot catch this regression.
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.integration.spec.tsx:563
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.pages.spec.tsx:300
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.edge.spec.tsx:526
Follow-up fix completed (2026-02-19):
- ClockPage code path already includes sessions->tasks flatten + stable row keys in current tree.
- Frontend tests aligned to backend clock payload shape and strengthened with explicit task-row assertions:
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.integration.spec.tsx
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.pages.spec.tsx
  - tests/frontend/webui-app.edge.spec.tsx
- Verified by jest: webui-app.integration/pages/edge/render all pass.

title: Docs: unify OAuth README (auth + refresh + auto modes)
description:
## Goal
Provide a single, up-to-date OAuth README that explains:
- How to authenticate (manual + Camoufox automation)
- How refresh works (background silent vs explicit interactive)
- Token file naming and `tokenFile` alias usage
- Common troubleshooting ("authorized but server doesn't use token")

## Acceptance Criteria
- Add `docs/OAUTH.md` as the canonical OAuth guide.
- Update `README.md` docs list to include it.
- Update existing older OAuth docs (`docs/oauth-authentication-guide.md`, `src/providers/auth/README_OAUTH.md`) to point to `docs/OAUTH.md` (keep old content but clearly mark as legacy).
- Update `docs/PROVIDERS_BUILTIN.md` Qwen snippet to use `tokenFile: "default"`.
- `npm run verify:repo-sanity` passes.
notes:
Evidence
- Added canonical OAuth doc: docs/OAUTH.md
- Linked from README.md and aligned Qwen config in docs/PROVIDERS_BUILTIN.md
- Marked legacy docs to defer to docs/OAUTH.md: docs/oauth-authentication-guide.md, docs/oauth-iflow-implementation.md, src/providers/auth/README_OAUTH.md
- Updated daemon docs to avoid legacy qwen-oauth.json naming: docs/token-refresh-daemon-plan.md, docs/token-daemon-preview.html

Verification
- npm run verify:repo-sanity  → [repo-sanity] ok
- npm run build:dev           → OK (full dev verification stack)
- npm run install:global      → OK (routecodex --version = 0.89.1682)

title: fix(qwen): invalid refresh token should not spam/block
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Have a Qwen OAuth token file where refresh_token is invalid (revoked/expired) or client_id mismatch.
2. Start server (TokenDaemon enabled) or wait for TokenDaemon tick.
3. Observe repeated logs like: OAuth error: invalid_request - Invalid refresh token or client_id.

## Expected
- Auto-refresh should fail fast on permanent refresh errors and stop retrying/spamming until token file changes.
- Non-Qwen traffic should not be impacted by Qwen refresh failures.

## Actual
- Refresh retries multiple times and keeps trying periodically, producing noisy logs and perceived blocking.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Abort OAuth refresh retry loop early on permanent refresh errors (invalid_request/invalid_grant/invalid_client related to refresh token/client_id).
- TokenDaemon auto-suspends token immediately on permanent refresh failure until token file mtime changes.
- Add/adjust unit tests covering this behavior.
- Run verification: npm run verify:repo-sanity + targeted jest.
notes:
Evidence
- Early abort for permanent refresh errors: src/providers/core/strategies/oauth-device-flow.ts, src/providers/core/strategies/oauth-auth-code-flow.ts, src/providers/core/strategies/oauth-refresh-errors.ts
- TokenDaemon now classifies permanent refresh failure and immediately auto-suspends the token until token file mtime changes: src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts, src/token-daemon/history-store.ts

Tests
- npm run verify:repo-sanity  → [repo-sanity] ok
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/token-daemon/history-store.auto-suspend-immediate.spec.ts tests/providers/core/oauth-refresh-permanent-errors.spec.ts  → PASS
close_reason: Stop repeated Qwen refresh retries on permanent errors; auto-suspend until token changes; verified by tests

Blackbox replay on dev server :5532 with callback daemon + heartbeat: stopMessage requestIds openai-responses-tabglm.key1-glm-5-20260222T011015389-001 and openai-responses-crs.key1-gpt-5.3-codex-20260222T011050236-002 both logged stop_message_auto stage=final result=completed_client_inject_only and callback received source=servertool.stop_message with matching tmuxSessionId/workdir.
