title: Global guardian daemon: single manager for start/codex/claude lifecycle
description: Introduce one global RouteCodex guardian daemon process. start/codex/claude must ensure daemon exists, register launch intent, and only proceed after daemon admission. daemon must be singleton and not accept generic process signals as lifecycle control.
acceptance_criteria: 1) rcc start/codex/claude first ensure singleton guardian daemon exists (auto-start if absent). 2) start/codex/claude must register with guardian before launching local server/client process. 3) guardian ignores non-stop lifecycle triggers from CLI commands; only rcc stop can request daemon shutdown. 4) restart/broadcast style shutdown from non-stop paths is blocked. 5) Add CLI tests for singleton ensure, registration flow, and stop-only shutdown path.
notes:
2026-02-22 implementation update:
- Added global guardian daemon internal command (__guardian-daemon) with singleton state/lock, register/health/stop/lifecycle endpoints.
- start/codex/claude/restart now ensure guardian + register before main flow.
- stop-only daemon shutdown wired via stop command.
- restart path switched from direct SIGUSR2 to /daemon/restart endpoint + guardian lifecycle apply.
- stop command removed SIGTERM/SIGKILL fallback and now fails fast on graceful timeout.
- Verified with tests: npx jest tests/cli/start-command.spec.ts tests/cli/stop-command.spec.ts tests/cli/restart-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts --runInBand ; npx tsc --noEmit

title: Launcher lifecycle hardening: tmux self-exit only + server-ready probe stability
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- codex/claude launcher no longer reports server-offline when /health is reachable (including 0.0.0.0 host config).
- managed tmux lifecycle teardown uses self-exit path instead of kill-session in launcher shutdown/tool-exit flow.
- no pkill/killall/taskkill style mass-kill is introduced in launcher path.
- targeted cli tests cover the two regressions and pass.
notes: Evidence: npm test -- tests/cli/codex-command.spec.ts tests/cli/claude-command.spec.ts passed; npm run build:dev passed; routecodex codex --codex-path /bin/echo ping no longer prints false server-offline banner in this environment.
close_reason: Lifecycle hardened: tmux self-exit teardown + stable server-ready probe

title: bug(antigravity): 403 reauth should use camoufox auto + increase portal wait
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Antigravity upstream returns HTTP 403 with keywords like: "verify your account" / "validation_required" / "accounts.google.com/signin/continue".
2. RouteCodex detects it and triggers interactive OAuth repair.
3. Observe it does not use existing Camoufox auto flow, and portal readiness wait is too short under slow networks.

## Expected
- Interactive OAuth repair for Antigravity uses Camoufox auto flow (same as `routecodex oauth antigravity-auto ...`).
- Portal readiness wait is sufficiently long (300s) to tolerate slow startup/latency before opening browser.

## Actual
- Repair opens without auto-mode, and portal readiness check can time out quickly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- When `handleUpstreamInvalidOAuthToken()` triggers for provider `antigravity`, it sets Camoufox auto mode to `antigravity` for the duration of the repair call.
- OAuth portal readiness check timeout increases to 300 seconds (configurable via env), instead of ~3 seconds.
- Add unit test(s) for the new portal wait configuration and/or the env-scoped auto-mode behaviour.
- Run verification: `npm run verify:repo-sanity` + targeted jest (and ideally `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global`).

title: iflow OAuth auth-code flow 500 misclassified as busy + camoufox second-step selector instability
description:
Background:
- iFlow OAuth auth-code flow logs show token exchange 500 with body: 当前找我聊的人太多了，可以晚点再来问我哦。
- This is endpoint/contract behavior, not provider busy/health state.
- Camoufox automation also intermittently fails on post-continue account-step selector (accountItem).

Acceptance Criteria:
1) OAuth token exchange failure classification for iFlow 500 is precise (endpoint contract error), does not route into provider busy/cooldown semantics.
2) Camoufox iFlow auth sequence handles continue->account selection robustly (selector fallback/phase check), and logs clear phase-specific reason.
3) routecodex local verification includes: reproducible failing sample replay + one control provider oauth flow unaffected.
4) If local fix cannot be completed, add exact diff report against globally installed iflow-cli package behavior and pin root-cause hypothesis with file/line evidence.
notes: 2026-02-26: refresh/execute alignment patch: iFlow refresh failure no longer clears token file on transient endpoint failures (500/server busy). Token is cleared only for permanent refresh credential errors (invalid_grant/invalid_client/unauthorized_client/invalid_request refresh credentials). Added regression coverage in tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.iflow-refresh-align.spec.ts; targeted jest suite + npm run build:dev passed. CLI stable 0.5.14 vs beta 0.5.15-beta auth/refresh/retrieve anchors unchanged (legacy redirect+state embed; /chat/qaRetrieve; oauth/token).

## Scope

title: Qwen OAuth: stop reauth loop; add qwen-auto confirm click
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Server startup/build does not trigger interactive Qwen OAuth popups by default.
- On real request: attempt silent refresh; if refresh fails/invalid, trigger interactive OAuth flow and successfully writes token file.
- Qwen portal auto flow clicks Confirm button after portal redirect (Camoufox automation).
- Document: how to refresh vs reauth Qwen.
notes:
Started implementation: qwen auto confirm via Camoufox auto mode; reduce noisy refresh logs; skip token-daemon refresh for unconfigured providers. Pending full build:dev + install:global verification.
Evidence
- Auto repair env uses Camoufox + qwen auto mode: src/providers/auth/oauth-repair-env.ts
- Manual `routecodex oauth qwen-oauth-1-default.json` defaults to qwen Camoufox auto mode (Confirm button): src/token-daemon/index.ts
- Background token refresh skips unconfigured providers (override: ROUTECODEX_TOKEN_DAEMON_REFRESH_UNCONFIGURED=1): src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts
- Per-attempt refresh failures moved to debug logging to reduce noise: src/providers/core/strategies/oauth-device-flow.ts

Docs
- Updated docs/OAUTH.md with qwen auto default note + 403 cooldown + portal ready timeout envs

Verification
- npm run build:dev OK (includes install:global; routecodex --version = 0.89.1685)
close_reason: Qwen OAuth loop mitigations + qwen auto confirm wiring; verified

title: 修复 antigravity OAuth invalid_client（缺省 client 配置）
description: 用户在 antigravity auto/manual refresh 中出现 repeated OAuth error: invalid_client + fetchGeminiCLIUserInfo 401。根因是 antigravity OAuth client 缺省值为 *_NOT_SET，占位符被用于 token refresh。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 未设置 ROUTECODEX_ANTIGRAVITY_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET 时，antigravity OAuth 默认 client 不再是 *_NOT_SET 占位符；2) antigravity OAuth 配置单测覆盖默认 client 回退行为；3) 复现路径不再出现 invalid_client（本地验证至少覆盖配置与单测）
notes: Root cause verified: env had no ROUTECODEX_ANTIGRAVITY_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET; provider-oauth-configs fallback used *_NOT_SET placeholders, causing OAuth invalid_client and follow-up 401 metadata fetch. Fix: src/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.ts now defaults antigravity clientId/clientSecret to Antigravity-Manager values when env absent. Added regression test: tests/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.antigravity.spec.ts. Validation: 1) npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.iflow.spec.ts tests/providers/core/config/provider-oauth-configs.antigravity.spec.ts (PASS); 2) npm run build:dev (PASS); 3) runtime check via dist ensureValidOAuthToken openBrowser=false on aliases geetasamodgeetasamoda/jasonqueque/antonsoltan/xfour8605 all returned ok (no invalid_client/401).
close_reason: antigravity OAuth default client fallback fixed and validated across all aliases

title: 修复 gemini-cli OAuth invalid_client（缺省 client 配置）
description: 用户反馈 gemini-cli alias 刷新 401；本地复现为 OAuth error: invalid_client。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 未设置 ROUTECODEX_GEMINI_CLI_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET 时，gemini-cli OAuth 默认 client 不再是 *_NOT_SET 占位符；2) 覆盖 gemini-cli 默认 client 回退单测；3) ensureValidOAuthToken('gemini-cli') 不再报 invalid_client
notes:
Initial gemini-cli fix removed invalid_client but then hit unauthorized_client, so we refined the approach: provider-oauth-configs now reads OAuth client credentials from env vars first, then local private file (~/.routecodex/auth/oauth-clients.local.json), and finally placeholder defaults. Tests and runtime validation passed (jest config specs + build:dev + ensureValidOAuthToken for gemini-cli alias).
2026-02-27 新观测：刷新阶段出现 Token refresh attempt N failed: fetch failed，随后 Gemini CLI failed to fetch UserInfo: fetch failed。计划修复：补齐 OAuth 网络错误细化（展开 fetch cause）并为 Gemini UserInfo/Projects 增加短重试，减少瞬时网络抖动导致失败。
2026-02-27 修复完成：
1) 新增 OAuth 错误格式化器 src/providers/auth/oauth-error-message.ts，展开 fetch cause（code/hostname/syscall 等），避免只显示 fetch failed。
2) oauth-auth-code-flow.ts 与 oauth-device-flow.ts 的 refresh 重试日志改为使用详细错误信息。
3) oauth-lifecycle.ts 中 qwen/iflow/antigravity/gemini-cli enrich 失败日志改为详细错误信息。
4) gemini-cli-userinfo-helper.ts 增加 UserInfo/Projects 请求超时 + 短重试（网络抖动和 5xx/429/408 可重试），并保留非认证错误回退语义。
5) 测试：npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-error-message.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/gemini-cli-userinfo-helper.spec.ts tests/providers/core/oauth-refresh-permanent-errors.spec.ts tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts -> 4 suites passed / 12 tests passed。

title: routecodex-244: native 化模块覆盖率提升到 95%+
description:
## Context
在 routecodex-244 Rust/native 化收口阶段，当前任务只要求 smoke/coverage 全绿，但没有对 native 化模块设置统一覆盖率阈值。为避免“全绿但薄覆盖”，需要把 native 化模块测试覆盖率统一提升到 95%+ 并形成可复验输出。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 明确 native 化模块清单与对应测试入口（含文件路径）
- [ ] 为清单内每个模块补齐单测/集成测，行覆盖率与分支覆盖率均 >= 95%
- [ ] 产出覆盖率报告（命令、摘要、证据路径）并写入 issue notes
- [ ] 增加回归保护：CI/脚本中对 native 模块覆盖率阈值设置为 95%（失败即阻断）
- [ ] 至少完成 1 个同形态 replay + 1 个对照 replay，验证补测未引入行为回归
notes:
2026-02-27: 接收新目标，先建立 95% 覆盖率基线并锁定低于阈值模块，再按模块补测。
2026-02-27 覆盖率基线核查：
1) 在 /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/llmswitch-core 读取 package.json 中全部 verify:shadow-gate:* 脚本（50个），按每个脚本绑定的 summary + module 与 config/rust-migration-modules.json 阈值比对，结果 pass=50, fail=0, missingSummary=0。
2) 抽样重跑 npm run verify:shadow-gate:hub-native-batch（会重建 dist + 重新产出覆盖率）：PASS，module=hub.native-batch.adapters-snapshot-governance lines=100.00%, branches=96.69%。
3) 结论：当前 native 模块的模块级 shadow gate 覆盖率门槛已为 line/branch >=95，且现有模块报告均满足阈值。后续需要补齐 CI 一键汇总校验，避免仅依赖单模块脚本。
2026-02-27 覆盖率基线核查（格式化）:
1) 在 /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/llmswitch-core 读取 package.json 中全部 verify:shadow-gate:* 脚本（50 个），按每个脚本绑定的 summary + module 与 config/rust-migration-modules.json 阈值比对，结果 pass=50, fail=0, missingSummary=0。
2) 抽样重跑 npm run verify:shadow-gate:hub-native-batch（会重建 dist + 重新产出覆盖率）：PASS，module=hub.native-batch.adapters-snapshot-governance lines=100.00%, branches=96.69%。
3) 结论：当前 native 模块的模块级 shadow gate 覆盖率门槛已为 line/branch >=95，且现有模块报告均满足阈值。
4) 缺口：仍需补齐“CI 一键汇总校验 + replay 证据”后再关闭 routecodex-244.9。
2026-02-27 收尾验证（native 覆盖率>=95）:
1) 统一阻断脚本已落地（llmswitch-core）：新增 scripts/verify-shadow-gate-all.mjs；package.json 新增 verify:shadow-gate:all；run-ci-coverage.mjs 已接入 shadow-gate 全量校验，并支持 LLMS_SHADOW_GATE_FILTER 定向烟测。
2) 关键失败模块已完成根因修复并补测（非回退）：
   - hub.resp-inbound.format-parse（协议矩阵+兜底分支）
   - hub.resp-outbound.chat-process-semantics-bridge（direct candidate 分支）
   - virtual-router.hotpath.quota-buckets（source 语义对齐 unavailable）
   - virtual-router.stop-message-parser（file:// 分支 + 默认 maxRepeats + 非 Error throw）
   - virtual-router.tier-selection-integration（native mock 补 parseProviderKeyJson）
   - hub.chat-process.governance-context（native mock 预期对齐）
   - hub.chat-process.media-attachments（引用相等改结构相等断言）
3) 全链 shadow-gate 结果：
   - node scripts/verify-shadow-gate-all.mjs（初跑定位到治理/媒体脚本断言老化，已修）
   - node scripts/verify-shadow-gate-all.mjs --from verify:shadow-gate:hub-chat-process-media -> PASS（覆盖余下 32 脚本直至结尾）
   - 最新终态：shadow-gate-all PASS，所有 native 模块行/分支阈值均满足 >=95。
4) replay/control 回放：
   - node scripts/tests/compat-iflow-reasoning-replay-20260206.mjs -> ok（afterIflowMissing=0）
   - node scripts/tests/chat-golden-roundtrip.mjs -> PASS
5) 结论：routecodex-244.9 验收项已满足，可解除对 routecodex-244.8 的阻塞。
close_reason: native 模块 shadow-gate 全链达成 line/branch >=95%，并完成 replay/control 回放验证

title: Refactor virtual router/engine into sub-500-line modules
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- virtual-router engine sources are split into modules with each file under 500 LOC.
- Engine public API/behavior preserved (no routing changes; no model id changes).
- New modules reuse shared helpers and composition; no duplicated logic.
- Tests pass: npm -C sharedmodule/llmswitch-core run build and npm run test:ci:jest.

title: Responses SSE tolerant of reasoning items without content
description: When a responses reasoning output item lacks a content array, SSE conversion throws and the client sees 'stream closed before response.completed'. Fix SSE conversion to tolerate missing reasoning.content and ensure response.completed/response.done are emitted.
acceptance_criteria: Given a Responses response with a reasoning output item that has summary but no content array, convertJsonToSse completes without error and emits response.completed + response.done.
notes: Evidence: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/json-to-sse/event-generators/responses.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/test/responses-converter.test.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/shared/reasoning-normalizer.ts. Tests: npm run build in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core (Matrix passed, report /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/matrix-ci-1772294374535.json). Build/install: npm run build:dev in routecodex (includes install:global). Commit: 69478f8.
close_reason: Fix Responses SSE when reasoning.content missing; add regression test; preserve reasoning_content in normalizer

title: Responses reasoning encrypted_content should survive SSE + bridge
description: Codex samples show responses reasoning items lose encrypted_content during SSE->JSON and outbound remap; reasoning content collapses to summary only. Preserve encrypted_content in response builder and merge, and carry through output_item.added in JSON->SSE.
acceptance_criteria: Given provider SSE with reasoning output_item containing encrypted_content and summary, the final client responses payload preserves encrypted_content (and summary unchanged) in output reasoning items.
notes: close bug after child close + regression verification: encrypted reasoning content preservation path remains green in responses-openai-bridge regression suite; native tool-harvest anthropic regression passed.

title: Reasoning-only -> content for tool harvest (native)
description: Move reasoning-only assistant output into message.content before tool harvest; no tags; keep reasoning SSOT; Rust-only change in resp_process_stage1_tool_governance
notes: heartbeat closeout: reasoning-only->content for tool harvest path revalidated on current branch. evidence: tests/responses/responses-openai-bridge.spec.ts (includes reasoning.encrypted_content retention and roundtrip assertions) + scripts/tests/native-resp-tool-harvest-anthropic-regression.mjs passed.

title: Fix Responses SSE reasoning summary mapping
description:
Problem: Responses SSE conversion drops reasoning summary events/fields; Codex UI sees no reasoning.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Responses SSE -> JSON preserves reasoning summary indices and text even when summary_index is only signaled via summary_part.added.
- JSON -> SSE emits response.reasoning_summary_part.added/response.reasoning_summary_text.delta/done/response.reasoning_summary_part.done for each summary entry.
- Reasoning summary events are present in outbound SSE for codex-samples replay (no empty reasoning UI).

title: bug(oauth): interactive reauth must not block requests
description:
## Problem\nWhen upstream triggers interactive OAuth (e.g. antigravity 403 verify account), the provider layer blocks the in-flight request waiting up to 10 minutes for localhost callback. This prevents Virtual Router failover and breaks streaming sessions.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- In provider request path, interactive OAuth reauth never blocks the current request.\n- Attempt silent refresh first; if still invalid or google verify required, start interactive OAuth in background (Camoufox auto env) with cooldown guard.\n- Request returns promptly so Virtual Router can failover.\n- Add unit tests for non-blocking behavior.\n- Verify with 
> routecodex@0.89.1686 build:dev
> bash -lc 'export BUILD_MODE=dev; npm run build && npm run test:unified-hub-shadow && npm run verify:e2e-toolcall && npm run verify:apply-patch && npm run verify:apply-patch-regressions && npm run verify:exec-command && npm run test:routing-instructions && npm run test:cli && npm run install:global && npm run mock:regressions && npm run test:blackbox-antigravity-parity && npm run verify:errorsamples && npm run verify:e2e-gemini-followup-sample'


> routecodex@0.89.1686 prebuild
> npm run verify:repo-sanity && echo skip-lint


> routecodex@0.89.1686 verify:repo-sanity
> node scripts/ci/repo-sanity.mjs + global install.\n
notes:
Evidence
- Non-blocking interactive OAuth repair for provider requests: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts
- Provider runtime now calls non-blocking path: src/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.ts
- Tests: tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.nonblocking-repair.spec.ts

Verification
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.nonblocking-repair.spec.ts → PASS
- npm run build:dev → OK (includes install:global + blackbox)
close_reason: Interactive OAuth repair runs in background; requests fail fast for failover; verified

title: 移除非法 fallback，改为 fail fast 并补齐错误上报
description:
## 目标
审计并修复项目中的 fallback 实现，按语义分类处理：
- **P0 - 必须 Fail Fast**: 伪造关键字段、改变业务语义、静默吞错
- **P1 - 需评估**: 可能改变语义，需人工确认后处理
- **P2 - 允许保留**: 类型转换/默认值/路径解析等，补日志和注释

## 验收标准
- 所有 P0 fallback 改为 fail fast，通过 providerErrorCenter/errorHandlingCenter 上报
- 每个修改有对应回归测试覆盖 fail-fast 行为
- P2 fallback 补充结构化日志和注释说明
- npm run build (sharedmodule) 和 npm run build:dev (host) 验证通过

title: Quota backoff only on repeated same error; skip network errors; fill missing code
description: Users observed all keys entering cooldown simultaneously with missing error codes. Need to ensure backoff only triggers on repeated same error per key, network errors never trigger cooldown, and missing codes are populated from HTTP status for quota/debug.
notes:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Network errors do not set cooldown in quota state.
- Cooldown only starts when the same error code repeats for the same providerKey within chain window; first occurrence does not trigger cooldown.
- Quota event code falls back to HTTP status when error code is missing, and error responses include a non-empty code.

title: Quota daemon refresh only for configured providers
description: Filter antigravity quota background refresh so it only updates providers configured in config.json; skip unconfigured providers to avoid unnecessary upstream calls.
acceptance_criteria:
- Antigravity quota refresh only calls upstream for aliases that have configured providers in config.json (registered provider static config).
- When no configured antigravity providers exist, refreshNow/start performs zero upstream quota fetches.
- Existing refresh tests updated or new test added to cover the filtered behavior.
notes:
Implementation: filter antigravity quota refresh by registered provider aliases (config-driven) via allowedAliases in antigravity-quota-sync + antigravity-quota-manager.

title: bug(token-daemon): qwen refresh failure must be non-blocking + non-noisy
description:
## Problem
Qwen refresh_token invalid triggers auto-refresh failure logs during server runtime. Even though it is background, it should never be perceived as blocking or stopping the server, and it should not spam 'Auto-refresh failed...' after we already mark token as permanently invalid.

## Acceptance Criteria
- On permanent refresh failure (invalid_request refresh token/client_id etc), token-daemon auto-suspends and does not emit loud error logs each tick.
- Server traffic and provider requests remain unaffected (no blocking).
- Keep existing behavior: reauth is triggered only by real requests / explicit commands.
- Add/adjust tests as needed.
notes:
Evidence
- TokenDaemon suppresses loud error logs on permanent refresh failure / user timeout; auto-suspend still applies: src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts

Tests
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/token-daemon/token-daemon.auto-refresh-noninteractive.spec.ts → PASS
close_reason: Suppress permanent refresh failure spam; auto-suspend token; non-blocking

title: Epic: 语义单一真源收敛与重复状态清理
description:
目标：清理 llmswitch-core / RouteCodex 中同一业务语义被多处状态或多条流程重复承载的问题，收敛到单一真源，减少双写、漂移和历史残留。

范围：
- chat_process canonical messages vs responses context input
- responsesResume 多重承载
- capturedChatRequest 多副本
- stopMessage/preCommand 状态镜像
- processMode/routeHint 多载体
- applyPatchToolMode 多载体
- tool_choice/parallel_tool_calls 多来源合并
- hasImageAttachment 重复缓存
- legacy/router archive 清理

验收标准：
- 每项语义明确唯一可变真源，其他表示仅为只读派生
- 删除或停用 legacy metadata 副本注入路径
- 为每项收敛补充最小回归，覆盖真实 provider 出站形状
- `view_image` / 历史图片 / 历史 visual tool output 不再在后续 provider 请求中残留 inline base64
- Epic 下所有子任务以可复验 request/sample 关闭
notes:
Memory sources:
- MEMORY.md
- memory/2026-03-08-semantic-unification-history-media.md

Initial duplication inventory:
- messages vs semantics.responses.context.input
- responsesResume multi-carrier
- capturedChatRequest multi-copy
- stopMessage/preCommand mirrored runtime state
- processMode / routeHint multi-carrier
- applyPatchToolMode multi-carrier
- tool_choice / parallel_tool_calls multi-source merge
- hasImageAttachment duplicated cache

Current verified fix:
- history user media + history view_image visual tool outputs now scrubbed to [Image omitted] on canonical chat_process path
- responsesContext legacy snapshot no longer injected into provider payload metadata on req_outbound stage1 semantic map
- local reproductions verified for responses target and anthropic:claude-code target

title: Transport: AI SDK OpenAI transport must not force developer system role on compatible providers
description:
## Summary
`vercel-ai-sdk` OpenAI transport currently sets `providerOptions.openai.systemMessageMode = "developer"` whenever the canonical request contains a developer message. This causes upstream 400s on openai-compatible providers such as `ark-coding-plan.kimi-k2.5`, which only accept `system|assistant|user|tool`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- OpenAI SDK transport no longer forces developer role by default.
- Canonical `developer` messages continue to be flattened into prompt `system` content on transport path.
- Add regression covering the failing transport shape.
- Verify same-shape replay/failing sample no longer emits `messages.role=developer` upstream.
notes:
Follow-up 2026-03-08:
- Initial removal of explicit `systemMessageMode=developer` was insufficient.
- Local reproduction against the failing `ark-coding-plan.key1.doubao-seed-2.0-pro` sample showed AI SDK `OpenAIChatLanguageModel.getArgs()` still serialized prompt system content as `messages.role=developer` by default.
- Final fix: force `providerOptions.openai.systemMessageMode = "system"` in `buildOpenAiSdkChatCallOptions`.
- After rebuild, local reconstruction of the exact sample now yields `messages` roles without any `developer`.
- Rebuilt + global installed + restarted managed 5555 server.

title: review: 强制 reviewer 按请求真实核验代码后再给建议
description:
## Background
当前 `review` 流程可生成建议，但没有强制 reviewer 按用户请求对代码进行“真实核验”（例如：按请求定位文件、核对实际实现、执行必要验证），导致建议可能脱离实际代码状态。

## Goal
把 `review` 流程改为“先核验再建议”：review 输出必须绑定真实代码检查证据，再给建议。

## Scope
- servertool review flow（`review_flow`）
- reviewer prompt / orchestration contract
- review 结果结构化输出与证据字段
- 对应测试与回归

## Acceptance Criteria
- reviewer 在 review 执行时必须包含“按请求核验代码”的步骤，不能只给通用建议。
- review 输出必须包含可复核证据（至少：文件路径/关键片段/检查结论）。
- 若请求要求运行验证（测试/构建/命令），review 必须明确执行或显式报告未执行原因。
- 增加回归测试：覆盖“仅建议无核验”的失败样例，确保新逻辑可拦截。
- 文档更新：明确 review 是“核验 + 建议”，不是“纯建议”。
notes:
Implemented review verification-hardening (in progress):
- review fallback prompt now requires request-scoped code verification before suggestions (file/test/command evidence).
- ai-followup prompt adds mandatory evidence traceability: verify first, suggestion second; behavior changes require test/command evidence or explicit unexecuted reason.
- review tool description updated to require request-scoped verification.
- docs/stop-message-auto.md updated with real verification requirement.
- Tests passed: test-results/routecodex-272/jest-root-20260322-173220.log and test-results/routecodex-272/jest-shared-20260322-173220.log.
close_reason: Enforced review real-verification requirement: request-scoped code verification before suggestions in review fallback + ai-followup prompt; added evidence-traceability constraints; updated review tool description and stop-message-auto docs; regression tests passed (see test-results/routecodex-272 logs).

title: Provider runtime deepseek-web.* not found in /v1/responses (virtual-router longcontext/tools-primary)
description:
现象（2026-03-22 19:22 local）:
- /v1/responses 连续失败，报错: Provider runtime deepseek-web.1/.2/.3 not found
- 对应 virtual-router-hit 显示 longcontext/tools-primary 命中 deepseek-web.* 路由

日志片段:
- openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260322T192253864-29026-5430 failed: Provider runtime deepseek-web.2 not found
- openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260322T192254815-29028-5432 failed: Provider runtime deepseek-web.1 not found
- openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260322T192255907-29029-5433 failed: Provider runtime deepseek-web.3 not found

目标:
1) 定位 deepseek-web.* runtime 在 provider registry / runtime resolver / virtual-router 映射链路缺失点
2) 修复后验证 /v1/responses 不再出现 runtime not found
3) 补充最小回归（路由命中 deepseek-web.* 时 provider runtime 可解析）
notes:
2026-03-22 19:34 +08 复核：从 ~/.rcc/logs/server-5555.log 可见同时间窗 longcontext 连续命中 deepseek-web.1/.2/.3，均报 Provider runtime deepseek-web.* not found；随后新请求可命中 crs.* 成功。结论：该故障层是 runtime/registry 缺失（非上游HTTP 502），且发生时 deepseek-web 三个 alias 均不可用。证据：test-results/routecodex-275/incident-runtime-missing-snippet-20260322-1934.log
2026-03-22 19:39 +08 live check：对 /v1/responses 连发 6 次（x-route-hint=longcontext）结果 5 次 502（ERR_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND: deepseek-web.1/.2/.3），1 次 200 且命中 crs fallback。说明 deepseek-web 当前不可用；fallback 可部分兜底。证据：test-results/routecodex-275/deepseek-availability-authcheck-20260322-193943.log 与 test-results/routecodex-275/deepseek-availability-serverlog-20260322-193943.log
2026-03-22 20:03 +08 root-cause confirmed by provider code + live probe: runtime profiles carried deepseek tokenFile under ~/.routecodex/auth, while valid tokens exist under ~/.rcc/auth only. resolveRuntimeAuth(deepseek-account) previously passed legacy tokenFile through unchanged, causing provider init to miss valid token and later runtime handle resolution failures (ERR_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND). Fix: add deepseek tokenFile compat remap in src/server/runtime/http-server/http-server-runtime-providers.ts (legacy->rcc when legacy missing/unusable and rcc file has usable token). Added regression tests in tests/server/http-server/runtime-auth-normalization.spec.ts. Post-fix live probe 6/6 longcontext requests hit deepseek-web.* with HTTP 200 and no runtime-not-found log. Evidence: test-results/routecodex-275/jest-runtime-auth-and-failover-20260322-2011.log ; test-results/routecodex-275/build-dev-deepseek-compat-20260322-2012.log ; test-results/routecodex-275/deepseek-availability-after-fix-20260322-2012.log
close_reason: fixed: deepseek legacy tokenFile path compatibility remap + regression + live 6/6 deepseek success

title: Failover for provider runtime-missing / upstream 502 should not leak to client when pool has fallback
description:
背景（2026-03-22）:
- 用户反馈两层问题：
  1) deepseek 路由失败时需先判定是否整组 provider 不可用；
  2) 单 provider 502 不应直接回客户端，应在同请求内切换下一候选 provider，控制台记录。

验收标准:
1) 当 selected provider runtime resolve 失败（ERR_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND/ERR_RUNTIME_NOT_FOUND）且路由池有候选时，同请求内自动 failover。
2) 当上游返回 502（或其他 retryable 5xx）且路由池有候选时，同请求内自动 failover，不把首个 5xx 直接回给客户端。
3) 无候选/重试耗尽时，仍按现有错误映射返回客户端（不做静默吞错）。
4) 补充回归测试：runtime-missing failover + converted 502 failover。
notes:
2026-03-22 19:34 +08 已实现最小修复：1) request-executor 在 provider.runtime_resolve/context 阶段失败时走同请求 retry/failover（不再直接抛给客户端）；2) converted upstream status 将 502/5xx（含408/425）纳入 retryable 并走 failover。新增回归：tests/server/http-server/execute-pipeline-failover.spec.ts 两条用例（runtime-missing failover、converted 502 failover）。定向验证通过：test-results/routecodex-275/jest-execute-pipeline-failover-20260322-1934.log
2026-03-22 20:03 +08 continued closure validation: failover fix remains green (runtime_resolve failover + converted 502 failover) and deepseek runtime availability repaired in same chain. Verification: jest runTestsByPath runtime-auth-normalization + execute-pipeline-failover passed (11/11). build:dev completed with managed restart (version 0.90.726). Post-restart live longcontext probes routed to deepseek-web.1/.2/.3 all succeeded (6/6 HTTP 200), proving runtime-missing layer resolved and retry/failover path not leaking first failure. Evidence: test-results/routecodex-275/jest-runtime-auth-and-failover-20260322-2011.log ; test-results/routecodex-275/build-dev-deepseek-compat-20260322-2012.log ; test-results/routecodex-275/deepseek-availability-after-fix-20260322-2012.log
close_reason: fixed: runtime-missing/502 failover + deepseek runtime recovery verified by tests and live probe

title: Epic: llmswitch-core 全量 Rust 化收口（TS 功能清零）
description:
目标：将 llmswitch-core 运行时语义从 TS 彻底收口到 Rust（router-hotpath-napi 为真源），TS 仅保留最小 N-API 装载与类型薄封装，不承载业务语义。

扫描基线（2026-03-23）：
- 生产 TS：600 文件 / 97,146 LOC
- 其中 non-native 主要残量：router 14,828 LOC、conversion 7,566 LOC、servertool 16,510 LOC、sse 13,347 LOC、tools 3,361 LOC、quota 892 LOC。
- rust-core 当前仅 1 个 crate（router-hotpath-napi），约 77,745 LOC。

约束：
1) 不新增 TS 语义功能；新增语义一律 Rust。
2) 兼容优先：shape-first，不按命令特判。
3) fail-fast，不做静默 fallback。
acceptance_criteria: 1) llmswitch-core 运行语义真源均在 Rust；2) TS 层仅保留薄壳/绑定，不含决策语义；3) 提供迁移矩阵与回放证据（errorsamples + control replay）；4) build:dev + install:global + install:release 通过；5) 关键回归（tool-calling/apply_patch/sse/servertool）全绿。

title: Epic: 安全硬化与硬编码风险修复（Provider路径/密钥脱敏/鉴权边界/依赖漏洞）
description:
来源：本轮硬编码与风险扫描。目标：以最小语义改动消除高风险项，补齐检测与回归，避免再次引入。

范围：
1) daemon-admin providerId/path 参数校验与目录越界防护；
2) mock/capture 与样本文件全链路敏感信息脱敏；
3) 本地与管理面鉴权边界收敛（默认安全）；
4) DeepSeek token 文件禁止落盘 password；
5) runtime 依赖漏洞修复（axios/path-to-regexp/socket.io-parser/qs/ajv）与安全门禁恢复。

交付要求：每个子任务必须附带可复现实验、回归样本或测试；不得通过降级功能掩盖问题。
acceptance_criteria:
- 高风险项全部关闭并有回归
- secrets check 在 CI 恢复为强校验
- providerId/path 越界攻击用例被阻断
- token 文件不再保存 password
- npm audit 运行时高危为 0（至少本仓）
close_reason: 五个子任务已全部完成并闭环：W1 providerId/path traversal 防护+回归；W2 写盘脱敏链路 + 样本扫描 + secret pattern 扩展；W3 daemon-admin 默认鉴权收敛 + 本地绕过显式开关 + 未鉴权 e2e；W4 DeepSeek token 回写禁存 password；W5 secrets gate 恢复 + 运行时依赖漏洞收敛（npm audit --omit dev --audit-level high 为 0）。

acceptance_criteria: - 运行时高危依赖降至 0（含 overrides）\n- package.json 中 secrets:check 不再是占位 echo\n- CI 默认执行安全检查并阻断

close_reason: 已恢复安全门禁并收敛运行时漏洞：1) secrets:check 从占位 echo 恢复为 scripts/ci/secrets-check.mjs 强校验；2) prebuild 仍默认执行 verify:repo-sanity（含 secret 扫描）；3) 依赖升级/override：axios->1.14.0, ajv->8.18.0, path-to-regexp->0.1.13, qs->6.15.0, socket.io-parser->4.2.6；4) 验证 npm audit --omit dev --audit-level high => found 0 vulnerabilities。

title: Qwen OAuth: refresh失败不阻塞/不弹窗 + tokenFile 对齐
description:
Problem
- Qwen token refresh returns invalid_request (Invalid refresh token or client_id) and causes repeated auth attempts/log spam during server start/build.
- tokenFile resolution differs across subsystems (daemon/auth repair), making behavior inconsistent.

Acceptance Criteria
- Qwen refresh permanent failure never blocks server startup or request routing.
- Background refresh does not repeatedly print "Auto-refresh failed" or trigger interactive OAuth.
- Interactive OAuth repair is rate-limited (>=30min cooldown) per provider+tokenFile.
- Qwen tokenFile="default" consistently resolves to ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-1-default.json when present.
- Documentation updated (docs/OAUTH.md referenced from README).

Evidence
- Commands: npm run build:dev; npm run install:global
- Logs show no repeated qwen auth popup during build; no fatal errors.
notes:
- Evidence
  - Commit: 5f97027b7
  - Verified: `npm run build:dev` (includes `npm run install:global`) succeeded on 2026-02-04
  - Files: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts, src/providers/auth/oauth-repair-cooldown.ts, src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts, docs/OAUTH.md

- Result
  - Qwen tokenFile="default" now consistently resolves to ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-1-default.json when present.
  - Interactive OAuth repair cooldown default set to 30m to prevent repeated reauth loops.
  - Token daemon suppresses permanent refresh failure spam and best-effort marks token file as noRefresh to stop repeated retries.

title: Epic: WebSearch 双路径对齐（自动触发 + 工具调用）
description: 对齐 qwen cli 的 websearch 行为，实现双路径：1) 自动触发（关键词命中→自动搜索→注入 system message + 工具定义）2) LLM 主动调用 websearch 工具（支持多次搜索）。两条路径统一走 servertool web-search handler。

title: Epic: 全局错误处理收口（Virtual Router 唯一策略真源）
description:
## Context
当前错误处理职责分散在多个层：
- `HubPipeline` 主要负责编排与向上抛错
- `Virtual Router` 已掌握配置/选路/健康/cooldown/quota 等未来路由状态
- `RequestExecutor` 当前混入了大量 retry/reroute/backoff/fail 决策
- 现有 `error-handling center` 与 `providerErrorCenter` 语义未收口
- `servertool engine` followup 又额外包了一层 `SERVERTOOL_FOLLOWUP_FAILED`

现象已经在线上暴露：
- followup 与普通请求没有共用唯一错误处理方案
- followup 会绕过统一流控（`bypassTrafficGovernor`）
- provider-switch 日志出现 `6/6 -> 7/6` 这类越界假下一跳
- 429 / fetch failed / SSE decode 等 recoverable 错误没有收敛到单一决策中心
- 已存在的 error-handling center 与 Router / Executor 的职责重叠，继续叠加会形成第二套中心

## Goal
把**执行期错误策略真源**统一收口到 **Virtual Router**，并把现有 `error-handling center` 合并进去，避免多中心并存。

## Target Architecture
- `Virtual Router`：唯一错误策略真源
  - classify error
  - decide retry/reroute/backoff/fail
  - manage cooldown/health/quota/exclusion policy
  - 输出统一 error decision / error plan
- `RequestExecutor`：只消费 Router 输出的 decision plan 并执行
- `servertool engine`：只处理 followup 编排前/internal 错误；凡是 provider/runtime/send/convert 类错误都进入同一 Router policy
- `HubPipeline`：只编排，不定义最终错误策略

## Scope
1. 梳理并固化 `HubPipeline -> Virtual Router -> RequestExecutor -> Provider Runtime -> Servertool Followup` 的错误流转图
2. 合并现有 `error-handling center` 与 Router 错误策略中心，避免重复中心
3. 在 `Virtual Router` / Rust hotpath 定义统一错误决策输出（error decision / plan）
4. 让 `RequestExecutor` 改为 consumer，不再自带另一套 retry/reroute/backoff 语义
5. 让 `servertool followup` 也接入同一套 Router policy；仅保留编排前/internal error 的边界处理

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 输出并落盘一版全局错误流转图，明确 HubPipeline / Virtual Router / RequestExecutor / Servertool 各自唯一职责
- [ ] 现有 `error-handling center` 合并进 `Virtual Router` 错误策略真源，不再保留重复中心
- [ ] `Virtual Router` 成为普通请求与 followup 共用的唯一执行期错误策略真源
- [ ] `RequestExecutor` 改为消费 Router 的 error decision / plan，不再独立定义另一套 retry/reroute/backoff/fail 语义
- [ ] followup 不再绕过统一 provider traffic governor
- [ ] provider-switch 日志不再出现 `attempt=max -> next=max+1` 这类越界假下一跳
- [ ] `SERVERTOOL_FOLLOWUP_FAILED` 仅保留编排失败语义，不再吞并 provider 执行期错误决策
- [ ] 至少补 1 组 reasoning_stop_guard followup 回归，覆盖 recoverable provider error 场景
- [ ] build:min + install:global + restart 后，用真实日志证明 followup 与普通请求共用同一套 Router error policy

## Initial Work Breakdown
- W1: 现状梳理与错误流转图
- W2: 合并 error-handling center 到 Virtual Router policy
- W3: 定义 Router error decision / plan 输出
- W4: RequestExecutor / Servertool 接入与日志回归
acceptance_criteria: Virtual Router 成为普通请求与 followup 共用的唯一执行期错误策略真源；现有 error-handling center 合并进 Router policy；RequestExecutor/Servertool 只消费同一套 decision；不再出现 7/6 越界日志；build/install/restart + 真实日志验证通过
notes:
2026-04-15 决策收口：不保留独立 error-handling center，也不保留独立 event engine。 这类 event bus 只会制造第二中心且无策略价值，方案改为直接移除；所有 provider error/success ingress 直接并入 Virtual Router policy 真源，由 Router 统一产出 error decision / policy state，RequestExecutor 与 Servertool 只消费同一套输出。
2026-04-15 已完成前置落盘：更新 MEMORY.md、docs/error-handling-v2.md、docs/agent-routing/10-runtime-ssot-routing.md，并补充本地 rcc-dev-skills 精华。Epic 由 Codex 领取，下一步直接进入实现：删除独立 error-handling center / event bus，收口到 Virtual Router policy 真源。
2026-04-15 实现进展：已删除 llmswitch-core 的 provider error/success center，新增 router/virtual-router/provider-runtime-ingress 作为直连 Router policy ingress（无 subscribe/emit bus）；HubPipeline 直接注册 active router hooks；sticky-session-store、routing-state/store、deepseek-web-response 改为直报 Router policy；bridge/runtime-integrations 改为暴露 reportProviderErrorToRouterPolicy / reportProviderSuccessToRouterPolicy / setProviderRuntimeQuotaHooks / setProviderRuntimeProviderQuotaHooks；host provider-error-reporter 已移除 errorHandlingCenter fallback，不再保留 provider 第二中心语义；quota manager / provider quota daemon 已接入统一 ingress。验证：build-core+vendor-core 通过，build:min 通过；回归通过 tests/sharedmodule/provider-runtime-ingress.spec.ts、tests/sharedmodule/sticky-session-store-observability.spec.ts、tests/sharedmodule/routing-state-store-observability.spec.ts、tests/provider/provider-composite-guards.test.ts、tests/server/http-server/hub-policy-injection.spec.ts、tests/server/http-server/quota-view-injection.spec.ts，以及 provider-quota-daemon-module 中两条覆盖新 ingress 主路径的用例。

title: Epic: 静默失败治理（typed probe + observable best-effort）
description:
## 背景
本项目 runtime/CLI/daemon/virtual-router 仍存在一批“静默失败”模式：底层异常被统一塌缩成 `false/null/offline/default`，或者 state write/cleanup 失败被吞掉，导致主链继续但现场丢失，排障只能看到表层症状。

## 目标
把高风险静默失败统一整改为：**non-blocking + observable + typed outcome**。

## 范围
- guardian / restart / start / port-utils / token-daemon server probe
- cooldown / leader-lock / pending-tool-sync 等状态持久化与清理
- provider success/listener 与 registry/config fallback 的可观测性
- 必要的回归测试与门禁
acceptance_criteria:
1) 健康探测/重启/guardian 不再把 fetch/json/auth/status 错误统一塌缩成裸 `false/null`；调用方可区分 timeout/network/auth/bad-json/bad-status。
2) cooldown/leader-lock/pending-tool-sync 等 best-effort 状态写失败至少具备节流后的结构化非阻断日志，包含 operation + key/sessionId/providerKey/filepath。
3) listener/config fallback 等“主链继续但语义可能漂移”的路径具备显式可观测性，不再无声回退默认行为。
4) 为上述整改补充最小回归测试/验证脚本，并给出可复现证据。
notes:
Epic closeout summary

Delivered
- W1 typed health probes: replaced boolean/null collapse in health/restart/guardian detection with typed probe results and targeted tests.
- W2 observable best-effort state: cooldown-manager / leader-lock / pending-tool-sync now emit throttled non-blocking warnings with stage + operation + key/sessionId/filepath.
- W3 explicit listener/config fallback causes: success-center, provider-registry, and token-daemon server-utils now surface listener failures, config load failures, and fallback causes instead of silent collapse.
- W4 guardrail: silent-failure audit now covers catch {}, catch return null/false, and .catch(() => null/false); regression tests + MEMORY/skill evidence updated.

Validation evidence
- W1 targeted jest + typecheck + restart smoke passed.
- W2 targeted jest (3 suites / 5 tests) + typecheck passed.
- W3 targeted jest (3 suites / 5 tests) + typecheck passed.
- W4 targeted jest (1 suite / 2 tests) + typecheck passed.

Current inventory snapshot
- node scripts/ci/silent-failure-audit.mjs --json => catchRisk=711, promiseCatchRisk=31 (historical repo-wide debt remains outside this hotspot slice).
close_reason: Completed the planned silent-failure remediation slice (W1-W4) with tests, audit guardrail, and evidence recorded.

title: W1: 健康探测与重启链路去 boolean/null 塌缩
acceptance_criteria:
1) guardian/restart/start/port-utils/token-daemon server 探测统一输出 typed result，而不是裸 boolean/null。
2) 能区分至少：timeout/network_error/auth_error/bad_status/bad_json/not_routecodex。
3) 首批调用点完成接线并保留非阻断语义。
4) 补充最小单测/验证覆盖。
notes:
Implemented typed probe + observable non-blocking first slice.
Files: src/utils/http-health-probe.ts; src/cli/commands/restart.ts; src/cli/commands/start.ts; src/cli/guardian/client.ts; src/cli/server/port-utils.ts; src/token-daemon/server-utils.ts; tests/utils/http-health-probe.spec.ts; tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts.
Evidence: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit ✅; npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/utils/http-health-probe.spec.ts tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts tests/cli/guardian-client.spec.ts ✅; manual smoke via npx tsx scripts/tmp-restart-smoke.ts verified degraded restart falls back to SIGUSR2 and daemon restart carries x-api-key.
close_reason: Typed probe helper landed for restart/start/guardian/port-utils/token-daemon with test+smoke evidence

title: W2: 状态持久化与清理链路补齐 non-blocking 可观测性
acceptance_criteria:
1) cooldown-manager/leader-lock/pending-tool-sync 等 state best-effort 失败具备统一 non-blocking 日志。
2) 日志至少包含 stage + operation + 关键标识（key/sessionId/providerKey/filepath）。
3) 不引入主链阻断，不制造日志风暴。
notes:
Implemented W2 non-blocking observability.

Changes
- cooldown-manager: restore/persist snapshot failures now emit throttled non-blocking warnings with stage + operation + key.
- leader-lock: ensure/read/write/release/pid probe failures now emit throttled non-blocking warnings with stage + operation + filepath/pid. ENOENT/ESRCH remain non-noisy.
- pending-tool-sync: clear pending session failure now emits throttled non-blocking warning with stage + operation + sessionId.

Validation
- npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/virtual-router-cooldown-manager.spec.ts tests/token-daemon/leader-lock.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/chat-process-pending-tool-sync.spec.ts
- Result: 3 suites passed, 5 tests passed.

title: W3: listener 与配置回退链路显式化
acceptance_criteria:
1) success/listener/provider-registry/server-utils 等 fallback 路径不再无声回退。
2) 至少能区分 listener failure、config load failure、detect fallback cause。

title: Epic: Chat Process 全协议语义统一与保真恢复
description:
背景
当前 Responses 的带状态协议（response_id / previous_response_id / responsesResume / request-chain sticky）仍存在协议专属状态链；chat process 已承接部分公共语义，但 openai-chat / anthropic / gemini 尚未实现对 continuation/state protocol 的完整等价模拟。

目标
按 Jason 的要求，把“所有协议在 chat process（request + response）达成语义统一”收敛为唯一真源：
1) 所有协议的状态/continuation/tool-loop/response semantics 都在 chat process 内统一表达；
2) 入口和出口都能基于统一语义做保真恢复；
3) inbound / outbound 只负责格式映射，不再承载协议语义真源；
4) 逐步移除 Responses 特判 metadata 泄漏、route sticky 特判、协议侧 dropped/lossy 无统一口径的问题。

范围
- req chat process / resp chat process 的统一语义模型
- responses / chat / anthropic / gemini 的 protocol continuation & state semantics
- route continuity / sticky key / resume state 的统一真源
- inbound/outbound 降为 thin mapping + explicit audit
- matrix tests / golden replay / dropped-lossy gate

非目标
- 不在 provider/runtime 层重写业务语义
- 不新增 host/provider 旁路状态机

验收标准
1) 所有协议的 continuation/state/tool-loop 语义进入 chat process 后都有统一 schema，inbound/outbound 不再保留协议语义真源。
2) request/response 两侧都能从统一语义面完成保真恢复；responses 专属状态语义不再散落为 handler/router 特判。
3) inbound/outbound 仅做格式映射；任何 dropped/lossy 都必须显式 audit，并有 matrix tests 覆盖。
4) 至少覆盖 openai-responses / openai-chat / anthropic-messages / gemini-chat 四协议矩阵验证。
notes:
Jason 要求
- 所有协议在 chat process（request + response）达成语义统一。
- 入口和出口都必须基于统一语义保真恢复。
- 所有协议转换都在 chat process 完成。
- inbound / outbound 只做映射。

当前判定
- Responses continuation/state 仍有专属链路；非 responses 仅部分适配，未达成等价模拟。
Final acceptance
- unified continuation/state truth is now `chat.semantics.continuation` across request inbound lift, chat_process.req, chat_process.resp, router continuity, processedRequest, and outbound remap for openai-responses / openai-chat / anthropic-messages / gemini-chat
- unified mapping audit truth is now `chat.semantics.audit.protocolMapping`; normal readers are canonical-first, legacy `metadata.mappingAudit` is migration-only and can be disabled with `ROUTECODEX_DISABLE_LEGACY_PROTOCOL_MAPPING_AUDIT_MIRROR=1`
- chat process owns protocol conversion semantics end-to-end; inbound/outbound/router only map or consume the unified semantic surface

Validation
- npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/request-continuation-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/response-continuation-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-router-metadata.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/routing-state-continuation-matrix.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-runtime-utils.continuation.spec.ts
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/protocol-mapping-audit-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-audit-matrix.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-prompt-cache-cross-protocol.spec.ts
- npm --prefix sharedmodule/llmswitch-core run build:ci
- node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/coverage-hub-semantic-mappers.mjs
Post-close validation hardening
- added whole-function roundtrip coverage in `tests/sharedmodule/chat-process-roundtrip-integration.spec.ts`:
  1) `openai-responses -> chat_process -> anthropic provider -> chat_process.resp -> openai-responses`
  2) `openai-chat -> chat_process -> gemini provider -> chat_process.resp -> openai-chat`
- these integration tests verify request-side semantic lift, provider outbound payload build, response-side semantic restore, processedRequest semantic preservation, and final client remap as one connected chain rather than isolated stage assertions

Validation
- npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/chat-process-roundtrip-integration.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/request-continuation-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/response-continuation-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-router-metadata.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/routing-state-continuation-matrix.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-runtime-utils.continuation.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/protocol-mapping-audit-semantics.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-cross-protocol-audit-matrix.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/responses-prompt-cache-cross-protocol.spec.ts
- npm --prefix sharedmodule/llmswitch-core run build:ci
- node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/coverage-hub-semantic-mappers.mjs

title: Full Rust migration: HubPipeline + Virtual Router remaining TS modules
description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Listed remaining modules are migrated to Rust/native-primary path:
  - semantic-mappers/{chat,anthropic,responses,gemini}
  - tool-governance/{engine,rules}
  - shared/chat-request-filters
  - shared/{snapshot-hooks,snapshot-utils}
  - hub/snapshot-recorder
  - shared/protocol-field-allowlists (or approved defer note with explicit architecture decision)
- HubPipeline + Virtual Router targeted paths run with native implementation as primary execution path.
- llmswitch-core build passes.
- At least one failing-provider shape replay + one unaffected control replay pass and are recorded in notes.
design:
Module-first Rustification governance (2026-03-10):
1. Prioritize module ownership cutover over file-size cleanup. Do not mix Rust migration with broad file splitting in the same slice.
2. Work one module group at a time until clean. A module is only done when:
   - Rust owns the primary semantics,
   - host/bridge/runtime path actually executes the Rust path,
   - legacy TS implementation is removed or reduced to a thin shell,
   - parity/shadow/replay validation exists.
3. Ordered cleanup groups for execution:
   - hub pipeline core
   - tool governance + route select
   - servertool / continue_execution / clock
   - virtual-router
   - compat / protocol codecs
   - shared semantics / normalizers
   - bridge actions / snapshot / hooks
4. File-size reduction is deferred until after ownership cutover in each module. Current large files should not keep growing, but line-count cleanup is not the primary milestone.
notes: close parent after child complete sweep: 3.11.1..3.11.11 all closed. this round revalidated with build:ci + targeted regressions + coverage gates + root build:dev/install:global + 5555 health=0.90.684.

title: WebUI OAuth: authorize 必须拉起 Camoufox auto，且 norefresh 不能导致 no-op
description:
Problem
- WebUI /daemon/oauth/authorize returns OK but does not open Camoufox / does nothing for qwen and antigravity.
- Root cause: token files can be marked norefresh/noRefresh (e.g. Qwen refresh permanent failure) and ensureValidOAuthToken currently skips *all* refresh/reauth when norefresh is set, even for explicit user-triggered authorization.
- Also, daemon-admin authorize does not set provider-specific Camoufox auto mode (qwen/antigravity/gemini).

Acceptance Criteria
- /daemon/oauth/authorize with openBrowser=true always launches Camoufox (not system browser) with provider-specific auto mode; auto fails -> headed manual assist.
- norefresh/noRefresh only disables background auto-refresh; it must NOT prevent explicit authorize (forceReauthorize/openBrowser).
- Verified via unit tests + npm run build:dev (includes install:global).

Evidence
- Repro: WebUI Auth Provider Pool → Authorize OAuth (qwen default / antigravity alias) should actually open Camoufox.
- Commands: npm run build:dev
notes:
Evidence
- WebUI authorize now uses Camoufox-only flow + install hint: src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/credentials-handler.ts
- Camoufox availability check (no auto-install for WebUI): src/providers/core/config/camoufox-launcher.ts
- Explicit authorize bypasses throttle + norefresh no longer blocks explicit openBrowser/forceReauthorize: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts
- Camoufox strict mode (no fallback to system browser when ROUTECODEX_OAUTH_BROWSER=camoufox): src/providers/core/config/oauth-flows.ts
- Token refresh daemon uses Camoufox auto for qwen refresh→reauth path: src/token-daemon/token-daemon.ts
- Default server refreshAhead=30min: src/manager/modules/token/index.ts
- Docs: docs/OAUTH.md
- Tests:
  - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.norefresh-explicit-authorize.spec.ts → PASS
  - npm run test:routing-instructions → PASS
- Full verification: npm run build:dev → PASS (includes install:global) on 2026-02-04
close_reason: Fix WebUI OAuth no-op; enforce Camoufox auto and explicit authorize semantics

title: bug(oauth/webui): verify-required open must use Camoufox
description:
## Problem
- daemon-admin Auth Provider Pool shows antigravity token status "verify required" with an "open" link that opens in the system browser, not Camoufox.
- For manual CLI refresh (routecodex oauth ...), Camoufox automation can run headless and looks like a hang while waiting for localhost callback.

## Acceptance Criteria
- In daemon-admin credentials table, "open" triggers Camoufox (stable profile+fingerprint) instead of system browser.
- If Camoufox is missing, return actionable error (camoufox_missing).
- CLI interactive OAuth refresh defaults to headed Camoufox so users can complete login/2FA/verification.

title: bug(antigravity): 403 needs-auth rotate alias + 30m cooldown
description:
When an Antigravity account returns HTTP 403 indicating OAuth is missing/expired (NOT Google account verification gating), routing should immediately switch to another alias and prevent the failing alias from being scheduled for 30 minutes.

Motivation: avoid repeated 403 hammering and unblock queue.
acceptance_criteria:
- On ProviderErrorEvent(status=403, needs-auth), all providerKeys under the same antigravity alias are set out-of-pool with cooldownUntil >= now+30m.
- In a single request retry loop, the failing antigravity providerKey is excluded so router can pick another alias (do not set antigravityAvoidAllOnRetry).
- Existing 403 google verification flow unchanged.
- Regression tests cover both quota daemon + request executor behavior.
notes:
Implemented Antigravity 403 (OAuth reauth-required) handling.

Evidence:
- Quota daemon now cools down entire alias for 30min on needs-auth 403 (not Google verify).
  Files: src/manager/modules/quota/provider-quota-daemon.events.ts
  Test: tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-daemon-module.spec.ts ("cools down an antigravity alias for 30m on OAuth reauth-required 403")
- Request executor now treats Antigravity 403 auth errors as retryable and excludes failing providerKey so router can pick another alias.
  Files: src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts
  Test: tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts ("rotates antigravity alias on 403 OAuth reauth-required error")

Verification:
- npm run test:routing-instructions (passed)
- npm run test:cli (passed)
- npm run build:dev (passed; includes install:global + blackbox antigravity parity)
close_reason: antigravity needs-auth 403 rotates + 30m cooldown

title: bug(quota): network/fetch errors should not backoff-loop
description:
## Problem
- Network/transport failures (e.g. "fetch failed") can cause repeated short backoffs and do not remove the provider from the pool long enough, leading to request storms and session aborts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Repeated network/fetch errors within the error-chain window escalate cooldown monotonically (no wrap/cycle).
- If error code is missing but message indicates network failure, it is classified as network for quota tracking.
- Cooldown removes providerKey from pool; after TTL expiry it can recover.
- Verified by unit tests and `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global`.
notes:
Evidence:
- Commit: 393b7da18
- Unit tests: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-center.spec.ts tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-daemon-module.spec.ts (PASS)
- Full verify: npm run build:dev (PASS, includes install:global)

Changes:
- provider-quota-center: clamp consecutive count (no wrap)
- quota daemon: pass error message into quota event; classify message-only fetch errors as ENET
- model backoff: clamp capacity schedule (no 9/15/27 loop)
- antigravity 403 reauth: rotate alias + 30m cooldown

title: bug(oauth): interactive OAuth does not open Camoufox window
description:
## Problem
- Running `routecodex oauth <token-file> --force` or `routecodex oauth gemini-auto|antigravity-auto <token-file>` sometimes prints portal/callback instructions but no browser window appears, leaving users stuck.

## Expected
- Interactive/manual OAuth always opens a visible Camoufox window by default (headed), so users can complete login/2FA/verification.
- Auto OAuth may run headless, but must fall back to headed manual assist when automation cannot proceed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- With `ROUTECODEX_CAMOUFOX_DEV_MODE=1` (CLI interactive refresh sets this automatically), Camoufox launcher opens a headed window reliably for manual completion (no silent no-op).
- `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` pass.
notes:

title: LM Studio: fix streaming decode + terminated SSE
description:
## Problem
LM Studio/OpenAI-compatible upstreams can (a) terminate SSE after tool_call output_item.done or (b) return JSON even when stream=true while the provider wrapper still exposes __sse_stream. Both cases currently surface as SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR: terminated / SSE_DECODE_ERROR and break Codex flows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Responses SSE: if undici throws terminated after a completed output item, llmswitch-core returns a valid response JSON (no 5xx).
- resp_inbound_stage1_sse_decode: if __sse_stream body starts with JSON, parse JSON and continue (treat as non-SSE).
- Add regressions to sharedmodule matrix for both cases.
- routecodex build:dev passes (includes install:global).
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-05):
- Sharedmodule fix (llmswitch-core):
  - Handle undici "terminated" during Responses SSE aggregation by salvaging completed output items: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/responses-sse-to-json-converter.ts
  - If provider wrapper exposes __sse_stream but body is JSON, parse JSON and continue: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/stages/resp_inbound/resp_inbound_stage1_sse_decode/index.ts
  - Regressions wired into matrix:
    - sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/responses-sse-to-json-terminated-salvage.mjs
    - sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/chat-sse-to-json-openai-no-event.mjs
    - sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs
- RouteCodex timeout wiring:
  - runtime.transport timeoutMs/maxRetries mapped into provider HTTP config: src/providers/core/api/provider-types.ts, src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts, src/providers/core/runtime/provider-factory.ts
  - Test: tests/provider/provider-factory.test.ts

Verification:
- sharedmodule matrix: GEMINI_API_KEY= LLMSWITCH_MATRIX_BUILD_SCRIPT=build:ci node scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs (passed; report saved under sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/)
- routecodex: npm run build:dev (passed; includes install:global e2e)
close_reason: LM Studio SSE termination + JSON-bodied stream compatibility fixed; verified via sharedmodule matrix + routecodex build:dev

title: Fix Responses tool-call id style leakage (LMStudio→OpenAI)
description:
## Problem
Routing from a Responses-compatible upstream that uses `call_*` tool ids (e.g. LM Studio) into a standard OpenAI `/v1/responses` provider (tab/crs) can leak `toolCallIdStyle=preserve` across followups (e.g. `:stop_followup`). OpenAI rejects non-`fc_*` ids with HTTP 400.

## Acceptance Criteria
- When target provider is standard OpenAI `/v1/responses` (tab/crs), outbound request `input[].id` / `call_id` for `function_call` items is normalized to `fc_*`, and OpenAI no longer returns `Expected an ID that begins with 'fc'`.
- When target provider is LM Studio, `call_*` tool ids are preserved; `call_id`/`tool_call_id`/`id` fields are mirrored so tool loops remain stable.
- Antigravity (Claude via Gemini) no longer fails on `tool_use.id` invalid pattern when tool ids contain non `[A-Za-z0-9_-]` characters.
notes:
## Evidence
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: `env -u GEMINI_API_KEY npm run test:matrix` → ✅ Matrix passed (2026-02-05).
- routecodex: `npm run build:dev` → ✅ completed incl. `install:global` + `test:blackbox-antigravity-parity` (2026-02-05).

## Fix Summary
- Route-selected Responses providers now default tool call id style to `fc` (OpenAI) and `preserve` only for LM Studio (`chat:lmstudio` or providerId=lmstudio).
- LM Studio compat normalizes/mirrors `call_id`/`tool_call_id`/`id` fields without rewriting ids.
- Antigravity (Claude via Gemini) sanitizes tool call ids to `[A-Za-z0-9_-]` when injecting `functionCall.id`/`functionResponse.id`.
close_reason: Fixed in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core + verified via matrix + routecodex build:dev

title: Fix webSearch providerKey not in routing.web_search
description:
## Problem
RouteCodex 启动时报错：`webSearch engine "iflow:web_search" references providerKey "iflow.glm-4.7" which is not present in routing.web_search`。

原因是 `virtualrouter.webSearch.engines[*].providerKey` 必须出现在 `virtualrouter.routing.web_search[*].targets` 中，但配置里缺了该 target。

## Fix
在 `~/.routecodex/config.json` 的 `virtualrouter.routing.web_search[0].targets` 中加入 `iflow.glm-4.7`。

## Acceptance Criteria
- `routecodex config validate -c ~/.routecodex/config.json` 返回 `Configuration is valid`。
notes:
## Evidence
- Config patched: `~/.routecodex/config.json` now includes `iflow.glm-4.7` under `virtualrouter.routing.web_search[0].targets`.
- Validation: `routecodex config validate -c ~/.routecodex/config.json` → ✓ Configuration is valid (2026-02-05).
close_reason: Config aligned: webSearch engine providerKey now in routing.web_search

title: iFlow tool calls emitted as Qwen tokens are treated as text
description:
## Symptom
When routing `/v1/responses` to iFlow (providerFamily=iflow, protocol=openai-chat), the model may emit Qwen-style tool tokens in plain text, e.g.:

- `<|tool_call_begin|> functions.exec_command:66 <|tool_call_argument_begin|> {...} <|tool_call_end|>`

These are currently returned to the client as plain text, so tool execution does not happen.

## Expected
Those token blocks should be harvested into structured `choices[].message.tool_calls` so Hub Pipeline can run the tool loop.

## Fix
- Add compat response action for `chat:iflow` that harvests tool calls from assistant text.
- Extend text markup normalizer to parse Qwen token tool blocks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `chat:iflow` response converts Qwen token markup into `tool_calls` and sets `finish_reason=tool_calls`.
- Matrix includes a deterministic regression test.
notes:
## Evidence
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: `env -u GEMINI_API_KEY npm run test:matrix` → ✅ Matrix passed (2026-02-05).
- Added regression: `llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/compat-iflow-qwen-tool-tokens.mjs`.

## Patch Points
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/shared/text-markup-normalizer.ts` (parse `<|tool_call_begin|>` tokens)
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/compat/profiles/chat-iflow.json` (enable `harvest_tool_calls_from_text`)
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/compat/compat-*.ts` (new action wiring)
close_reason: Compat updated to harvest Qwen token tool calls for iFlow

title: iFlow: JSON text body causes MALFORMED_RESPONSE
description:
Problem:
- /v1/responses routed to iflow(openai-chat) can return JSON as plain text (wrong Content-Type), so hub receives a string payload and fails canonicalization:
  ProviderProtocolError: [hub_response] Non-canonical response payload at chat_process.response.entry

Impact:
- Tool loop breaks (tools route), request fails with MALFORMED_RESPONSE.

Fix:
- In llmswitch-core resp_inbound stage1, best-effort parse JSON when providerResponse is a string.
- Also expand Qwen tool-token harvesting to tolerate whitespace/newlines and allow write_stdin {}.
acceptance_criteria:
Acceptance Criteria:
- If providerResponse is a JSON string (chat.completion), hub parses it and continues conversion (no MALFORMED_RESPONSE).
- iFlow Qwen token tool-call markup with whitespace/newlines is harvested into tool_calls.
- Matrix tests pass.
notes:
Evidence:
- Sharedmodule commits:
  - d366b55 fix(iflow): harvest qwen tool tokens with whitespace
  - fd4bd27 fix(hub): parse JSON text provider responses
- llmswitch-core matrix: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY -u GOOGLE_API_KEY npm run test:matrix → PASS
  Report: ../sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/matrix-ci-1770304963680.json
- routecodex dev build + global install: npm run build:dev → PASS; routecodex --version = 0.89.1711
close_reason: fixed in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core

title: iFlow: unwrap {status,msg,body} envelope unconditionally
description:
## Symptom
/v1/responses routed to iFlow sometimes returns an envelope {status,msg,body,request_id}. Hub sees the envelope as the provider response and throws MALFORMED_RESPONSE at chat_process.response.entry (payloadKeys include status/msg/body/request_id). This also prevents Qwen token tool-call harvesting.

## Expected
Compat profile chat:iflow should unwrap to body before semantic mapping/tool harvesting, even when body is not yet recognized as a known provider response shape.

## Acceptance Criteria
- For payload {status,msg,body,request_id}, compat action returns body (parsed if JSON string) so downstream conversion errors reference body shape, not the envelope.
- If body is an OpenAI-chat completion (object or JSON string), conversion proceeds and tool harvesting can run.
- Deterministic regression test added and matrix passes.
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-06):
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: env -u GEMINI_API_KEY -u GOOGLE_API_KEY npm run test:matrix → ✅ Matrix passed
- routecodex: npm run build:dev → ✅ Passed (includes install:global + mock regressions)

Patch points:
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/compat/actions/iflow-response-body-unwrap.ts
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/compat-iflow-qwen-tool-tokens.mjs (adds 'body SSE text' case)
close_reason: Unwrap iFlow envelope body + SSE text parse

title: Fix Qwen OAuth token not used (api_key enrichment)
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `routecodex oauth ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-1-default.json` and complete OAuth.
2. Token file contains `access_token`/`refresh_token` but no `api_key`.
3. Start RouteCodex and route a request to Qwen (e.g. background route `qwen.qwen3-coder-plus`).
4. Observe server still fails auth / appears not to use token.

## Acceptance Criteria
- When Qwen token file is missing `api_key`, RouteCodex backfills it via Qwen user-info endpoint and persists it (without requiring token refresh).
- CLI init provider catalog uses `~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-1-default.json` by default.
- `npm run build:dev` passes (includes `install:global`).
notes:
- Code: src/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.ts (Qwen api_key enrichment)
- Config: src/cli/config/init-provider-catalog.ts (tokenFile now qwen-oauth-1-default.json)
- Test: tests/providers/auth/oauth-lifecycle.qwen-enrich.spec.ts (PASS)
- Commit: 9e9ce8769
- Verification: npm run build:dev (includes install:global) completed successfully on 2026-02-03.
close_reason: Implemented Qwen api_key enrichment + default tokenFile alignment

title: bug(lmstudio): submit_tool_outputs 不应强制 stream 导致 SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR
description:
Problem
- /v1/responses/:id/submit_tool_outputs 被 routes 强制 forceStream=true，导致即使 client 没有 stream=true 也会走 SSE 路径。
- 对 LM Studio /v1/responses/<id>/submit_tool_outputs 上游而言，streaming SSE 可能不兼容，触发 SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR: Building not completed / PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE。

Acceptance Criteria
- submit_tool_outputs 仅在 client 显式 stream=true 时才启用 SSE；Accept:text/event-stream 不再隐式开启。
- handler resume 后 pipeline entryEndpoint 重写为 /v1/responses，并保持非 streaming 默认。
- npm run build:dev + npm run install:global 全量验证通过。
notes:
Changes
- src/server/runtime/http-server/routes.ts: removed forceStream:true for /v1/responses/:id/submit_tool_outputs.
- src/server/handlers/responses-handler.ts: submit_tool_outputs no longer infers streaming from Accept header; keeps stream off unless client explicitly requested.

Verification
- npm run build:dev (includes npm run install:global) passed locally (RouteCodex version bumped to 0.89.1726 during build).

Next
- Run a real LM Studio tool-call loop to confirm submit_tool_outputs no longer triggers SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR / PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE.
close_reason: Fix: remove forceStream and stop inferring stream for submit_tool_outputs

title: Update README files to reflect current module state
iFlow: vision→Kimi K2.5 inline multimodal + dataurl asset resolve + history trim
description:
## Goal
When request contains images (vision intent), if iFlow Kimi K2.5 is configured, route should prefer Kimi K2.5 inline multimodal (single-pass), resolve image URLs/files to iFlow CLI-compatible data URLs, and avoid persisting large base64 blobs in snapshots/history.

## Requirements
- Routing: image requests should prefer routes that can serve inline multimodal via iFlow Kimi K2.5 (similar to current Responses/Gemini inline-vision preference).
- Payload: for openai-chat outbound to iFlow Kimi K2.5, normalize image blocks to OpenAI-chat image_url parts with url=data:<mime>;base64,... by downloading/reading assets.
- History: large base64 must not pollute hub snapshots/policy observations or stored conversation context (trim/redact).
- Video: decide whether to support video_url blocks; default off unless explicitly enabled.

## Acceptance Criteria

title: bug(openai-responses): outbound function_call item.id must start with fc_
description:
Problem
- When bridging ChatCompletion tool_calls → OpenAI Responses payload, output[] function_call items get id like `function_call_<req>_<n>`.
- OpenAI-compatible clients/providers may require function_call item.id to start with `fc_` (OpenAI strict), otherwise follow-up requests can fail.

Acceptance Criteria

title: LMStudio terminated SSE salvage should ignore orphan in_progress function_call
description:
## Problem
LMStudio /v1/responses streams may terminate before response.completed while having extra response.output_item.added function_call items that never receive response.function_call_arguments.done + response.output_item.done.
Current salvage path may still emit those orphan calls as completed tool calls with {} arguments, causing downstream tool precheck failures and repeated Server Error in LMStudio UI.

## Acceptance Criteria
- On terminated salvage, only completed function_call items are emitted to output.
- In-progress orphan function_call items are dropped.
- Regression test covers one completed call + N orphan in-progress calls with terminated stream.
- Matrix passes after change.
notes:
Evidence from snapshots:
- req_1770362892803_123f1140 provider raw stream terminates after output_item.added for call_1916667340710139/call_1916667340710140 without done events; only call_1916667340710141 has function_call_arguments.done + output_item.done.
- pre-fix stage9 emitted 3 tool calls (two orphan => arguments '{}').

Fix implemented in sharedmodule:
- llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/builders/response-builder.ts: function_call output only emitted when state.status==='completed'.
- llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/responses-sse-to-json-terminated-salvage.mjs: add orphan in-progress call regression.
- Commit: 16a27a2 (pushed to sharedmodules/main).

Verification:

- node scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs (Matrix passed)

title: stopMessage followup 应允许同流二次触发；修复 iflow 200 error envelope 导致 MALFORMED_RESPONSE
description:
Context: current stop_message_auto followup guard blocks all followup hops, which violates intended behavior (allow same stop_message_flow retrigger with counter termination; only prevent nested cross-flow loops). In addition, iflow may return HTTP 200 with {error_code,msg} envelope on stop_followup; this currently passes as success and later fails in hub response conversion as MALFORMED_RESPONSE.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: stop_message_auto followup allows retrigger only when serverToolLoopState.flowId===stop_message_flow; other followups remain blocked.
AC2: iflow HTTP 200 business error envelope ({error_code,msg/message}) is detected in provider transport and surfaced as provider error (not MALFORMED_RESPONSE).
AC3: add regression tests and pass targeted + build:dev verification.

title: rcc: 三运行模式现状对齐（router/analysis/direct）
description:
## Background
目前希望 rcc 有 3 个运行模式：
1) **路由器模式（router）**：当前默认模式。
2) **分析模式（analysis/bypass）**：对外 API 输入/输出形状保持一致；内部尽量“透传”，并把入站/出站（含 upstream）记录下来用于分析。
3) **服务器模式（direct）**：当请求 `model` 形如 `provider.model` 时，不走路由分类，直接命中该 provider 的对应 model。

## Current State (code evidence)
### (1) router
- 默认 `processMode='chat'`，Hub Pipeline 会进入 chat_process（含 tool governance + 路由）。

### (2) analysis/bypass
- core/host 已存在 `processMode='passthrough'` 的基础能力：
  - 允许 provider 通过配置 `process: 'passthrough'` 进入 passthrough；以及 server 在 `processMode==='passthrough'` 时跳过 response 二次转换。
  - 文档声明 passthrough 会“请求与响应原样透传”，且仍会写入 request/response snapshots。
- 但目前没有看到一个**明确的 rcc “analysis mode”全局开关/CLI 配置**来保证“透传 + 记录入/出站”按统一契约落地（例如固定落盘格式、输出位置、开启条件）。

### (3) direct (model=provider.model)
- llmswitch-core VirtualRouterEngine 已实现对 `request.model` 的 direct 分支：
  - 解析 `providerId.modelId` 后走 `selectDirectProviderModel(...)` 并设置 `routeName='direct'`。

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 明确 rcc 三模式的“入口开关”（CLI flag / config / request metadata）与优先级，并在 docs 中写清。
- [ ] analysis/bypass：定义稳定的记录内容与落盘位置（至少：inbound 原始 payload、provider outbound payload、provider inbound response、outbound 给客户端的 payload；同时覆盖 stream 与非 stream）。
- [ ] analysis/bypass：保证对外请求/响应协议形状不变；不会引入 host/provider 层语义修复（仍遵循单执行路径）。
- [ ] direct：添加回归验证（测试或脚本）证明 `model=provider.model` 时 routeName=direct 且只在该 provider/model 池内选择。

## References
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts`（direct model 分支）
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/bootstrap.ts`（provider.process -> processMode）
- `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts`（processMode gate）
- `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-response.ts`（passthrough 跳过 response convert）
- `docs/CONFIG_ARCHITECTURE.md`（passthrough 语义与 snapshots 描述）
notes:
Verified 2026-02-04 (local):
- direct model parse+branch: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts:163 and :432
- direct selection respects allow/disable/health via trySelectFromTier: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine-selection/direct-provider-model.ts:6
- provider.process -> target.processMode: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/bootstrap.ts:684
- route-select overwrites metadata.processMode from target: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/target-utils.ts:5
- passthrough skips request-side tool governance stage: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts:479
- passthrough skips response conversion in host: src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-response.ts:51
- release 默认 snapshots off; start --snap forces ROUTECODEX_SNAPSHOT=1: src/cli/commands/start.ts:91
- client-request snapshot: src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts:1317 (or request-executor.ts:173)
Implemented A (router + forced snapshots):
- Added CLI mode flag: src/cli/commands/start.ts ("--mode router|analysis|server").
- analysis mode sets env: ROUTECODEX_SNAPSHOT=1, ROUTECODEX_HUB_SNAPSHOTS=1, ROUTECODEX_CAPTURE_STREAM_SNAPSHOTS=1.
- Added client-response snapshot capture gated by ROUTECODEX_MODE=analysis: src/server/handlers/handler-utils.ts.
Verification (no version bump):
- ROUTECODEX_SKIP_AUTO_BUMP=1 npm run build:dev (passed, includes install:global + e2e/toolcall + blackbox antigravity parity).
Post-fix verification: npm run test:cli (passed).

title: responses input id 超长导致 400 string_above_max_length
description:
Context: openai-responses upstream returns HTTP 400: Invalid input[n].id too long (>64). Seen on tab/crs providers in longcontext + stop_followup chains. Need single-source fix to normalize/truncate generated input item ids before outbound request while preserving stable linking semantics.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: outbound /v1/responses payload never sends input[*].id longer than 64 chars.
AC2: fix is implemented at one canonical conversion/compat stage (no virtual-router/provider hacks).
AC3: existing tool-call/id behavior for lmstudio/iflow remains unaffected.
AC4: add regression test (or matrix script) covering oversized id normalization and pass targeted verification.
notes:
2026-02-06 修复与验证记录:

一、根因
- 触发链路: longcontext/stop_followup 回放历史中包含 responses output item 的超长 id（例如 258 chars）。
- 缺口: `buildResponsesRequestFromChat` 最终出站过滤 `filterBridgeInputForUpstream` 仅做 type/tool_call_id 清理，未统一限制 `input[*].id` 长度。

二、唯一实现点（单点）

- 位置: filterBridgeInputForUpstream()
- 处理: 对每个 input item 统一执行 `clampResponsesInputItemId`，保证出站 `input[*].id` <= 64。
- 新增通用 helper: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/shared/bridge-id-utils.ts (`clampResponsesInputItemId`)。

三、回归

- 新增用例: oversized history input item id（message 类型）在 outbound 前被压缩到 <=64。
- 同脚本原有 LM Studio preserve / fc id 行为校验继续通过（无回归）。

四、Replay 证据

- requestId: openai-responses-tab.key1.gpt-5.3-codex-gpt-5.3-codex-20260206T192352563-022

- providerProtocol: openai-responses
- route: longcontext

- after: normalizedHistoryIdLength=64, maxOutboundInputIdLength=64

title: LMStudio anthropic: tool_use/tool_result ordering breaks after outbound post-map
description:

Acceptance Criteria

- AC2: Outbound post-map must not flatten anthropic payload structured blocks into empty string.
