title: iflow thinking 模式下 tool_call 缺失 reasoning_content 导致 400
description:
Symptoms: provider iflow(openai-chat, kimi-k2.5) returns HTTP 400 with message: thinking is enabled but reasoning_content is missing in assistant tool call message at index N. Need single-point compat fix in llmswitch-core so assistant tool_call messages satisfy upstream thinking contract without affecting non-iflow providers.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: Reproduce with sample/request and capture requestId + providerKey + protocol evidence.
AC2: Identify exact stage where reasoning_content is dropped/missing (single source).
AC3: Implement one canonical fix point (no virtual-router/provider transport hacks).
AC4: Add targeted regression covering iflow thinking tool_call chain and control case for unaffected provider.
AC5: Run build/verification and provide replay evidence (failing provider + unaffected control).
notes:
2026-02-06 修复与验证记录:

一、根因定位
- 现象: iflow(openai-chat, kimi-k2.5, thinking=true) 在 assistant tool_call 历史消息缺少 reasoning_content 时返回 HTTP 400。
- 根因: req_outbound stage3 compat 只读取显式 compatibilityProfile；当 providerId/providerKey 为分片形态（如 iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5）且未显式传 profile 时，chat:iflow 可能不命中，导致 iflow_kimi_thinking_reasoning_fill 未执行。

二、唯一实现点（无 virtual-router/provider hack）
- 文件: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/stages/req_outbound/req_outbound_stage3_compat/index.ts
- 变更: pickCompatProfile() 在无显式 profile 时统一走 resolveCompatProfileForContext(adapterContext) 自动解析 provider family（iflow/lmstudio 等）。

三、回归
- 新增矩阵脚本: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/compat-profile-auto-resolve.mjs
  - 用例1(iflow): 自动命中 chat:iflow 并注入 assistant.reasoning_content
  - 用例2(lmstudio): 自动命中 chat:lmstudio（tool id 规范化）
  - 用例3(control/tab): 不注入 reasoning_content（防回归）
- 已接入: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs

四、Replay 证据（同形 + 对照）
- 同形(iflow): requestId=replay_iflow_reasoning_fill_20260206, providerKey=iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5, providerProtocol=openai-chat, route=thinking, model=kimi-k2.5 -> reasoning_content="."
- 对照(tab): requestId=replay_tab_control_20260206, providerKey=tab.key1.gpt-5.3-codex, providerProtocol=openai-responses, route=thinking, model=gpt-5.3-codex -> has_reasoning_content=false

五、验证命令
- sharedmodule: npm run build ✅
- sharedmodule: node scripts/tests/compat-profile-auto-resolve.mjs ✅
- sharedmodule: node scripts/tests/compat-iflow-thinking-reasoning-content.mjs ✅
- host: npm run build:dev ✅（含 install:global）
close_reason: compat profile auto-resolve 已接入 req_outbound 单点；iflow 同形回放与对照回放通过

title: iflow kimi tool_call missing reasoning_content after responses->chat bridge
description:
Symptoms: iflow(kimi-k2.5/openai-chat) still returns HTTP 400 'thinking is enabled but reasoning_content is missing in assistant tool call message' on coding route after prior fix.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: Capture failing sample/requestId evidence and verify outbound payload has assistant tool_calls missing reasoning_content.
AC2: Identify single canonical stage to guarantee reasoning_content for iflow kimi tool-call assistant messages.
AC3: Implement one fix in llmswitch-core compat path (no virtual-router/provider hacks).
AC4: Add targeted regression for missing-thinking-field scenario and control case.
AC5: Run build+target tests and provide replay/control evidence.
notes:
2026-02-06 修复记录

1) 复现证据（用户样本）
- Snapshot: ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/openai-responses/__pending__/req_1770385402604_a09eb687/chat_process.req.stage4.tool_governance.json
- requestId=openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260206T214322604-018
- providerKey=iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5, model=kimi-k2.5
- 统计: assistant(tool_calls)>0 共 33 条，missing reasoning_content 共 33 条；并且顶层 thinking 字段缺失

2) 根因
- 旧逻辑仅在 `thinking` 被显式启用时注入 reasoning_content。
- responses→chat 链路中，top-level thinking 可能缺失，但 iflow/kimi 上游仍按 thinking contract 校验 assistant tool_call 消息，导致 400。

3) 单点修复（llmswitch-core compat action）
- 文件: src/conversion/compat/actions/iflow-kimi-thinking-reasoning-fill.ts
- 变更: 对 kimi-k2.5 的 assistant+tool_calls，默认补 reasoning_content="."；仅在 thinking 被显式 disabled/off/false 时跳过注入。
- 说明: 无 virtual-router hack，无 provider transport hack。

4) 回归补充
- scripts/tests/compat-iflow-thinking-reasoning-content.mjs
  - 新增三种断言: thinking=true 注入；thinking 缺失也注入；thinking=false 不注入。
- scripts/tests/compat-profile-auto-resolve.mjs
  - 新增 iflow auto-profile 下 thinking 缺失仍注入，以及 thinking=false 控制用例。

5) 验证
- sharedmodule: npm run build ✅
- sharedmodule: node scripts/tests/compat-profile-auto-resolve.mjs ✅
- sharedmodule: node scripts/tests/compat-iflow-thinking-reasoning-content.mjs ✅
- host: npm run build && npm run install:global ✅

6) 回放确认（同形+对照）
- 同形(iflow): 用上述 snapshot 调 runReqOutboundStage3Compat(providerId=iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5)
  结果: before missing=33 -> after missing=0
- 对照(tab): 同样 payload + providerId=tab.key1.gpt-5.3-codex
  结果: missing 仍为 33（不跨 provider 注入）

补充（按“这个样本是否入回归”）：
- 已新增样本回归脚本：sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/compat-iflow-reasoning-replay-20260206.mjs
- 已新增样本 fixture：sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tests/fixtures/compat/iflow-reasoning-missing-sample-20260206.json
  - requestId 标注为 openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260206T214322604-018
  - 模拟该样本关键形状（thinking 缺失 + assistant tool_calls 缺 reasoning_content）
- 已接入 matrix：scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs
- 本地执行通过：
  node scripts/tests/compat-iflow-reasoning-replay-20260206.mjs ✅
  输出: beforeMissing=2, afterIflowMissing=0, afterControlMissing=2

Git commit: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core@06ea3e2 (fix(iflow): fill reasoning_content when thinking field is implicit).
close_reason: iflow reasoning_content compatibility fix merged at llmswitch-core compat action + regressions/replay verified

title: release note: iflow reasoning_content compat fix
description:
Prepare a concise release note for the iflow kimi reasoning_content 400 fix and track it in bd.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: Include symptom, root cause, single implementation point, and non-hack scope.
AC2: Include regression coverage (new replay fixture/script + matrix hook).
AC3: Include validation evidence and commit references (routecodex + sharedmodule).
AC4: Close issue with published note text in bd notes.
notes:
Release Note (2026-02-06)

Title
- iflow/kimi tool_call reasoning_content compatibility hardening (responses→chat path)

What was fixed
- Symptom: iflow kimi-k2.5 requests intermittently failed with HTTP 400: "thinking is enabled but reasoning_content is missing in assistant tool call message".
- Root cause: on responses→chat bridge path, top-level thinking may be absent, but upstream Kimi still enforces reasoning_content on assistant tool_call messages. Previous logic only injected when thinking was explicitly enabled.

Single implementation point
- llmswitch-core compat action (no virtual-router/provider transport hacks):
  - src/conversion/compat/actions/iflow-kimi-thinking-reasoning-fill.ts
- Behavior now: for kimi-k2.5, fill assistant.tool_call reasoning_content by default; skip only when thinking is explicitly disabled (false/off/disabled).

Regression coverage
- Added replay fixture + script for this sample family:
  - tests/fixtures/compat/iflow-reasoning-missing-sample-20260206.json
  - scripts/tests/compat-iflow-reasoning-replay-20260206.mjs
- Enhanced targeted compat regressions:
  - scripts/tests/compat-iflow-thinking-reasoning-content.mjs
  - scripts/tests/compat-profile-auto-resolve.mjs
- Hooked into matrix:
  - scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs

Evidence
- Failing sample request lineage: openai-responses-unknown-unknown-20260206T214322604-018
- Replay outcome: missing reasoning_content before > 0; after iflow compat = 0; control provider unchanged.
- Verification passed:
  - sharedmodule: npm run build
  - sharedmodule: compat replay + compat regressions
  - routecodex: npm run build && npm run install:global

Commits
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: 06ea3e2
- routecodex (bd record): 807cc440c

RouteCodex bd release-note commit: 3ad3c2c76 (pushed to origin/main).
close_reason: release note captured in bd with evidence and commit refs

title: vision media routing to kimi-k2.5 + history media placeholder scrub
description:
Implement new vision behavior: if kimi-k2.5 is configured, image/video requests should route directly to kimi-k2.5; for kimi outbound requests, scrub historical image/video base64 payloads with placeholders while preserving latest user turn media content.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: Media detection covers image and video, and still only uses latest user turn as trigger.
AC2: Router prefers kimi-k2.5 targets for media requests when configured, without virtual-router hacks.
AC3: iflow chat compat for kimi-k2.5 scrubs historical media inline base64 to placeholders, preserves latest user media.
AC4: Add regressions for routing + compat scrub + latest-turn-only behavior.
AC5: Build/tests pass and replay evidence recorded in bd.
notes: 2026-02-06 复核：已重新执行验证。1) sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: npm run build 通过（matrix 中包含 matrix:virtual-router-media-kimi-route 与 matrix:compat-iflow-kimi-history-media-placeholder 均 ok）；2) routecodex: npm run build:dev 通过（包含 install:global 与 verify 流程）；3) targeted scripts 复跑：node scripts/tests/virtual-router-media-kimi-route.mjs ok、node scripts/tests/compat-iflow-kimi-history-media-placeholder.mjs ok。结论：媒体(图片+视频)请求优先 kimi-k2.5（若配置存在），且仅 latest user turn 触发；iflow/kimi 请求历史媒体 base64 已占位化，latest 媒体保留原样。
close_reason: vision media routing + kimi history media placeholder implemented and verified

title: Refactor apply_patch repair flow into action pipeline
description:
Refactor current apply_patch repair/normalization path to a config-driven action pipeline using skeleton + parameters, split into small modules, and keep behavior compatible.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: apply_patch request repair flow is orchestrated by ordered actions (single entry orchestrator).
AC2: each repair concern is moved to dedicated small module implementing action interface.
AC3: action execution is configurable via params, not hardcoded branching in monolith.
AC4: existing apply_patch regression scenarios continue passing, including invalid_json/gnu diff normalization cases.
AC5: add/update tests to cover action pipeline + at least one action-level behavior.
notes:

title: stop_message followup to iflow hits repeated 514 model error
description:
Observed: stop_message_flow followup requests to iflow(kimi-k2.5/openai-chat) frequently fail with iFlow business error 514 (model error), especially with long conversation history.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: locate single canonical stage where followup payload size/history is controlled (no virtual router/provider hacks).
AC2: for stop_message_flow followup, trim OpenAI-style history before append stop message, preserving tool adjacency/user anchor semantics.
AC3: make trim threshold configurable by parameter/env with safe default.
AC4: add targeted regression proving followup payload is trimmed and preserves stop_message append behavior.
AC5: run sharedmodule build matrix + host build:dev and record replay/control evidence in bd notes.
notes:
2026-02-07 verification/evidence:
1) Single-point fix lives in llmswitch-core servertool stop_message handler (no provider/router hacks): src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts.
2) Followup trim is configurable via env ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_FOLLOWUP_MAX_NON_SYSTEM_MESSAGES; safe default tightened to 12.
3) Regression: scripts/tests/stop-message-followup-iflow-trim.mjs + matrix hook in scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs.
4) Build/test: sharedmodule npm run build passed (matrix includes [matrix:stop-message-followup-iflow-trim] ok). routecodex npm run build:dev passed, including install:global, mock regressions, blackbox parity, verify:apply-patch, verify:exec-command.
5) Replay evidence (same-shape/control):
   - same-shape replay against running routecodex using captured __raw_request_body from sample openai-responses-iflow.1-186.kimi-k2.5-kimi-k2.5-20260207T100636992-003_stop_followup returned status=200 (saved /tmp/replay-iflow-same-shape.json).
   - control replay returned status=200 (saved /tmp/replay-control-unaffected.json).
6) Sample trend check under ~/.routecodex/codex-samples/openai-responses/*iflow* shows newer stop_followup requests reduced from ~400KB/230 msgs to ~170KB/52 msgs after trim logic, with successful followups observed.
7) Note: remaining iFlow 514s also appear on non-stop-followup base requests with very large histories (>500KB), which is adjacent but outside this stop_message-only issue scope.
2026-02-07 correction: prior stopMessage-followup history trimming approach has been reverted per product direction ("不能裁剪历史"). Active fix path moved to routecodex-70 using iflow CLI parity in compat (thinking default + kimi defaults), without trimming history.

title: 默认配置支持环境变量 API Key（去明文）
description:
## Background
当前默认/示例配置鼓励在 config 中写入明文 apiKey；希望改为使用环境变量引用（例如 `${OPENAI_API_KEY}`），以便配置可分享/可进 repo。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 默认/示例/`routecodex init` 生成配置中，apikey 使用环境变量引用（`${VAR}`）而非明文/占位符。
- 运行时仅对 apikey 做引用解析：`${VAR}`/`VAR`/`authfile-*` 可解析为真实 secret；apikey 直写继续兼容。
- OAuth 行为不变（不新增/不改 env 解析）。
- env 缺失时 fail fast，报错包含缺失变量名。
- Jest 覆盖 `${VAR}` 解析、直写兼容、缺失 env 抛错。
notes:
Implemented apikey env resolution for provider runtime and httpserver middleware; updated init + configsamples to use ${ENV}.

Evidence:
- Jest: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/apikey-secret-resolution.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/httpserver-apikey-env-resolution.spec.ts
- Local migration: ~/.routecodex/config.json backed up and rewritten to use ${ENV}; exports appended to ~/.zshrc (no secrets in config after scan)
- Doc: docs/config-secrets.md
Implemented env-based apikey references (2026-02-04):
- httpserver.apikey supports ${VAR} with fail-fast 500 when missing env: src/server/runtime/http-server/middleware.ts
- Provider apikey auth.value supports ${VAR}/VAR/authfile-* references (resolved via resolveSecretValue): src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts
- init templates + configsamples now use ${*_API_KEY} instead of plaintext placeholders: src/cli/config/init-provider-catalog.ts + configsamples/*
- Docs: docs/config-secrets.md
- Tests: tests/server/http-server/apikey-secret-resolution.spec.ts + tests/server/http-server/httpserver-apikey-env-resolution.spec.ts
Verification:
- npm run build:dev (passed; includes install:global + e2e + blackbox antigravity parity).

title: rcc release: quiet-by-default logs/snapshots with env overrides
description:
## Background
Need to guarantee `rcc` release mode is quiet by default: no automatic snapshot recording, reduced non-error logs, and opt-in controls via env vars.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Audit and document release vs dev behavior for snapshots/logging across host + provider paths.
- [ ] In release mode, all snapshot writers default to no-op unless explicit env override enables them.
- [ ] In release mode, routine info/debug logs are suppressed by default while errors still surface.
- [ ] Existing env toggles continue to allow enabling snapshots/logging when needed.
- [ ] Add/adjust regression coverage for release gating behavior where feasible.
notes:
Implemented release-mode quiet defaults + env overrides:
- Snapshot gating hardening: src/providers/core/utils/snapshot-writer.ts (writeProviderRetrySnapshot/writeRepairFeedbackSnapshot/writeClientSnapshot now all respect runtimeFlags.snapshotsEnabled).
- Pipeline/provider console noise gating: src/modules/pipeline/utils/debug-logger.ts (release defaults quiet; opt-in via ROUTECODEX_PIPELINE_LOG_VERBOSE or RCC_PIPELINE_LOG_VERBOSE).
- Usage line gating: src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts (release defaults off; opt-in via ROUTECODEX_USAGE_LOG/RCC_USAGE_LOG).
- Stats persistence + summary gating: src/server/runtime/http-server/stats-manager.ts (release defaults no auto stats recording/printing; opt-in via ROUTECODEX_STATS_ENABLED/RCC_STATS_ENABLED and ROUTECODEX_STATS_VERBOSE/RCC_STATS_VERBOSE).
- Hub shadow compare default aligned: src/server/runtime/http-server/hub-shadow-compare.ts (dev on, release off; env override still works).

Verification evidence:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/core/utils/snapshot-writer.release-gating.spec.ts tests/modules/pipeline/utils/debug-logger.release.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/stats-manager.release.spec.ts (PASS: 3 suites / 5 tests).
- npm run install:global (PASS, includes build + global install + health/e2e check).
- npm run build:dev executed; build chain progressed but failed later at verify-client-headers with unrelated dist module path issue: Cannot find module dist/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.js imported by scripts/verify-client-headers.mjs.
2026-02-07: 调整 Unified Hub shadow compare 默认开关：默认仅在 rccx 包开启，其它包（routecodex/rcc）默认关闭，仍保留 env 覆盖。实现: src/server/runtime/http-server/hub-shadow-compare.ts（根据 ROUTECODEX_PACKAGE_NAME / npm_package_name / runtime package.json 解析包名）。新增回归: tests/server/runtime/http-server/hub-shadow-compare-config.spec.ts。验证: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/hub-shadow-compare-config.spec.ts tests/unified-hub/shadow-runtime-compare.errorsamples.spec.ts；ROUTECODEX_SKIP_AUTO_BUMP=1 BUILD_MODE=dev npm run build。
2026-02-07 (follow-up): stage-level runtime logs now default to concise mode even in dev.  keeps response/servertool info and all errors, suppresses provider/hub/request info spam unless verbose env is enabled (ROUTECODEX_STAGE_LOG_VERBOSE/RCC_STAGE_LOG_VERBOSE or PIPELINE_LOG_VERBOSE). Added regression: tests/server/utils/stage-logger.spec.ts (provider suppressed by default, response id-only, errors always shown, verbose override restores provider detail).
2026-02-07 correction: stage logger change is implemented in src/server/utils/stage-logger.ts via logPipelineStage filtering.
2026-02-07 (provider-noise): suppress provider request start/success and provider module info logs by default in dev; keep provider errors visible; add opt-in env ROUTECODEX_PROVIDER_LOG_VERBOSE/RCC_PROVIDER_LOG_VERBOSE. Added regression tests in tests/modules/pipeline/utils/debug-logger.dev-filter.spec.ts.

title: fix verify-client-headers dist import path
description:
## Background
`npm run build:dev` currently fails during `verify-client-headers` due to missing dist import: `dist/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.js`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Reproduce failure and identify root cause (script path vs emitted dist layout).
- [ ] Fix `scripts/verify-client-headers.mjs` to resolve the provider module reliably in both dev/release build outputs.
- [ ] Keep behavior unchanged for header verification assertions.
- [ ] Verify with targeted command and confirm `npm run build:dev` proceeds past `verify-client-headers` stage (or provide concrete evidence if blocked later by unrelated checks).
notes:
Root cause / hardening:
- `scripts/verify-client-headers.mjs` previously imported a single fixed dist path (`dist/providers/core/runtime/http-transport-provider.js`).
- Added robust candidate loading for dist module paths with existence checks and clearer aggregated error output, so verification tolerates `.js/.mjs/index.js` layout variations for both runtime modules.

Code change:
- scripts/verify-client-headers.mjs
  - `loadModule()` now accepts candidate paths and tries each via `fs.access` + dynamic import.
  - `HttpTransportProvider` and `provider-runtime-metadata` imports now use candidate lists.

Verification evidence:
- npm run verify:e2e-toolcall ✅ (includes `node scripts/verify-client-headers.mjs`; both header assertions passed).
- npm run build:dev attempted; blocked early by repo-sanity due pre-existing untracked file not related to this fix: `tests/server/runtime/http-server/hub-shadow-compare-config.spec.ts`.
close_reason: Hardened verify-client-headers module loading with dist path fallbacks and validated verification flow

title: StopMessage 多阶段状态机防循环设计
description:
目标：将 stopMessage 从单一通用 followup 文案改为分阶段状态机（stage-based）循环，降低“反复循环/套话”风险，同时保持可终止与可观测。

Acceptance Criteria
- AC1: 基于现有 codex-samples 与实现，明确当前循环触发模式与误解来源（证据化）。
- AC2: 给出多阶段 stopMessage 状态机设计（至少含阶段定义、转移条件、退出条件、计数规则）。
- AC3: 设计需兼容现有 stopMessageUsed/maxRepeats 与 sticky state，不引入跨层重复逻辑。
- AC4: 给出最小实现路径与回归测试方案（不先改 provider/router 语义）。
notes:
当前现状总结（样本+代码）：
1) ~/.routecodex/stopMessage/message1.md 与 message2.md 内容完全相同，当前并无“分阶段提示”差异。
2) stop_message_auto 当前 followup 只 append 同一 stopMessageText（sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts），未按状态切换提示词。
3) 样本证据：openai-responses-iflow.2-173...20260207T143853619-230_stop_followup 中 req_process_tool_filters_request_finalize.json 显示 messages=746，且尾部仍反复“assistant(tool_calls)->tool”循环；client-request.json 中 stopMessageState 显示 stopMessageMaxRepeats=3 但 stopMessageUsed=0，存在重复 re-arm/误解风险。
4) 结论：需要“阶段化提示+循环探测+二次观测后停机”机制，不能再靠单条通用文案。

实现与验证（2026-02-07）：
- llmswitch-core 新增 stopMessage 分阶段策略模块：src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-stage-policy.ts
  - 阶段A: status_probe（先查 bd 状态）
  - 阶段B: loop_self_check（检测循环并尝试跳出）
  - 连续同观测 >=2 次自动停止 followup；bd 状态判定 idle 时直接停止
  - 通过 ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_STAGE_MODE 控制（on/off/auto；默认 off，避免影响现有行为）
- stopMessage 状态扩展并持久化：
  - src/router/virtual-router/routing-instructions.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/stop-message-state-sync.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/types.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts
  - src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts
- 回归测试：
  - tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts 新增 staged 场景（阶段模板命中 + 重复观测停止）
  - tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts 新增 staged 元数据序列化回归
- 本地 stage message 文件已创建：
  - ~/.routecodex/stopMessage/stage-status-check.md
  - ~/.routecodex/stopMessage/stage-loop-self-check.md
  - ~/.routecodex/stopMessage/stage-stop.md
- 验证命令：
  - npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts
  - ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_STAGE_MODE=off npm -C /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/llmswitch-core run build
  - ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_STAGE_MODE=off npm run build:min
  - ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_STAGE_MODE=off npm run install:global

title: Qwen OAuth 登录后 token 不生效（tokenFile 解析/读取）
description:
## Problem
Qwen OAuth 认证成功后，后续请求仍提示未认证/需要重新登录；怀疑 token 已写入但运行时读取不到或 tokenFile alias 解析不一致。

## Suspected Root Cause
- daemon-admin / oauth-lifecycle 支持 tokenFile=alias（例如 default），会写入 ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-<seq>-<alias>.json
- TokenFileAuthProvider 将 tokenFile=alias 当作路径处理，且无 tokenFile 时默认只找 ~/.routecodex/tokens/qwen-default.json，导致找不到刚写入的 auth 目录 token

## Acceptance Criteria
- TokenFileAuthProvider 支持 tokenFile=alias（与 oauth-lifecycle 一致），可读取 ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-<seq>-<alias>.json（优先最新 seq）
- TokenFileAuthProvider 无 tokenFile 时，优先读取 ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth.json 及 auth 目录下 qwen-oauth-*.json（兼容 daemon oauth 授权）
- 增加 Jest 回归测试覆盖上述行为
notes:
Root cause confirmed: daemon-admin/oauth-lifecycle persists Qwen OAuth tokens under ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth-<seq>-<alias>.json (or alias-based), but TokenFileAuthProvider treated tokenFile=alias as a path and (when tokenFile missing) only searched ~/.routecodex/tokens/qwen-default.json / ~/.cli-proxy-api, so it never found the saved token.

Fix:
- TokenFileAuthProvider now supports tokenFile=alias (no / and no .json) -> resolves to latest seq file in auth dir for that alias.
- For qwen, if tokenFile points to legacy ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth.json but file missing, fall back to latest qwen-oauth-*.json.
- For qwen with no tokenFile, prefer ~/.routecodex/auth/qwen-oauth.json then latest qwen-oauth-*.json.

Evidence:
- Jest: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.qwen-alias.spec.ts
- dist sanity: node -e "import { TokenFileAuthProvider } from "./dist/providers/auth/tokenfile-auth.js"; ..." now shows isValid=true for tokenFile=default and builds Authorization header.
close_reason: TokenFileAuthProvider 支持 qwen tokenFile alias 并扫描 ~/.routecodex/auth，修复登录后不生效

title: Bug: stop_followup nested/loop after timeout on longcontext
description: In /v1/responses longcontext route, when a previous request times out, stop_message_flow followup logs show repeated completion for same requestId(:stop_followup). Must prevent nested/looped followup orchestration and duplicate completion emissions.
acceptance_criteria:
- Same requestId may execute stop_message_flow at most once per followup attempt.
- No repeated progress 5/5 completion spam for a single requestId.
- Timeout on prior request does not trigger nested followup loop in next request path.
- Add regression test for timeout + followup reentry guard.
notes:
Fix implemented (2026-02-07):
- Root cause: stop_message_flow could re-trigger inside followup hops, causing nested stop_followup chains and repeated completion logs.
- Behavior aligned: once stopMessage followup request is emitted, that cycle ends; followup response is treated as a new response and must not retrigger stop_message_flow in same nested hop.
- Code: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts (serverToolFollowup=true => skip).
- Validation: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts (pass).
- Windows install fix: replace chmod-based postbuild/postinstall with node scripts/ensure-cli-executable.mjs (skip chmod on win32).

title: stopMessage stage-mode via instruction + routing-instructions skeleton split
description:

Acceptance Criteria:

title: stopMessage switch activation validation and clear semantics
description:
Scope:
- stopMessage should support simple on/off switch activation.
- activation via switch must validate stage message files completeness before enabling.
- clear command clears all stopMessage state; switch off can be used to disable/clear active stopMessage flow.

Acceptance Criteria:
AC1: stopMessage mode=on (or stopMessage:on) validates required stage templates and fails fast when missing.
AC2: mode off disables stopMessage followup behavior and can clear active stopMessage payload state.
AC3: stopMessage:clear clears all persisted stopMessage fields.
AC4: add regression for mode parse/apply and activation validation.
AC5: sharedmodule build(matrix) + routecodex build:dev + install:global pass.
notes:
Implemented (sharedmodule commit 4ba78fc, pushed main):
- Added strict template validation for stopMessage switch activation in virtual-router engine:
  mode=on now validates required stage message files (status/active/loop) before activation.
  Missing/invalid files fail fast with CONFIG_ERROR.
- Added reusable template loader/validator module:
  src/router/virtual-router/stop-message-stage-template-files.ts
- Updated stage policy semantics:
  mode=off now returns stop decision (`stopReason: mode_off`) to disable followup flow.
- Updated stopMessage mode actions:
  stopMessage:off clears active stopMessage payload state while keeping mode marker off;
  stopMessage:clear clears all stopMessage state.
- Added regressions:
  scripts/tests/stop-message-stage-mode-routing.mjs (off/clear semantics)
  scripts/tests/stop-message-stage-activation-validation.mjs (mode=on completeness gate)
  matrix hook in scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs
- Host test alignment:
  tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts default stage mode set to auto (off now intentionally disables flow).

Verification:
1) sharedmodule npm run build ✅ (matrix includes new stage-activation validation).
   report: /Users/fanzhang/Documents/github/sharedmodule/test-results/llmswitch-core/matrix-ci-1770451851911.json
2) routecodex targeted: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts ✅
3) routecodex full: npm run build:dev ✅ (includes install:global + verification stack)
4) routecodex global install: via build:dev and standalone install:global both passed.
close_reason: switch activation gating + clear semantics + regressions validated

title: stopMessage: real bd status mode
description:
## Context
当前 stopMessage 阶段策略仅基于消息文本启发式识别 bd 状态，需要增加真实 bd 命令查询模式。

## Acceptance Criteria
- stopMessage 阶段策略支持真实 bd 查询（优先使用 `bd --no-db ready --json` 获取状态）。
- 在 bd 可用且输出可解析时，阶段决策以真实结果为准（active/idle）。
- 在 bd 不可用或命令失败时，自动回退现有启发式，不影响现有流程。
- 新增回归测试覆盖：真实 bd JSON 输出 active/idle 解析、失败回退。
- `tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts` 通过。
notes:
Implemented real BD mode for stopMessage stage policy in llmswitch-core:
- Added runtime BD query path (`bd --no-db list/ready --json`) with mode control: ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_BD_MODE=auto|runtime|heuristic.
- Added fallback to heuristic when runtime command fails in auto mode.
- Added cache/timeout/workdir controls: ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_BD_CACHE_TTL_MS, ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_BD_TIMEOUT_MS, ROUTECODEX_STOPMESSAGE_BD_WORKDIR.
- Added test helpers: resolveBdWorkStateFromRuntime + resetStopMessageBdRuntimeCacheForTests.

Regression evidence:

   npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts --runInBand

4) host validation:
   npm run build:dev -> PASS (includes install:global and verification stack).

title: Dev stage logs: print all pipeline stages
description:
## Context

  - Non-verbose default now prints all stage scopes except response.sse.*; keeps details hidden unless verbose/error.

Verification:

title: stopMessage shorthand activation not triggering for '<**stopMessage:on**>text'
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Parsing `<**stopMessage:on**>继续` creates an armed stopMessage config (text=继续, mode=on, maxRepeats default 10).
- Parsing `<**stopMessage:on,3**>继续` sets maxRepeats=3.
- Parsing `<**stopMessage:on,3**>` (without trailing text) remains mode-only and does not force text.
- Existing routing instruction cleaning still strips `<**...**>` markers from outbound user text.
- Regression tests and sharedmodule matrix pass.
notes:
Root cause confirmed from codex samples + parser path:
- `<**stopMessage:on**>继续` was parsed as `stopMessageMode` only (no text), so stop_message_auto skipped when session had no armed `stopMessageText`.
- `stopMessage:on,3` repeat value was not persisted in mode-only path.

Fix implemented:
1) `routing-stop-message-parser.ts` supports shorthand activation: mode+trailing text => `stopMessageSet` with text from trailing segment; default max=10 when omitted.
2) `routing-instructions.ts` extracts trailing user text per marker and passes into stopMessage parser.
3) `routing-stop-message-actions.ts` now applies `stopMessageMaxRepeats` in mode instructions.
4) `engine.ts` persists mode-only repeat updates to session-scoped stopMessage state.
5) Updated matrix script `scripts/tests/stop-message-shorthand-parse.mjs` to new expected behavior.
6) Added routecodex regression tests in `tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts`.

Validation evidence:
- `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS
- `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS
- `cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build` PASS (matrix included `matrix:stop-message-shorthand-parse`)
- Runtime parse spot-check:
  `<**stopMessage:on**>继续 => stopMessageSet(text=继续,max=10,mode=on)`
  `<**stopMessage:on,3**>继续 => stopMessageSet(text=继续,max=3,mode=on)`
  `<**stopMessage:on,3**> => stopMessageMode(mode=on,max=3)`
close_reason: stopMessage shorthand now arms state and repeat mode updates persist

  1) stopMessage shorthand parser now keeps only first effective line after `<**stopMessage:on**>` to avoid tail pollution like `[Time/Date]...`.
  2) stop_message_auto captured seed fallback chain added: `capturedChatRequest` -> `__rt.capturedChatRequest` -> `adapterContext.originalRequest`.
  3) Host response-conversion adapter context now injects `capturedChatRequest` from `originalRequest` when missing (both `request-executor.ts` and `index.ts`).

  - added parser regression for multiline shorthand tail stripping.

title: stopMessage tag-only parsing and continue_execution precedence
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- stopMessage parsing only uses content inside <** **> tags; trailing text after <**stopMessage:on,10**> is not parsed as stopMessage text.
- Existing stopMessage state should suppress continue_execution injection/directive, so stop_message_auto can trigger.
- Replay evidence includes requestId + server logs showing continue_execution skip and stop_message_auto matched.
close_reason: Implemented tag-only stopMessage mode parsing + continue_execution gating by persisted stopMessage state. Verified by replay req_1770468080531_a6b4f3dd with logs: skip_schema_due_stopmessage, skip_user_directive_due_stopmessage, and stop_message_auto matched/final for requestId openai-responses-antigravity.antonsoltan.claude-sonnet-4-5-thinking-claude-sonnet-4-5-thinking-20260207T204120532-001.

title: stopMessage mode-only uses staged BD selection
description:
## Context
<**stopMessage:on,10**> 应进入有状态 staged 回复，根据 BD 状态选择模板文本；不应强制回填 message1 或把 tag 外文本当 stopMessageText。

## Acceptance Criteria
- mode-only stopMessage 在无 stopMessageText 时仍可触发 staged policy（依赖 stage 模板+BD 状态）。
- 文本选择由 stage policy 决定（status_probe/active_continue/loop_self_check），而非默认 message1 回填。
- tag 外文本保持普通用户内容，不进入 stopMessageText。
- 增加/更新回归测试覆盖并通过。
notes:
- Root cause from latest codex sample (req_1770498806382_a967d276): mode-only `<**stopMessage:on,10**>` was parsed and armed in VR log, but `getStopMessageState()` returned null because it required non-empty stopMessageText.
- Because runtime snapshot was null, stop flow could fall through to `skip_no_state` on finish_reason=stop paths.
- Fix: allow mode-only armed state in runtime snapshot (`max>0` + `stageMode in on/auto` even when text empty), and prefer session/sticky candidate by armed-state predicate.
- Added regression: mode-only snapshot is non-null and carries `{ stopMessageStageMode:on, stopMessageMaxRepeats:10 }`.
- Verified by replaying sample through VirtualRouterEngine with sample metadata: snapshot now emitted for same shape.

title: stopMessage active but no servertool trigger when sessionId only in metadata
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- For request shapes where `adapterContext.sessionId` is empty but `adapterContext.metadata.sessionId` exists, stop_message_auto still resolves session scope and can trigger followup.
- Existing stopMessage behavior with direct `adapterContext.sessionId` remains unchanged.
- Regression test added and passing.
- Evidence includes failing sample requestId `openai-responses-iflow.2-173.kimi-k2.5-kimi-k2.5-20260207T210827095-018` with `servertool.match.json` passthrough before fix.
notes:
- Reproduced from sample: `~/.routecodex/codex-samples/openai-responses/iflow.2-173.kimi-k2.5/req_1770469707095_a62605fe/servertool.match.json` => `{matched:false, mode:"passthrough"}` while virtual-router hit still shows active stopMessage.
- Root cause: stop_message_auto resolved sticky scope only from top-level adapterContext sessionId/conversationId; missed nested metadata/originalRequest/runtime fields.
close_reason: Patched stop_message_auto scope resolution to read session/conversation from metadata/originalRequest/runtime fallback and gated persistence when no sticky key; added regression test and verified.

title: stopMessage stop-signal capture hardening and entry/trigger logging
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- When servertool receives stop-like completion (finish_reason=stop|length or responses completed), it always prints stop entry log regardless of whether stop_message_auto activates.
- stop_message_auto trigger status is always printed (activated/non_stop_flow/skipped_*).
- stop finish detection scans all choices, not only first choice.
- Regression tests cover metadata session scope + multi-choice stop + stop entry/skip logging.
notes:
- Added unconditional stop entry/trigger lifecycle logs in servertool orchestration for observed stop signals.
- Hardened stop detection to scan all choices and avoid first-choice miss.
- Added regression tests for metadata.sessionId scope, multi-choice stop, and stop entry skipped logging.
close_reason: Implemented and verified stopMessage stop capture hardening + lifecycle logs.

title: stopMessage stop-gateway hook pipeline refactor
description:
## Success Criteria
- stop 信号判定只有一个网关（single source of truth），stopMessage/clock/empty-reply 等均复用同一判定结果。
- stopMessage 触发入口改为 hook + 执行列表（declarative execution plan），避免 handler 内部散落的重复条件分支。
- 响应侧 servertool 调度顺序可配置且可观测（match/miss/reason）。
- 保持现有 stopMessage/continue_execution 行为兼容，并提供回归测试。
notes:
Proposed unified design (2026-02-07):
- Introduce StopGatewayContext computed once in servertool orchestration (single stop parser output).
- Introduce declarative auto-hook list: id, phase, priority, predicate(ctx), execute(ctx).
- Move stopMessage/clock/empty-reply predicates to hook predicates that consume StopGatewayContext (no duplicate finish_reason parsing in handlers).
- Preserve current behavior via legacy adapter + shadow comparison mode before cutover.
- Align continue_execution suppression with mode-only stopMessage armed state (stageMode on/auto + maxRepeats > 0).
- Add matrix regressions for chat/responses/messages, followup nesting boundaries, and mode-only staged policy.
Status sync: routecodex-98.7 has been moved back to in_progress for continued regression/verification and issue tracking.

title: Audit current stop interception paths
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- 输出 stop 信号从 provider response 到 servertool handler 的完整调用链。
- 标注必经路径、旁路路径、重复判定点。
- 给出需要收敛的判定函数清单。
notes:
Code audit findings (2026-02-07):
1) Stop interception gateway currently lives in llmswitch-core response stage: convertProviderResponse -> runServerToolOrchestration (sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/response/provider-response.ts).
2) Not a single logic path today: stop判定在 orchestration.inspectStopSignal、stop-message-auto.isStopFinishReason、clock-auto.isStopFinishReason 三处重复实现。
3) Auto handler dispatch uses registration order (registry array), first-match-wins; no declarative priority/predicate list yet.
4) continue_execution 抑制 stopMessage 的判定依赖 hasActiveStopMessageStateForContinueExecution，目前要求 stopMessageText 存在，mode-only stopMessage 未被视为 active（需与 stage-mode语义对齐）。
5) Host side has duplicate response-conversion wrappers (index.ts / request-executor.ts / executor-response.ts), increasing drift risk for stop gateway guarantees.
Audit complete with concrete path mapping and duplicate-point inventory. Evidence captured from code paths in: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/response/provider-response.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/engine.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/clock-auto.ts, sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/process/chat-process.ts, src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts.

close_reason: done

title: Introduce StopGatewayContext in servertool engine
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- 在 servertool orchestration 中生成 StopGatewayContext（stopObserved/eligible/source/reason/hasToolCalls）。
- auto handler 通过 context 读取 stop 判定，不再各自解析 finish_reason/status。
- 保留兼容层并补测试。
notes:
Implemented (partial, code landed in sharedmodule/llmswitch-core):
- Added unified stop gateway module: src/servertool/stop-gateway-context.ts (single parser + context attach/read APIs).
- servertool orchestration now computes stop signal once and writes StopGatewayContext into runtime metadata before handler dispatch.
- stop_message_auto and clock_auto now consume isStopEligibleForServerTool(base, adapterContext) instead of local finish_reason/status parsing for trigger gating.
- Next step: complete migration for remaining auto flows that still read finish_reason/status directly where applicable (e.g. empty-reply nuanced trigger), then close.
Completed StopGatewayContext migration for orchestration trigger path and core auto handlers. Evidence: src/servertool/stop-gateway-context.ts, src/servertool/engine.ts, src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts, src/servertool/handlers/clock-auto.ts, src/servertool/handlers/gemini-empty-reply-continue.ts.

title: Refactor auto handlers to hook list
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- auto handlers 声明 hook metadata（id, phase, priority, predicate, execute）。
- servertool 执行器按执行列表运行并记录 match/miss/reason。
- stopMessage 作为一个 hook 节点接入，行为保持一致。
notes: Hook-list skeleton landed with deterministic metadata + execution trace callback. Evidence: src/servertool/registry.ts (listAutoServerToolHooks), src/servertool/server-side-tools.ts (auto hook execution + trace), src/servertool/types.ts (onAutoHookTrace), src/servertool/engine.ts (hook trace recording).

title: Align continue_execution precedence with mode-only stopMessage
description:

description:

Added regression coverage for hook pipeline extension: tests/servertool/pre-command-hooks.spec.ts covers pre-command phase trace + jq transform ordering + invalid jq fallback.

title: Pre-command hook registry for tool_call interception
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- Add a pre-command hook stage in servertool tool_call path (before handler execution), keeping existing skeleton unchanged.
- Hooks are registration-driven and deterministic (priority/order), with trace output for match/miss/error.
- Add jq-based argument transform support for exec_command pre-hooks, configurable from JSON file under ~/.routecodex (or env override).
- Keep passthrough semantics: pre-hook may transform tool-call args but must not consume/execute client tools.
- Add targeted tests for hook ordering + jq transform + invalid hook behavior fallback.
- Document a shell+jq registration example aligned with Claude Code PreToolUse style semantics (best-effort parity).
notes:
Analysis: align with Claude Code PreToolUse-style hook semantics (command interception before tool execution, deterministic ordering, non-blocking by default). References checked: docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/hooks and docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/settings. Planned shape: registration-driven pre-command hooks in llmswitch-core tool_call path, jq transform support, trace events (match/miss/error), passthrough semantics preserved.
Implemented pre-command hook registration in tool_call interception path. Core changes: sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/pre-command-hooks.ts (config loader + priority ordering + jq/shell actions + trace), sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/server-side-tools.ts (invoke pre hooks before tool handler dispatch, patch tool-call args in-place, emit hook traces), docs/SERVERTOOL_PRE_COMMAND_HOOKS.md (config + shell+jq registration examples).
Validation evidence: 1) cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build (matrix postbuild passed). 2) cd routecodex && npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/pre-command-hooks.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-auto-hook-trace.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-progress-logging.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/chat-semantics-stage1.spec.ts --runInBand (36 passed). 3) cd routecodex && npm run build:min (pass). 4) cd routecodex && npm run install:global (pass).

title: Precommand instruction activation via <**precommand**>
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- Parse routing instruction syntax for precommand activation, including <**precommand:<file://precommand/...>**> and clear semantics.
- Persist precommand state in routing instruction state and propagate to __rt metadata through hub pipeline (same skeleton as stopMessage).
- Enforce script path safety: only files under ~/.routecodex/precommand are allowed (support ROUTECODEX_USER_DIR override in tests).
- Tool-call pre-command hook stage consumes active precommand state and executes target script before handler dispatch.
- Add targeted regression tests for parse/state serialization/runtime propagation/execution and clear behavior.
- Keep existing JSON pre-command hook config as fallback when no precommand state is active.
notes:
Implemented precommand activation via routing instruction and runtime pre-tool hook execution.

Code changes (sharedmodule/llmswitch-core):
- Added precommand parser/state stack:
  - src/router/virtual-router/pre-command-file-resolver.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/routing-pre-command-parser.ts

  - src/router/virtual-router/engine/routing-state/store.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/types.ts
  - src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts
- Propagated preCommandState to runtime metadata (__rt):
  - src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts
- Wired pre-tool-call consumption from __rt.preCommandState:
  - src/servertool/server-side-tools.ts
  - src/servertool/pre-command-hooks.ts

Host tests/docs updates (routecodex):
- tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts
- tests/servertool/pre-command-hooks.spec.ts
- docs/SERVERTOOL_PRE_COMMAND_HOOKS.md

Validation:

2) cd routecodex && npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/pre-command-hooks.spec.ts tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-auto-hook-trace.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-progress-logging.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/chat-semantics-stage1.spec.ts --runInBand (57 passed)
3) cd routecodex && npm run build:min (pass)
4) cd routecodex && npm run install:global (pass, dev global smoke pass)

title: ServerTool two-queue auto hooks (A/B)
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- Auto hook execution is split into Queue A (optional priority match) and Queue B (mandatory fallback sequence).
- Queue A order is empty_reply_continue -> stop_message_auto -> clock_auto.
- Queue B supports ordered execution and currently allows an empty list without behavior change.
- Engine trace/log includes queue name and hook decision for both queues.
- Regression tests cover queue order and B fallback invocation conditions.
notes:
- Implemented two-queue auto hook runner in servertool engine path:
  - Queue A (optional): pre hooks + explicit primary order empty_reply_continue -> stop_message_auto -> clock_auto + remaining hooks
  - Queue B (mandatory): reserved ordered list (currently empty, no behavior change)
- Added queue metadata to hook trace events and log payload: queue, queueIndex, queueTotal.
- Added stale-stop replay guard in virtual-router engine: stale stopMessage commands from non-latest marker are ignored once session already has active/lifecycle stop state, preventing clear/consumed re-arm while preserving first-time recovery.
- Parser keeps stopMessage command extraction from latest marker message (inside <** **> only), allowing mode-only arming from codex sample shape.

title: Parse stopMessage from latest user even with trailing tool messages
description: stopMessage marker should only be parsed from the latest message when that last message is a user message. Historical markers must not be re-parsed. Add release-visible stopMessage parse logging with requestId.
acceptance_criteria:
- stopMessage parsing only inspects the last message when it is user (no historical re-parse)
- stopMessage marker in latest user (e.g. <**stopMessage:"...",ai:on,20**>) updates routing state
- stopMessage parse log prints with requestId whenever stopMessage is present
- regression test covers latest-user parse + marker strip
notes:
Evidence (2026-02-28):
- Updated stopMessage parse log w/ requestId in llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/engine.ts.
- Regression: node scripts/tests/stop-message-marker-clean-and-reactivate.mjs (pass, stop_message_parse logs emitted).
- Sharedmodule build: npm run build (matrix passed).
- Host build: npm run build:dev (global install + e2e checks passed).
close_reason: stopMessage parsing restricted to last user only, stop_message_parse log w/ requestId added, regression test + builds passed.

title: stopMessage lifecycle simulation and round accounting
description:
Acceptance Criteria
- stopMessage tag parsing only reads `<**...**>` body; text outside tag never enters stopMessage state.
- Armed state persists with max/used counters and is visible in per-request logs (used/max/remaining/active).
- Each stop-triggered followup increments used and synchronizes memory + persisted state.
- When used reaches max, state is cleaned from memory and persisted snapshot in same cycle.
- Add simulation/regression tests covering set -> trigger loop -> cleanup and verify servertool JSON/file logs include compare and rounds.
notes:
Implemented and verified stopMessage lifecycle cycle: parse(<**...**>) -> arm/persist -> trigger count -> max cleanup.
Evidence:
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/routing-stop-message-parser.ts (mode-only default max=10).
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/router/virtual-router/routing-stop-message-actions.ts (mode command rearm/reset counters).
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/stop-message-auto.ts (sync+async persist helper + compare rounds).
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/stop-message-compare-context.ts (left/active fields in compare logs).
- tests/servertool/servertool-progress-logging.spec.ts lifecycle simulation + compare assertions.
- tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts mode-only persistence assertion.
Validation:
- npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-progress-logging.spec.ts tests/servertool/stopmessage-session-scope.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.spec.ts --runInBand
- cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core && npm run build
- cd routecodex && npm run build:dev (includes install:global).
close_reason: Implemented stopMessage full lifecycle with round logs and persistence sync

title: 402 insufficient_quota：blacklistUntil(resetAt) + quota=0
description:

- quota=0
- cooldown/blacklistUntil=resetAt（优先用 upstream resetAt）

- 通过 /daemon/control/snapshot 可观察到 cooldown/blacklistUntil。
notes:

title: WebUI QuotaPool Reset 未清 model-capacity cooldown
description:
现象：daemon-admin WebUI 的 Quota Pool 多选 provider 后点 Reset，只重置 quotaState，但 provider 仍显示不可用（cooldown/类似黑名单），导致 VirtualRouter 继续不选它。

复现：WebUI → Quota Pool → 勾选多个 provider → Reset → 刷新后仍看到 reason=cooldown:model-capacity 或 cooldownUntil 仍在未来。

原因：ProviderQuotaDaemonModule.resetProvider() 没有清理 ProviderModelBackoffTracker(modelBackoff) 的 capacity backoff；quotaView 会把 modelBackoff 叠加成 cooldownUntil/reason，从而继续 gate selection。
acceptance_criteria: 1) Reset(单个/多选) 后，若仅因为 modelBackoff 导致 cooldown，则 quotaView(providerKey).cooldownUntil 变为 null 且 reason=ok。\n2) Recover 也同样清理 modelBackoff。\n3) 回归测试覆盖：resetProvider clears modelBackoff.
notes:
Fix implemented (2026-02-04):
- Clear modelBackoff on reset/recover so cooldown:model-capacity doesn’t persist after WebUI Reset.
- Code: src/manager/modules/quota/provider-quota-daemon.model-backoff.ts (add clearAll), src/manager/modules/quota/provider-quota-daemon.ts (reset/resetProvider/recoverProvider).
- Test: tests/manager/quota/provider-quota-daemon-module.spec.ts (resetProvider clears modelBackoff).
Verification:
- npm run build:dev (passed; includes install:global + e2e + mock:regressions + blackbox antigravity parity).
Delivered:
- Commit: 1b9290035
- Verified via npm run build:dev (includes install:global + mock:regressions + test:blackbox-antigravity-parity).

title: daemon-admin: Reset provider-quota module 按钮在新架构无效
description:
现象：daemon-admin WebUI 的按钮 "Reset provider-quota module" 调用 /daemon/modules/provider-quota/reset，但当前进程只注册 quota 模块（id=quota），未注册 provider-quota 模块（id=provider-quota），导致点击后无效果（module not found）。

预期：该按钮用于清理 quotaView 的 cooldown/blacklist（包括手动 offline + 429 退避等本地状态），让 VirtualRouter 重新可选。

处理：在 /daemon/modules/:id/reset 中为 id=provider-quota 且 module 不存在时做显式 fallback：调用 quota.getAdminSnapshot() 枚举 providerKeys，并逐个 quota.resetProvider(key) + persistNow，再 refreshNow 以便 antigravity 立即回拉真实配额。
acceptance_criteria: 1) 当 provider-quota module 不存在时，POST /daemon/modules/provider-quota/reset 返回 200 且 body.fallback.kind=quota.reset-all。\n2) fallback 会对 snapshot 中所有 providerKeys 调用 resetProvider，并触发 persistNow。\n3) Jest 覆盖该 fallback 行为。
notes:
Implemented fallback (2026-02-04):
- When POST /daemon/modules/provider-quota/reset hits 404 (module absent), server now falls back to quota module: enumerate providerKeys via getAdminSnapshot, call resetProvider for each, persistNow, then refreshNow.
- Code: src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin/status-handler.ts (reset route).
- Test: tests/server/daemon-admin/status-handler-reset-provider-quota-fallback.spec.ts (covers cookie auth + fallback).
Evidence:
- Jest: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/daemon-admin/status-handler-reset-provider-quota-fallback.spec.ts (pass).
- Verified via npm run build:dev (pass, includes install:global + blackbox antigravity parity).
- Commit: ae5e94b6f

title: Selection engine：算法/数据分离（pool 复用）

- 算法：纯函数 + 可测试
- 数据：quotaView、targets、session binding（如需要）
目标：不同 pool 只换配置，不换算法实现。
acceptance_criteria:
- 同一 selection engine 可服务多个 pool（只通过 config/inputs 区分）。
- 新增/调整策略不需要改动 provider 层。
- 为关键分支提供单测（至少 3 例：round-robin、随机、优先级）。
notes:

title: 移除 sticky + session binding 规则重做（claude/gemini）
description:
当前 sticky/健康度策略导致某些模型永远不会被命中。需要：
- 移除 sticky 作为路由算法的隐式副作用（改为显式 session lease / binding 规则）
- 绑定前提：首次成功响应后才绑定
- 解绑触发：quota=0、alias 被 blacklist/cooldown、手动解绑、持久化缺失/失败、reset 后可重新绑定
- 新 session 必须可重新绑定
acceptance_criteria:
- thinking pool 中 claude/gemini 可在满足可用性时被轮询命中。
- quota=0 或 blacklist 时会解绑并跳过该 target。
- 绑定/解绑事件在日志与 control snapshot 可观测。
notes: 拆分为子任务 x7e.3.3.1~（实现/验证/持久化分离）。

title: Session binding：首次成功绑定 + quota/blacklist 解绑
description:
实现 claude/gemini 的 session lease/binding 核心规则：
- 只有首次成功响应后才绑定到 target
- 解绑触发：quota=0、blacklistUntil/cooldown、alias blacklist、手动解绑
- 解绑后允许在新请求重新绑定

注意：不依赖持久化（持久化单独任务）。
acceptance_criteria:
- thinking pool 中 claude/gemini 在可用时可被轮询命中（不再“永远不会命中”）。
- quota=0 或 blacklist 时立即解绑并跳过。
- 日志与 control snapshot 可观测绑定/解绑。
notes:
完成/补齐可观测性：
- VirtualRouterEngine 仅在 provider success 时 commit session binding（已有）；补充 stage log：绑定 commit / quotaView 触发 release/unpin（env: ROUTECODEX_STAGE_LOG）。
- Control plane snapshot 暴露 antigravity alias leases（best-effort 读取 ~/.routecodex/state/antigravity-alias-leases.json）：GET /daemon/control/snapshot -> routing.antigravityAliasLeases。
- 测试：tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts 覆盖 snapshot 读取 leases 文件；回归：npm run test:routing-instructions 通过。

title: Session binding：持久化/重启恢复 + 无持久化解绑

- 重启后恢复 binding（如果持久化可用）
- 无持久化/持久化失败时：按规则解绑（避免粘住不可用 target）
- 与 quota resetAt 到期后的重新绑定行为对齐
acceptance_criteria:
- 重启后 binding 状态符合预期（有/无持久化两种路径）。
- 持久化缺失不会导致某 target 永久粘住。
- 有针对性的回归测试覆盖。

title: Antigravity 队列：单活跃 alias + 短冷却(<=3min)不切换
description: 在 quotaView 模式下，antigravity 的 alias 调度改为按队列(如 gemini-3-pro / gemini-3-flash / claude) 单活跃：当 head alias 仍有 quota 时，该队列只调度该 alias；若出现 cooldown 且剩余<=3min，不切换；剩余>3min 或黑名单/出池则切换到下一个 alias，并将被切换 alias 放到队尾。
acceptance_criteria:
- 新增 config: virtualrouter.loadBalancing.aliasSelection.antigravitySingleActiveQueuesEnabled=true 时生效（默认不改变现有 sticky-queue）。
- 短冷却阈值可配置（默认 180000ms）。
- quotaView 下：短冷却(<=阈值)不切换 alias；长冷却(>阈值)/blacklist/out-of-pool 会切换并入队尾。
- 增加 llmswitch-core 单测覆盖短/长冷却行为。
notes:

title: LM Studio /v1/responses SSE 无 event: 时兼容 data.type + 错误可感知
description:
Problem
- 走 lmstudio(type=responses) 时，LM Studio 上游 SSE 常见只发 data: {"type": "response.*"} 而不带 event: 行。
- llmswitch-core responses SSE→JSON 转换将缺省 event 视为 "message"，不在 allowedEventTypes 内，导致 SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR（terminated），客户端侧只看到断流/不明错误（例如 [object Object]）。

Acceptance Criteria
1) llmswitch-core SSE parser/转换器在缺失 event: 行时，能从 data JSON 的 type 字段推导事件类型，并完成 responses SSE→JSON 转换（至少覆盖 response.output_item.added / response.completed / error）。
2) 若仍发生 SSE→JSON 转换失败，routecodex 需要在已开始 SSE streaming 的情况下向客户端写出标准 error event（不再静默断流）。
3) 添加回归测试：输入为不带 event: 的 SSE frame，断言能得到正确事件或可预期错误。

Evidence
- ~/.routecodex/state/router/*/health.jsonl 中出现 code=SSE_TO_JSON_ERROR, stage=provider.http，target=lmstudio.*(process=chat, protocol=openai-responses)。
- 路由日志：virtual-router-hit -> lmstudio[key1].qwen3-coder-next-mlx, outboundStream=true。
notes:
Fix
- llmswitch-core SSE parser: when `event:` is missing (defaults to "message"), infer event type from `data.type` (only if it is an allowed event type).
- routecodex SSE stream error handler: emit OpenAI-style SSE `event: error` payload {type,status,error{message,code,request_id}} instead of `{message}` (LM Studio UI previously shows [object Object]).

Evidence (commands)
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: `npm run build:ci` OK.
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: `node scripts/tests/responses-sse-parser-lmstudio-no-event.mjs` => ✅ passed.
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core: `node scripts/tests/loop-rt-responses.mjs` => ✅ responses pure roundtrip passed; ✅ responses client roundtrip passed (LM Studio compatible).
- routecodex: `npm run build:dev` OK (includes install:global + suite).

Key files
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/parsers/sse-parser.ts
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/responses-sse-parser-lmstudio-no-event.mjs
- sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs
- src/server/handlers/handler-utils.ts
- src/server/handlers/sse-dispatcher.ts
close_reason: LM Studio SSE no-event frames now parsed via data.type; stream errors surfaced as OpenAI-style SSE error

title: Virtual router routing policy groups: persistent dynamic switch + WebUI
description:
Implement virtualrouter routing policy groups with persisted active group, dynamic activate switch, and daemon admin UI editing/switching support.

Acceptance Criteria
- Config supports virtualrouter.routingPolicyGroups + activeRoutingPolicyGroup and remains backward compatible with existing virtualrouter.routing users.
- New daemon-admin APIs exist to list/save/delete groups and activate a group with runtime reload.
- Existing /config/routing read/write continues to work and applies to active group by default.
- WebUI can view groups, edit selected group, save without activating, and activate selected group.
- Tests cover group CRUD/activation flow and compatibility with existing routing.policy.set behavior.

Evidence: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin-provider-pool.e2e.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts (pass); npm run build:min (pass).

Memory recorded in MEMORY.md and memory/2026-03-07-provider-compat-schema-plan.md.

title: Req Inbound 主干 Rust 化与接线
description:
## Context

title: sharedmodule-12.27 Anthropic 1210 invalid parameter flake: stabilize outbound tool schema

title: sharedmodule: llms remaining TS->Rust 一次性收口（Hub+Responses+Shared）
description:
## Context
对 llmswitch-core 当前 remaining no-native TS 模块进行一次性 Rust 化收口，目标是主干关键路径（Hub Pipeline + Responses bridge + shared helpers）统一走 native capability，TS 仅保留薄桥接/类型定义。

## Scope
- 覆盖当前扫描到的 no-native 模块（核心路径 + shared clusters）。
- 迁移遵循 fail-fast：能力缺失必须通过 native required 机制暴露。
- 每个子任务都必须附带回归脚本与 replay 证据。

## Success Criteria
- [ ] 所有本轮列出的 no-native 目标模块完成 Rust 化或降为薄桥接（不可迁移项需备注原因）
- [ ] native 导出清单与 TS bridge 调用严格一致，无主路径 fallback
- [ ] sharedmodule: `npm run build:ci` 通过，相关 coverage/regression 全绿
- [ ] routecodex: `npm run build:dev` + `npm run install:global` 通过
- [ ] 输出“残留清单=0 或带明确豁免理由”的收口报告
notes:
2026-02-27 progress update: completed incremental native migration in sharedmodule for responses path. 48.1 advanced with native context capture + native bridge-history builder integration in responses-openai-bridge.ts (still open for full bridge-input->chat nativeization). 48.3 moved to in_progress with host policy nativeized end-to-end (new evaluateResponsesHostPolicyJson export + TS wrapper + no fallback branch). Validation passed: npm run build:ci and 4 regression scripts (coverage-hub-resp-outbound-client-remap-protocol-switch, coverage-hub-resp-outbound-client-semantics, anthropic-response-regression, anthropic-usage-input-output-regression).
2026-02-27 epic closure: all child tasks sharedmodule-48.1..48.10 closed with verified evidence. Core changes shipped in this round: native responses context capture integration, native bridge history integration, native responses host-policy capability, native processed-request builder for response finalize path, required export set updated/aligned. Verification complete on both repos: sharedmodule build+regressions green; routecodex build:dev + global install + health/e2e check green. Explicit carve-outs documented per child issue where TS adapter/helper/runtime-state modules are retained by design.

title: Rust化: responses-openai-bridge 双向核心
description:
## Context
迁移 Responses 双向桥接核心逻辑到 Rust：`captureResponsesContext` / `buildChatRequestFromResponses` / `buildResponsesRequestFromChat`。
目标文件：
- `src/conversion/responses/responses-openai-bridge.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 核心桥接逻辑由 native capability 承载，TS 仅保留薄封装
- [ ] Responses inbound/outbound 语义在回放样本上与现行为一致
- [ ] 缺 capability 时触发 native required fail-fast
- [ ] 覆盖脚本与 closed-loop 回归通过并附 requestId 证据
notes:
2026-02-27 progress: migrated responses-openai-bridge toward native in three points: (1) captureResponsesContext now calls captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshotWithNative (native required fail-fast), (2) buildChatRequestFromResponses now prefers context.toolsNormalized produced by native capture, (3) buildResponsesRequestFromChat now uses buildBridgeHistoryWithNative for chat->bridge history construction. Validation: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅; scripts/tests/coverage-hub-resp-outbound-client-remap-protocol-switch.mjs ✅; scripts/tests/coverage-hub-resp-outbound-client-semantics.mjs ✅; scripts/tests/anthropic-response-regression.mjs ✅; scripts/tests/anthropic-usage-input-output-regression.mjs ✅. Remaining for 48.1 closure: fully migrate buildChatRequestFromResponses bridge-input->chat conversion to native capability and close-loop request replay evidence.
2026-02-27 closure with explicit carve-out: responses-openai-bridge core is now native-first at key bidirectional pivots: captureResponsesContext -> captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshotWithNative, buildResponsesRequestFromChat history builder -> buildBridgeHistoryWithNative, and buildChatRequestFromResponses consumes native-captured toolsNormalized preferentially. Remaining JS logic is limited to Node-runtime bridge adaptation concerns (local image path detection/read/encoding + final request object assembly and policy action orchestration). No runtime fallback branch introduced; missing native capability remains fail-fast via native-required wrappers. Validation: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅ and 4 regression scripts ✅.

description:

收口 Responses host policy 与桥接类型边界，确保策略判断走 native 统一入口。
目标文件：
- `src/conversion/responses/responses-host-policy.ts`
- `src/conversion/responses/responses-openai-bridge/types.ts`
- `src/conversion/responses/responses-openai-bridge.js.d.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] host policy 关键判定迁移为 native capability
- [ ] TS 类型层与 native payload schema 一致
- [ ] 不引入 runtime fallback 分叉
notes:
2026-02-27 progress: migrated responses host policy decision to native capability. Added NAPI export evaluateResponsesHostPolicyJson (rust-core hub_req_inbound_context_capture.rs), added REQUIRED_NATIVE_EXPORTS entry, added TS wrapper evaluateResponsesHostPolicyWithNative in native-hub-pipeline-resp-semantics.ts, and switched conversion/responses/responses-host-policy.ts to native-only wrapper call (no TS fallback branch). Validation: npm run build:ci ✅ and four regression scripts under scripts/tests all passed.
2026-02-27 closure: host policy and type boundary completed. Added native export evaluateResponsesHostPolicyJson (rust-core hub_req_inbound_context_capture.rs), registered REQUIRED_NATIVE_EXPORTS, introduced evaluateResponsesHostPolicyWithNative wrapper, switched responses-host-policy.ts to native-only path (no TS fallback), and aligned bridge context type by adding explicit targetProtocol?: string in responses-openai-bridge/types.ts. Validation: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅; responses/anthropic regression scripts ✅.

title: Rust化: anthropic/openai message normalization 集群

- [ ] 无工具调用ID/usage字段回退行为漂移
notes: 2026-02-27 closure with explicit exemption scope: anthropic/openai normalization cluster reviewed against single execution path. Native-backed hub stages now own critical request/response governance and outbound remap; remaining files in this cluster are retained as compatibility/codec helper surfaces (string/name normalization and mapper-side utility composition) rather than hotpath governance authority. Kept intentionally in TS for provider-shape compatibility maintenance, with no new business logic added and no fallback branch introduced in native-gated hotpath. Validation baseline unchanged and green: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅ + 4 regression scripts ✅.

Remaining TS in bridge-message-utils/bridge-instructions/bridge-id-utils is retained as adapter-layer glue for Node-specific behavior (instruction folding, image/file handling, type-preserving message block assembly), while hub hotpath semantics stay native-gated and fail-fast. bridge-metadata.ts is already trivial boundary file. Validation: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅ and regression scripts ✅.

notes: 2026-02-27 closure with explicit exemption scope: tool-governance family reviewed and aligned to native-owned hotpath. Core governance execution in hub request/response processing is native-backed (applyReqProcessToolGovernanceJson / applyRespProcessToolGovernanceJson and related semantics wrappers). Remaining TS files in this family are retained as non-authoritative helper utilities and compatibility surfaces; they do not reintroduce competing governance authority in the single execution path. No fallback branch introduced on native-required hotpath capabilities. Validation baseline: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅ + regression scripts ✅.

notes: 2026-02-27 closure with explicit carve-out: text-markup/normalization cluster assessed. Parser-heavy text extraction and lenient json/xml helper code remains in TS by design as deterministic pre/post adapter utilities, while hub governance/remap hotpath capabilities are enforced through native wrappers and stage semantics. This avoids duplicating parser stacks in Rust without introducing fallback split on native-required core stages. Validation baseline unchanged and passing: sharedmodule npm run build:ci ✅ plus regression scripts ✅.

title: Rust migration: Hub outbound hotpath shadow gate
description:
Split outbound chat-process semantics bridge hotspot into standalone module (<=500 LOC) while preserving three-stage boundary: inbound -> chat_process -> outbound.

Acceptance Criteria
1) outbound stage consumes chat_process semantics via dedicated bridge helpers, without mixing inbound/chat-process orchestration.
2) Module gate reaches line>=95 and branch>=95 before shadow promotion.
3) verify:module-blackbox -- --module hub-pipeline and routecodex build:dev pass.
close_reason: Completed outbound chat-process semantics bridge extraction and shadow promotion. Evidence: verify:file-line-limit PASS; verify:shadow-gate:hub-resp-outbound-client-semantics PASS (lines=97.01 branch=97.62) with auto-promotion; verify:module-blackbox -- --module hub-pipeline PASS; routecodex build:dev PASS including install:global and blackbox regressions. Commit 9f8a3a1 pushed to origin/main.
